20:131.translation: And do not extend your eyes toward that by which We have given enjoyment to [some] categories of them, [its being but] the splendor of worldly life by which We test them. And the provision of your Lord is better and more enduring.

20:132.transliteration: Wa/mur ahlaka bissalatiwastabir AAalayha la nas-alukarizqan nahnu narzuquka walAAaqibatu littaqwa
20:132.translation: And enjoin prayer upon your family [and people] and be steadfast therein. We ask you not for provision; We provide for you, and the [best] outcome is for [those of] righteousness.

20:133.transliteration: Waqaloo lawla ya/teenabi-ayatin min rabbihi awa lam ta/tihim bayyinatu mafee assuhufi al-oola
20:133.translation: And they say, "Why does he not bring us a sign from his Lord?" Has there not come to them evidence of what was in the former scriptures?

20:134.transliteration: Walaw anna ahlaknahum biAAathabinmin qablihi laqaloo rabbana lawla arsaltailayna rasoolan fanattabiAAa ayatika minqabli an nathilla wanakhza
20:134.translation: And if We had destroyed them with a punishment before him, they would have said, "Our Lord, why did You not send to us a messenger so we could have followed Your verses [i.e., teachings] before we were humiliated and disgraced?"

20:135.transliteration: Qul kullun mutarabbisun fatarabbasoofasataAAlamoona man as-habu assiratiassawiyyi wamani ihtada
20:135.translation: Say, "Each [of us] is waiting; so wait. For you will know who are the companions of the sound path and who is guided."

21:1.transliteration: Iqtaraba linnasi hisabuhumwahum fee ghaflatin muAAridoon
21:1.translation: [The time of] their account has approached for the people, while they are in heedlessness turning away.

21:2.transliteration: Ma ya/teehim min thikrin minrabbihim muhdathin illa istamaAAoohu wahumyalAAaboon
21:2.translation: No mention [i.e., revelation] comes to them anew from their Lord except that they listen to it while they are at play

21:3.transliteration: Lahiyatan quloobuhum waasarroo annajwaallatheena thalamoo hal hatha illabasharun mithlukum afata/toona assihra waantum tubsiroon
21:3.translation: With their hearts distracted. And those who do wrong conceal their private conversation, [saying], "Is this [Prophet] except a human being like you? So would you approach magic while you are aware [of it]?"

21:4.transliteration: Qala rabbee yaAAlamu alqawla fee assama-iwal-ardi wahuwa assameeAAu alAAaleem
21:4.translation: He [the Prophet (ﷺ)] said, "My Lord knows whatever is said throughout the heaven and earth, and He is the Hearing, the Knowing."

21:5.transliteration: Bal qaloo adghathu ahlaminbali iftarahu bal huwa shaAAirun falya/tinabi-ayatin kama orsila al-awwaloon
21:5.translation: But they say, "[The revelation is but] a mixture of false dreams; rather, he has invented it; rather, he is a poet. So let him bring us a sign just as the previous [messengers] were sent [with miracles]."

21:6.transliteration: Ma amanat qablahum min qaryatinahlaknaha afahum yu/minoon
21:6.translation: Not a [single] city which We destroyed believed before them, so will they believe?

21:7.transliteration: Wama arsalna qablaka illarijalan noohee ilayhim fas-aloo ahla aththikriin kuntum la taAAlamoon
21:7.translation: And We sent not before you, [O Muḥammad], except men to whom We revealed [the message], so ask the people of the message [i.e., former scriptures] if you do not know.

21:8.transliteration: Wama jaAAalnahum jasadan laya/kuloona attaAAama wama kanookhalideen
21:8.translation: And We did not make them [i.e., the prophets] forms not eating food, nor were they immortal [on earth].

21:9.transliteration: Thumma sadaqnahumu alwaAAdafaanjaynahum waman nashao waahlaknaalmusrifeen
21:9.translation: Then We fulfilled for them the promise, and We saved them and whom We willed and destroyed the transgressors.

21:10.transliteration: Laqad anzalna ilaykum kitabanfeehi thikrukum afala taAAqiloon
21:10.translation: We have certainly sent down to you a Book [i.e., the Qur’ān] in which is your mention. Then will you not reason?

21:11.transliteration: Wakam qasamna min qaryatin kanatthalimatan waansha/na baAAdahaqawman akhareen
21:11.translation: And how many a city which was unjust have We shattered and produced after it another people.

21:12.transliteration: Falamma ahassoo ba/sanaitha hum minha yarkudoon
21:12.translation: And when they [i.e., its inhabitants] perceived Our punishment, at once they fled from it.

21:13.transliteration: La tarkudoo warjiAAooila ma otriftum feehi wamasakinikumlaAAallakum tus-aloon
21:13.translation: [Some angels said], "Do not flee but return to where you were given luxury and to your homes - perhaps you will be questioned."

21:14.translation: They said, "O woe to us! Indeed, we were wrongdoers."

21:15.transliteration: Fama zalat tilka daAAwahumhatta jaAAalnahum haseedan khamideen
21:15.translation: And that declaration of theirs did not cease until We made them [as] a harvest [mowed down], extinguished [like a fire].

21:16.transliteration: Wama khalaqna assamaawal-arda wama baynahuma laAAibeen
21:16.translation: And We did not create the heaven and earth and that between them in play.

21:17.transliteration: Law aradna an nattakhithalahwan lattakhathnahu min ladunna inkunna faAAileen
21:17.translation: Had We intended to take a diversion, We could have taken it from [what is] with Us - if [indeed] We were to do so.

21:18.transliteration: Bal naqthifu bilhaqqiAAala albatili fayadmaghuhu fa-itha huwa zahiqunwalakumu alwaylu mimma tasifoon
21:18.translation: Rather, We dash the truth upon falsehood, and it destroys it, and thereupon it departs. And for you is destruction from that which you describe.

21:19.transliteration: Walahu man fee assamawatiwal-ardi waman AAindahu la yastakbiroonaAAan AAibadatihi wala yastahsiroon
21:19.translation: To Him belongs whoever is in the heavens and the earth. And those near Him [i.e., the angels] are not prevented by arrogance from His worship, nor do they tire.

21:20.translation: They exalt [Him] night and day [and] do not slacken.

21:21.transliteration: Ami ittakhathoo alihatan minaal-ardi hum yunshiroon
21:21.translation: Or have they [i.e., men] taken for themselves gods from the earth who resurrect [the dead]?

21:22.transliteration: Law kana feehima alihatunilla Allahu lafasadata fasubhana Allahirabbi alAAarshi AAamma yasifoon
21:22.translation: Had there been within them [i.e., the heavens and earth] gods besides Allāh, they both would have been ruined. So exalted is Allāh, Lord of the Throne, above what they describe.

21:23.translation: He is not questioned about what He does, but they will be questioned.

21:24.transliteration: Ami ittakhathoo min doonihi alihatanqul hatoo burhanakum hatha thikru manmaAAiya wathikru man qablee bal aktharuhum layaAAlamoona alhaqqa fahum muAAridoon
21:24.translation: Or have they taken gods besides Him? Say, [O Muḥammad], "Produce your proof. This [Qur’ān] is the message for those with me and the message of those before me." But most of them do not know the truth, so they are turning away.

21:25.transliteration: Wama arsalna min qablika minrasoolin illa noohee ilayhi annahu la ilahailla ana faAAbudoon
21:25.translation: And We sent not before you any messenger except We revealed to him that, "There is no deity except Me, so worship Me."

21:26.transliteration: Waqaloo ittakhatha arrahmanuwaladan subhanahu bal AAibadun mukramoon
21:26.translation: And they say, "The Most Merciful has taken a son." Exalted is He! Rather, they are [but] honored servants.

21:27.translation: They cannot precede Him in word, and they act by His command.

21:28.transliteration: YaAAlamu ma bayna aydeehim wamakhalfahum wala yashfaAAoona illa limani irtadawahum min khashyatihi mushfiqoon
21:28.translation: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them, and they cannot intercede except on behalf of one whom He approves. And they, from fear of Him, are apprehensive.

21:29.transliteration: Waman yaqul minhum innee ilahun mindoonihi fathalika najzeehi jahannama kathalikanajzee aththalimeen
21:29.translation: And whoever of them should say, "Indeed, I am a god besides Him" - that one We would recompense with Hell. Thus do We recompense the wrongdoers.

21:30.transliteration: Awa lam yara allatheenakafaroo anna assamawati wal-ardakanata ratqan fafataqnahuma wajaAAalnamina alma-i kulla shay-in hayyin afalayu/minoon
21:30.translation: Have those who disbelieved not considered that the heavens and the earth were a joined entity, and then We separated them and made from water every living thing? Then will they not believe?

21:31.transliteration: WajaAAalna fee al-ardi rawasiyaan tameeda bihim wajaAAalna feeha fijajansubulan laAAallahum yahtadoon
21:31.translation: And We placed within the earth firmly set mountains, lest it should shift with them, and We made therein [mountain] passes [as] roads that they might be guided.

21:32.transliteration: WajaAAalna assamaasaqfan mahfoothan wahum AAan ayatihamuAAridoon
21:32.translation: And We made the sky a protected ceiling, but they, from its signs, are turning away.

21:33.transliteration: Wahuwa allathee khalaqa allayla wannaharawashshamsa walqamara kullun fee falakin yasbahoon
21:33.translation: And it is He who created the night and the day and the sun and the moon; all [heavenly bodies] in an orbit are swimming.

21:34.transliteration: Wama jaAAalna libasharin minqablika alkhulda afa-in mitta fahumu alkhalidoon
21:34.translation: And We did not grant to any man before you eternity [on earth]; so if you die - would they be eternal?

21:35.transliteration: Kullu nafsin tha-iqatu almawtiwanablookum bishsharri walkhayri fitnatanwa-ilayna turjaAAoon
21:35.translation: Every soul will taste death. And We test you with evil and with good as trial; and to Us you will be returned.

21:36.transliteration: Wa-itha raaka allatheenakafaroo in yattakhithoonaka illa huzuwan ahathaallathee yathkuru alihatakum wahum bithikriarrahmani hum kafiroon
21:36.translation: And when those who disbelieve see you, [O Muḥammad], they take you not except in ridicule, [saying], "Is this the one who mentions [i.e., insults] your gods?" And they are, at the mention of the Most Merciful, disbelievers.

21:37.transliteration: Khuliqa al-insanu min AAajalinsaoreekum ayatee fala tastaAAjiloon
21:37.translation: Man was created of haste [i.e., impatience]. I will show you My signs [i.e., vengeance], so do not impatiently urge Me.

21:38.transliteration: Wayaqooloona mata hathaalwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeen
21:38.translation: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"

21:39.transliteration: Law yaAAlamu allatheena kafaroo heenala yakuffoona AAan wujoohihimu annara walaAAan thuhoorihim wala hum yunsaroon
21:39.translation: If those who disbelieved but knew the time when they will not avert the Fire from their faces or from their backs and they will not be aided...

21:40.transliteration: Bal ta/teehim baghtatan fatabhatuhum falayastateeAAoona raddaha wala hum yuntharoon
21:40.translation: Rather, it will come to them unexpectedly and bewilder them, and they will not be able to repel it, nor will they be reprieved.

21:41.transliteration: Walaqadi istuhzi-a birusulin min qablika fahaqabillatheena sakhiroo minhum ma kanoobihi yastahzi-oon
21:41.translation: And already were messengers ridiculed before you, but those who mocked them were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.

21:42.transliteration: Qul man yaklaokum billayli wannaharimina arrahmani bal hum AAan thikrirabbihim muAAridoon
21:42.translation: Say, "Who can protect you at night or by day from the Most Merciful?" But they are, from the remembrance of their Lord, turning away.

21:43.transliteration: Am lahum alihatun tamnaAAuhum mindoonina la yastateeAAoona nasraanfusihim wala hum minna yushaboon
21:43.translation: Or do they have gods to defend them other than Us? They are unable [even] to help themselves, nor can they be protected from Us.

21:44.transliteration: Bal mattaAAna haola-iwaabaahum hatta talaAAalayhimu alAAumuru afala yarawna anna na/teeal-arda nanqusuha min atrafihaafahumu alghaliboon
21:44.translation: But, [on the contrary], We have provided good things for these [disbelievers] and their fathers until life was prolonged for them. Then do they not see that We set upon the land, reducing it from its borders? Is it they who will overcome?

21:45.transliteration: Qul innama onthirukum bilwahyiwala yasmaAAu assummu adduAAaaitha ma yuntharoon
21:45.translation: Say, "I only warn you by revelation." But the deaf do not hear the call when they are warned.

21:46.transliteration: Wala-in massat-hum nafhatun min AAathabirabbika layaqoolunna ya waylana inna kunnathalimeen
21:46.translation: And if [as much as] a whiff of the punishment of your Lord should touch them, they would surely say, "O woe to us! Indeed, we have been wrongdoers."

21:47.transliteration: WanadaAAu almawazeena alqistaliyawmi alqiyamati fala tuthlamunafsun shay-an wa-in kana mithqala habbatinmin khardalin atayna biha wakafa binahasibeen
21:47.translation: And We place the scales of justice for the Day of Resurrection, so no soul will be treated unjustly at all. And if there is [even] the weight of a mustard seed, We will bring it forth. And sufficient are We as accountant.

21:48.transliteration: Walaqad atayna moosawaharoona alfurqana wadiyaan wathikranlilmuttaqeen
21:48.translation: And We had already given Moses and Aaron the criterion and a light and a reminder for the righteous

21:49.transliteration: Allatheena yakhshawna rabbahum bilghaybiwahum mina assaAAati mushfiqoon
21:49.translation: Who fear their Lord unseen, while they are of the Hour apprehensive.

21:50.transliteration: Wahatha thikrun mubarakunanzalnahu afaantum lahu munkiroon
21:50.translation: And this [Qur’ān] is a blessed message which We have sent down. Then are you with it unacquainted?

21:51.transliteration: Walaqad atayna ibraheemarushdahu min qablu wakunna bihi AAalimeen
21:51.translation: And We had certainly given Abraham his sound judgement before, and We were of him well-Knowing

21:52.transliteration: Ith qala li-abeehi waqawmihi mahathihi attamatheelu allatee antum lahaAAakifoon
21:52.translation: When he said to his father and his people, "What are these statues to which you are devoted?"

21:53.translation: They said, "We found our fathers worshippers of them."

21:54.transliteration: Qala laqad kuntum antum waabaokumfee dalalin mubeen
21:54.translation: He said, "You were certainly, you and your fathers, in manifest error."

21:55.transliteration: Qaloo aji/tana bilhaqqiam anta mina allaAAibeen
21:55.translation: They said, "Have you come to us with truth, or are you of those who jest?"

21:56.transliteration: Qala bal rabbukum rabbu assamawatiwal-ardi allathee fatarahunna waanaAAala thalikum mina ashshahideen
21:56.translation: He said, "[No], rather, your Lord is the Lord of the heavens and the earth who created them, and I, to that, am of those who testify.

21:57.transliteration: Watallahi laakeedanna asnamakumbaAAda an tuwalloo mudbireen
21:57.translation: And [I swear] by Allāh, I will surely plan against your idols after you have turned and gone away."

21:58.transliteration: FajaAAalahum juthathan illakabeeran lahum laAAallahum ilayhi yarjiAAoon
21:58.translation: So he made them into fragments, except a large one among them, that they might return to it [and question].

21:59.transliteration: Qaloo man faAAala hatha bi-alihatinainnahu lamina aththalimeen
21:59.translation: They said, "Who has done this to our gods? Indeed, he is of the wrongdoers."

21:60.transliteration: Qaloo samiAAna fatan yathkuruhumyuqalu lahu ibraheem
21:60.translation: They said, "We heard a young man mention them who is called Abraham."

21:61.transliteration: Qaloo fa/too bihi AAalaaAAyuni annasi laAAallahum yashhadoon
21:61.translation: They said, "Then bring him before the eyes of the people that they may testify."

21:62.transliteration: Qaloo aanta faAAalta hatha bi-alihatinaya ibraheem
21:62.translation: They said, "Have you done this to our gods, O Abraham?"

21:63.transliteration: Qala bal faAAalahu kabeeruhum hathafas-aloohum in kanoo yantiqoon
21:63.translation: He said, "Rather, this - the largest of them - did it, so ask them, if they should [be able to] speak."

21:64.transliteration: FarajaAAoo ila anfusihim faqalooinnakum antumu aththalimoon
21:64.translation: So they returned to [blaming] themselves and said [to each other], "Indeed, you are the wrongdoers."

21:65.transliteration: Thumma nukisoo AAala ruoosihim laqadAAalimta ma haola-i yantiqoon
21:65.translation: Then they reversed themselves, [saying], "You have already known that these do not speak!"

21:66.transliteration: Qala afataAAbudoona min dooni Allahima la yanfaAAukum shay-an wala yadurrukum
21:66.translation: He said, "Then do you worship instead of Allāh that which does not benefit you at all or harm you?

21:67.transliteration: Offin lakum walima taAAbudoona mindooni Allahi afala taAAqiloon
21:67.translation: Uff to you and to what you worship instead of Allāh. Then will you not use reason?"

21:68.transliteration: Qaloo harriqoohu wansurooalihatakum in kuntum faAAileen
21:68.translation: They said, "Burn him and support your gods - if you are to act."

21:69.transliteration: Qulna ya naru kooneebardan wasalaman AAala ibraheem
21:69.translation: We [i.e., Allāh] said, "O fire, be coolness and safety upon Abraham."

21:70.translation: And they intended for him a plan [i.e., harm], but We made them the greatest losers.

21:71.transliteration: Wanajjaynahu walootan ilaal-ardi allatee barakna feeha lilAAalameen
21:71.translation: And We delivered him and Lot to the land which We had blessed for the worlds [i.e., peoples].

21:72.transliteration: Wawahabna lahu ishaqawayaAAqooba nafilatan wakullan jaAAalna saliheen
21:72.translation: And We gave him Isaac and Jacob in addition, and all [of them] We made righteous.

21:73.transliteration: WajaAAalnahum a-immatan yahdoonabi-amrina waawhayna ilayhim fiAAla alkhayratiwa-iqama assalati wa-eetaa azzakatiwakanoo lana AAabideen
21:73.translation: And We made them leaders guiding by Our command. And We inspired to them the doing of good deeds, establishment of prayer, and giving of zakāh; and they were worshippers of Us.

21:74.transliteration: Walootan ataynahu hukmanwaAAilman wanajjaynahu mina alqaryati allatee kanattaAAmalu alkhaba-itha innahum kanoo qawma saw-in fasiqeen
21:74.translation: And to Lot We gave judgement and knowledge, and We saved him from the city that was committing wicked deeds. Indeed, they were a people of evil, defiantly disobedient.

21:75.translation: And We admitted him into Our mercy. Indeed, he was of the righteous.

21:76.transliteration: Wanoohan ith nadamin qablu fastajabna lahu fanajjaynahuwaahlahu mina alkarbi alAAatheem
21:76.translation: And [mention] Noah, when he called [to Allāh] before [that time], so We responded to him and saved him and his family from the great affliction [i.e., the flood].

21:77.transliteration: Wanasarnahu mina alqawmi allatheenakaththaboo bi-ayatina innahum kanooqawma saw-in faaghraqnahum ajmaAAeen
21:77.translation: And We aided [i.e., saved] him from the people who denied Our signs. Indeed, they were a people of evil, so We drowned them, all together.

21:78.transliteration: Wadawooda wasulaymana ithyahkumani fee alharthi ith nafashatfeehi ghanamu alqawmi wakunna lihukmihim shahideen
21:78.translation: And [mention] David and Solomon, when they judged concerning the field - when the sheep of a people overran it [at night], and We were witness to their judgement.

21:79.transliteration: Fafahhamnaha sulaymanawakullan atayna hukman waAAilman wasakhkharnamaAAa dawooda aljibala yusabbihna wattayrawakunna faAAileen
21:79.translation: And We gave understanding of it [i.e., the case] to Solomon, and to each [of them] We gave judgement and knowledge. And We subjected the mountains to exalt [Us], along with David and [also] the birds. And We were doing [that].

21:80.transliteration: WaAAallamnahu sanAAatalaboosin lakum lituhsinakum min ba/sikum fahal antum shakiroon
21:80.translation: And We taught him the fashioning of coats of armor to protect you from your [enemy in] battle. So will you then be grateful?

21:81.transliteration: Walisulaymana arreehaAAasifatan tajree bi-amrihi ila al-ardiallatee barakna feeha wakunna bikullishay-in AAalimeen
21:81.translation: And to Solomon [We subjected] the wind, blowing forcefully, proceeding by his command toward the land which We had blessed. And We are ever, of all things, Knowing.

21:82.transliteration: Wamina ashshayateeni manyaghoosoona lahu wayaAAmaloona AAamalan doona thalikawakunna lahum hafitheen
21:82.translation: And of the devils [i.e., jinn] were those who dived for him and did work other than that. And We were of them a guardian.

21:83.transliteration: Waayyooba ith nadarabbahu annee massaniya addurru waanta arhamuarrahimeen
21:83.translation: And [mention] Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, adversity has touched me, and You are the most merciful of the merciful."

21:84.transliteration: Fastajabna lahu fakashafnama bihi min durrin waataynahu ahlahuwamithlahum maAAahum rahmatan min AAindina wathikralilAAabideen
21:84.translation: So We responded to him and removed what afflicted him of adversity. And We gave him [back] his family and the like thereof with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for the worshippers [of Allāh].

21:85.transliteration: Wa-ismaAAeela wa-idreesa wathaalkifli kullun mina assabireen
21:85.translation: And [mention] Ishmael and Idrees and Dhul-Kifl; all were of the patient.

21:86.translation: And We admitted them into Our mercy. Indeed, they were of the righteous.

21:87.transliteration: Watha annooni ith thahabamughadiban fathanna an lan naqdira AAalayhifanada fee aththulumatian la ilaha illa anta subhanaka inneekuntu mina aththalimeen
21:87.translation: And [mention] the man of the fish [i.e., Jonah], when he went off in anger and thought that We would not decree [anything] upon him. And he called out within the darknesses, "There is no deity except You; exalted are You. Indeed, I have been of the wrongdoers."

21:88.transliteration: Fastajabna lahu wanajjaynahumina alghammi wakathalika nunjee almu/mineen
21:88.translation: So We responded to him and saved him from the distress. And thus do We save the believers.

21:89.transliteration: Wazakariyya ith nadarabbahu rabbi la tatharnee fardan waanta khayru alwaritheen
21:89.translation: And [mention] Zechariah, when he called to his Lord, "My Lord, do not leave me alone [with no heir], while You are the best of inheritors."

21:90.transliteration: Fastajabna lahu wawahabnalahu yahya waaslahna lahuzawjahu innahum kanoo yusariAAoona fee alkhayratiwayadAAoonana raghaban warahaban wakanoo lanakhashiAAeen
21:90.translation: So We responded to him, and We gave to him John, and amended for him his wife. Indeed, they used to hasten to good deeds and supplicate Us in hope and fear, and they were to Us humbly submissive.

21:91.transliteration: Wallatee ahsanat farjahafanafakhna feeha min roohinawajaAAalnaha wabnaha ayatanlilAAalameen
21:91.translation: And [mention] the one who guarded her chastity [i.e., Mary], so We blew into her [garment] through Our angel [i.e., Gabriel], and We made her and her son a sign for the worlds.

21:92.transliteration: Inna hathihi ommatukum ommatan wahidatanwaana rabbukum faoAAbudoon
21:92.translation: Indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so worship Me.

21:93.translation: And [yet] they divided their affair [i.e., that of their religion] among themselves, [but] all to Us will return.

21:94.transliteration: Faman yaAAmal mina assalihatiwahuwa mu/minun fala kufrana lisaAAyihi wa-innalahu katiboon
21:94.translation: So whoever does righteous deeds while he is a believer - no denial will there be for his effort, and indeed We [i.e., Our angels], of it, are recorders.

21:95.transliteration: Waharamun AAalaqaryatin ahlaknaha annahum la yarjiAAoon
21:95.translation: And it is prohibited to [the people of] a city which We have destroyed that they will [ever] return

21:96.transliteration: Hatta itha futihatya/jooju wama/jooju wahum min kulli hadabin yansiloon
21:96.translation: Until when [the dam of] Gog and Magog has been opened and they, from every elevation, descend

21:97.transliteration: Waqtaraba alwaAAdu alhaqqufa-itha hiya shakhisatun absaru allatheenakafaroo ya waylana qad kunna fee ghaflatinmin hatha bal kunna thalimeen
21:97.translation: And [when] the true promise [i.e., the resurrection] has approached; then suddenly the eyes of those who disbelieved will be staring [in horror, while they say], "O woe to us; we had been unmindful of this; rather, we were wrongdoers."

21:98.transliteration: Innakum wama taAAbudoona min dooniAllahi hasabu jahannama antum laha waridoon
21:98.translation: Indeed, you [disbelievers] and what you worship other than Allāh are the firewood of Hell. You will be coming to [enter] it.

21:99.transliteration: Law kana haola-i alihatanma waradooha wakullun feeha khalidoon
21:99.translation: Had these [false deities] been [actual] gods, they would not have come to it, but all are eternal therein.

21:100.transliteration: Lahum feeha zafeerun wahum feehala yasmaAAoon
21:100.translation: For them therein is heavy sighing, and they therein will not hear.

21:101.transliteration: Inna allatheena sabaqat lahum minnaalhusna ola-ika AAanha mubAAadoon
21:101.translation: Indeed, those for whom the best [reward] has preceded from Us - they are from it far removed.

21:102.transliteration: La yasmaAAoona haseesahawahum fee ma ishtahat anfusuhum khalidoon
21:102.translation: They will not hear its sound, while they are, in that which their souls desire, abiding eternally.

21:103.transliteration: La yahzunuhumu alfazaAAual-akbaru watatalaqqahumu almala-ikatu hathayawmukumu allathee kuntum tooAAadoon
21:103.translation: They will not be grieved by the greatest terror, and the angels will meet them, [saying], "This is your Day which you have been promised" -

21:104.transliteration: Yawma natwee assamaakatayyi assijlli lilkutubi kama bada/naawwala khalqin nuAAeeduhu waAAdan AAalayna innakunna faAAileen
21:104.translation: The Day when We will fold the heaven like the folding of a [written] sheet for the records. As We began the first creation, We will repeat it. [That is] a promise binding upon Us. Indeed, We will do it.

21:105.transliteration: Walaqad katabna fee azzaboorimin baAAdi aththikri anna al-arda yarithuhaAAibadiya assalihoon
21:105.translation: And We have already written in the book [of Psalms] after the [previous] mention that the land [of Paradise] is inherited by My righteous servants.

21:106.translation: Indeed, in this [Qur’ān] is notification for a worshipping people.

21:107.translation: And We have not sent you, [O Muḥammad], except as a mercy to the worlds.

21:108.transliteration: Qul innama yooha ilayya annamailahukum ilahun wahidun fahal antummuslimoon
21:108.translation: Say, "It is only revealed to me that your god is but one God; so will you be Muslims [in submission to Him]?"

21:109.transliteration: Fa-in tawallaw faqul athantukum AAalasawa-in wa-in adree aqareebun am baAAeedun matooAAadoon
21:109.translation: But if they turn away, then say, "I have announced to [all of] you equally. And I know not whether near or far is that which you are promised.

21:110.transliteration: Innahu yaAAlamu aljahra mina alqawliwayaAAlamu ma taktumoon
21:110.translation: Indeed, He knows what is declared of speech, and He knows what you conceal.

21:111.transliteration: Wa-in adree laAAallahu fitnatun lakum wamataAAunila heen
21:111.translation: And I know not; perhaps it is a trial for you and enjoyment for a time."

21:112.transliteration: Qala rabbi ohkum bilhaqqiwarabbuna arrahmanu almustaAAanuAAala ma tasifoon
21:112.translation: [The Prophet (ﷺ)] has said, "My Lord, judge [between us] in truth. And our Lord is the Most Merciful, the one whose help is sought against that which you describe."

22:1.transliteration: Ya ayyuha annasuittaqoo rabbakum inna zalzalata assaAAati shay-onAAatheem
22:1.translation: O mankind, fear your Lord. Indeed, the convulsion of the [final] Hour is a terrible thing.

22:2.transliteration: Yawma tarawnaha tathhalu kullumurdiAAatin AAamma ardaAAat watadaAAukullu thati hamlin hamlaha wataraannasa sukara wama hum bisukarawalakinna AAathaba Allahi shadeed
22:2.translation: On the Day you see it every nursing mother will be distracted from that [child] she was nursing, and every pregnant woman will abort her pregnancy, and you will see the people [appearing] intoxicated while they are not intoxicated; but the punishment of Allāh is severe.

22:3.transliteration: Wamina annasi man yujadilufee Allahi bighayri AAilmin wayattabiAAu kulla shaytaninmareed
22:3.translation: And of the people is he who disputes about Allāh without knowledge and follows every rebellious devil.

22:4.transliteration: Kutiba AAalayhi annahu man tawallahufaannahu yudilluhu wayahdeehi ila AAathabi assaAAeer
22:4.translation: It has been decreed for him [i.e., every devil] that whoever turns to him - he will misguide him and will lead him to the punishment of the Blaze.

22:5.transliteration: Ya ayyuha annasuin kuntum fee raybin mina albaAAthi fa-inna khalaqnakummin turabin thumma min nutfatin thumma minAAalaqatin thumma min mudghatin mukhallaqatin waghayrimukhallaqatin linubayyina lakum wanuqirru fee al-arhami manashao ila ajalin musamman thumma nukhrijukum tiflanthumma litablughoo ashuddakum waminkum man yutawaffawaminkum man yuraddu ila arthali alAAumuri likaylayaAAlama min baAAdi AAilmin shay-an watara al-ardahamidatan fa-itha anzalna AAalayhaalmaa ihtazzat warabat waanbatat min kulli zawjin baheej
22:5.translation: O people, if you should be in doubt about the Resurrection, then [consider that] indeed, We created you from dust, then from a sperm-drop, then from a clinging clot, and then from a lump of flesh, formed and unformed - that We may show you. And We settle in the wombs whom We will for a specified term, then We bring you out as a child, and then [We develop you] that you may reach your [time of] maturity. And among you is he who is taken in [early] death, and among you is he who is returned to the most decrepit [old] age so that he knows, after [once having] knowledge, nothing. And you see the earth barren, but when We send down upon it rain, it quivers and swells and grows [something] of every beautiful kind.

22:6.transliteration: Thalika bi-anna Allaha huwa alhaqquwaannahu yuhyee almawta waannahu AAala kullishay-in qadeer
22:6.translation: That is because Allāh is the True Reality and because He gives life to the dead and because He is over all things competent

22:7.transliteration: Waanna assaAAata atiyatunla rayba feeha waanna Allaha yabAAathu manfee alquboor
22:7.translation: And [that they may know] that the Hour is coming - no doubt about it - and that Allāh will resurrect those in the graves.

22:8.transliteration: Wamina annasi man yujadilufee Allahi bighayri AAilmin wala hudan walakitabin muneer
22:8.translation: And of the people is he who disputes about Allāh without knowledge or guidance or an enlightening book [from Him],

22:9.transliteration: Thaniya AAitfihi liyudillaAAan sabeeli Allahi lahu fee addunyakhizyun wanutheequhu yawma alqiyamati AAathabaalhareeq
22:9.translation: Twisting his neck [in arrogance] to mislead [people] from the way of Allāh. For him in the world is disgrace, and We will make him taste on the Day of Resurrection the punishment of the Burning Fire [while it is said],

22:10.transliteration: Thalika bima qaddamat yadakawaanna Allaha laysa bithallaminlilAAabeed
22:10.translation: "That is for what your hands have put forth and because Allāh is not ever unjust to [His] servants."

22:11.transliteration: Wamina annasi man yaAAbuduAllaha AAala harfin fa-in asabahukhayrun itmaanna bihi wa-in asabat-hu fitnatuninqalaba AAala wajhihi khasira addunya wal-akhiratathalika huwa alkhusranu almubeen
22:11.translation: And of the people is he who worships Allāh on an edge. If he is touched by good, he is reassured by it; but if he is struck by trial, he turns on his face [to unbelief]. He has lost [this] world and the Hereafter. That is what is the manifest loss.

22:12.transliteration: YadAAoo min dooni Allahi ma layadurruhu wama la yanfaAAuhu thalikahuwa addalalu albaAAeed
22:12.translation: He invokes instead of Allāh that which neither harms him nor benefits him. That is what is the extreme error.

22:13.transliteration: YadAAoo laman darruhu aqrabu minnafAAihi labi/sa almawla walabi/sa alAAasheer
22:13.translation: He invokes one whose harm is closer than his benefit - how wretched the protector and how wretched the associate.

22:14.transliteration: Inna Allaha yudkhilu allatheenaamanoo waAAamiloo assalihati jannatintajree min tahtiha al-anharu inna AllahayafAAalu ma yureed
22:14.translation: Indeed, Allāh will admit those who believe and do righteous deeds to gardens beneath which rivers flow. Indeed, Allāh does what He intends.

22:15.transliteration: Man kana yathunnu anlan yansurahu Allahu fee addunya wal-akhiratifalyamdud bisababin ila assama-i thummaliyaqtaAA falyanthur hal yuthhibannakayduhu ma yagheeth
22:15.translation: Whoever should think that Allāh will not support him [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] in this world and the Hereafter - let him extend a rope to the ceiling, then cut off [his breath], and let him see: will his effort remove that which enrages [him]?

22:16.transliteration: Wakathalika anzalnahu ayatinbayyinatin waanna Allaha yahdee man yureed
22:16.translation: And thus have We sent it [i.e., the Qur’ān] down as verses of clear evidence and because Allāh guides whom He intends.

22:17.transliteration: Inna allatheena amanoo wallatheenahadoo wassabi-eena wannasarawalmajoosa wallatheena ashrakoo inna Allahayafsilu baynahum yawma alqiyamati inna AllahaAAala kulli shay-in shaheed
22:17.translation: Indeed, those who have believed and those who were Jews and the Sabeans and the Christians and the Magians and those who associated with Allāh - Allāh will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection. Indeed Allāh is, over all things, Witness.

22:18.transliteration: Alam tara anna Allaha yasjudu lahuman fee assamawati waman fee al-ardiwashshamsu walqamaru wannujoomu waljibaluwashshajaru waddawabbu wakatheerun minaannasi wakatheerun haqqa AAalayhi alAAathabuwaman yuhini Allahu fama lahu min mukrimin inna AllahayafAAalu ma yasha/
22:18.translation: Do you not see [i.e., know] that to Allāh prostrates whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth and the sun, the moon, the stars, the mountains, the trees, the moving creatures and many of the people? But upon many the punishment has been justified. And he whom Allāh humiliates - for him there is no bestower of honor. Indeed, Allāh does what He wills.

22:19.transliteration: Hathani khasmani ikhtasamoofee rabbihim fallatheena kafaroo quttiAAatlahum thiyabun min narin yusabbu min fawqiruoosihimu alhameem
22:19.translation: These are two adversaries who have disputed over their Lord. But those who disbelieved will have cut out for them garments of fire. Poured upon their heads will be scalding water

22:20.translation: By which is melted that within their bellies and [their] skins.

22:21.translation: And for [striking] them are maces of iron.

22:22.transliteration: Kullama aradoo an yakhrujoominha min ghammin oAAeedoo feeha wathooqooAAathaba alhareeq
22:22.translation: Every time they want to get out of it [i.e., Hellfire] from anguish, they will be returned to it, and [it will be said], "Taste the punishment of the Burning Fire!"

22:23.transliteration: Inna Allaha yudkhilu allatheenaamanoo waAAamiloo assalihati jannatintajree min tahtiha al-anharu yuhallawnafeeha min asawira min thahabin walu/lu-anwalibasuhum feeha hareer
22:23.translation: Indeed, Allāh will admit those who believe and do righteous deeds to gardens beneath which rivers flow. They will be adorned therein with bracelets of gold and pearl, and their garments therein will be silk.

22:24.transliteration: Wahudoo ila attayyibimina alqawli wahudoo ila sirati alhameed
22:24.translation: And they had been guided [in worldly life] to good speech, and they were guided to the path of the Praiseworthy.

22:25.transliteration: Inna allatheena kafaroo wayasuddoonaAAan sabeeli Allahi walmasjidi alharamiallathee jaAAalnahu linnasi sawaanalAAakifu feehi walbadi waman yurid feehibi-ilhadin bithulmin nuthiqhu min AAathabinaleem
22:25.translation: Indeed, those who have disbelieved and avert [people] from the way of Allāh and [from] al-Masjid al-Ḥarām, which We made for the people - equal are the resident therein and one from outside - and [also] whoever intends [a deed] therein of deviation [in religion] by wrongdoing - We will make him taste of a painful punishment.

22:26.transliteration: Wa-ith bawwa/na li-ibraheemamakana albayti an la tushrik bee shay-an watahhirbaytiya litta-ifeena walqa-imeenawarrukkaAAi assujood
22:26.translation: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when We designated for Abraham the site of the House, [saying], "Do not associate anything with Me and purify My House for those who perform ṭawāf and those who stand [in prayer] and those who bow and prostrate.

22:27.transliteration: Waaththin fee annasibilhajji ya/tooka rijalan waAAalakulli damirin ya/teena min kulli fajjin AAameeq
22:27.translation: And proclaim to the people the ḥajj [pilgrimage]; they will come to you on foot and on every lean camel; they will come from every distant pass -

22:28.transliteration: Liyashhadoo manafiAAa lahum wayathkurooisma Allahi fee ayyamin maAAloomatin AAalama razaqahum min baheemati al-anAAami fakuloo minhawaatAAimoo alba-isa alfaqeer
22:28.translation: That they may witness [i.e., attend] benefits for themselves and mention the name of Allāh on known [i.e., specific] days over what He has provided for them of [sacrificial] animals. So eat of them and feed the miserable and poor.

22:29.transliteration: Thumma lyaqdoo tafathahum walyoofoonuthoorahum walyattawwafoo bilbaytialAAateeq
22:29.translation: Then let them end their untidiness and fulfill their vows and perform ṭawāf around the ancient House."

22:30.transliteration: Thalika waman yuAAaththimhurumati Allahi fahuwa khayrun lahu AAindarabbihi waohillat lakumu al-anAAamu illa mayutla AAalaykum fajtaniboo arrijsa minaal-awthani wajtaniboo qawla azzoor
22:30.translation: That [has been commanded], and whoever honors the sacred ordinances of Allāh - it is best for him in the sight of his Lord. And permitted to you are the grazing livestock, except what is recited to you. So avoid the uncleanliness of idols and avoid false statement,

22:31.transliteration: Hunafaa lillahi ghayramushrikeena bihi waman yushrik billahi fakaannamakharra mina assama-i fatakhtafuhu attayruaw tahwee bihi arreehu fee makanin saheeq
22:31.translation: Inclining [only] to Allāh, not associating [anything] with Him. And he who associates with Allāh - it is as though he had fallen from the sky and was snatched by the birds or the wind carried him down into a remote place.

22:32.transliteration: Thalika waman yuAAaththimshaAAa-ira Allahi fa-innaha min taqwaalquloob
22:32.translation: That [is so]. And whoever honors the symbols [i.e., rites] of Allāh - indeed, it is from the piety of hearts.

22:33.transliteration: Lakum feeha manafiAAu ilaajalin musamman thumma mahilluha ila albaytialAAateeq
22:33.translation: For you therein [i.e., the animals marked for sacrifice] are benefits for a specified term; then their place of sacrifice is at the ancient House.

22:34.transliteration: Walikulli ommatin jaAAalna mansakanliyathkuroo isma Allahi AAala marazaqahum min baheemati al-anAAami fa-ilahukum ilahunwahidun falahu aslimoo wabashshiri almukhbiteen
22:34.translation: And for every [religious] community We have appointed a rite [of sacrifice] that they may mention the name of Allāh over what He has provided for them of [sacrificial] animals. For your god is one God, so to Him submit. And, [O Muḥammad], give good tidings to the humble [before their Lord]

22:35.transliteration: Allatheena itha thukiraAllahu wajilat quloobuhum wassabireenaAAala ma asabahum walmuqeemee assalatiwamimma razaqnahum yunfiqoon
22:35.translation: Who, when Allāh is mentioned, their hearts are fearful, and [to] the patient over what has afflicted them, and the establishers of prayer and those who spend from what We have provided them.

22:36.transliteration: Walbudna jaAAalnahalakum min shaAAa-iri Allahi lakum feehakhayrun fathkuroo isma Allahi AAalayhasawaffa fa-itha wajabat junoobuhafakuloo minha waatAAimoo alqaniAAa walmuAAtarrakathalika sakhkharnaha lakum laAAallakumtashkuroon
22:36.translation: And the camels and cattle We have appointed for you as among the symbols [i.e., rites] of Allāh; for you therein is good. So mention the name of Allāh upon them when lined up [for sacrifice]; and when they are [lifeless] on their sides, then eat from them and feed the needy [who does not seek aid] and the beggar. Thus have We subjected them to you that you may be grateful.

22:37.transliteration: Lan yanala Allaha luhoomuhawala dimaoha walakin yanaluhuattaqwa minkum kathalika sakhkharahalakum litukabbiroo Allaha AAala ma hadakumwabashshiri almuhsineen
22:37.translation: Their meat will not reach Allāh, nor will their blood, but what reaches Him is piety from you. Thus have We subjected them to you that you may glorify Allāh for that [to] which He has guided you; and give good tidings to the doers of good.

22:38.transliteration: Inna Allaha yudafiAAu AAaniallatheena amanoo inna Allaha la yuhibbukulla khawwanin kafoor
22:38.translation: Indeed, Allāh defends those who have believed. Indeed, Allāh does not like everyone treacherous and ungrateful.

22:39.transliteration: Othina lillatheena yuqataloonabi-annahum thulimoo wa-inna Allaha AAalanasrihim laqadeer
22:39.translation: Permission [to fight] has been given to those who are being fought, because they were wronged. And indeed, Allāh is competent to give them victory.

22:40.transliteration: Allatheena okhrijoo min diyarihimbighayri haqqin illa an yaqooloo rabbuna Allahuwalawla dafAAu Allahi annasa baAAdahumbibaAAdin lahuddimat sawamiAAu wabiyaAAun wasalawatunwamasajidu yuthkaru feeha ismu Allahikatheeran walayansuranna Allahu man yansuruhuinna Allaha laqawiyyun AAazeez
22:40.translation: [They are] those who have been evicted from their homes without right - only because they say, "Our Lord is Allāh." And were it not that Allāh checks the people, some by means of others, there would have been demolished monasteries, churches, synagogues, and mosques in which the name of Allāh is much mentioned [i.e., praised]. And Allāh will surely support those who support Him [i.e., His cause]. Indeed, Allāh is Powerful and Exalted in Might.

22:41.transliteration: Allatheena in makkannahum feeal-ardi aqamoo assalata waatawooazzakata waamaroo bilmaAAroofi wanahawAAani almunkari walillahi AAaqibatu al-omoor
22:41.translation: [And they are] those who, if We give them authority in the land, establish prayer and give zakāh and enjoin what is right and forbid what is wrong. And to Allāh belongs the outcome of [all] matters.

22:42.transliteration: Wa-in yukaththibooka faqad kaththabatqablahum qawmu noohin waAAadun wathamood
22:42.translation: And if they deny you, [O Muḥammad] - so, before them, did the people of Noah and ʿAad and Thamūd deny [their prophets],

22:43.translation: And the people of Abraham and the people of Lot.

22:44.transliteration: Waas-habu madyana wakuththibamoosa faamlaytu lilkafireena thumma akhathtuhumfakayfa kana nakeer
22:44.translation: And the inhabitants of Madyan. And Moses was denied, so I prolonged enjoyment for the disbelievers; then I seized them, and how [terrible] was My reproach.

22:45.transliteration: Fakaayyin min qaryatin ahlaknahawahiya thalimatun fahiya khawiyatunAAala AAurooshiha wabi/rin muAAattalatinwaqasrin masheed
22:45.translation: And how many a city did We destroy while it was committing wrong - so it is [now] fallen into ruin - and [how many] an abandoned well and [how many] a lofty palace.

22:46.transliteration: Afalam yaseeroo fee al-ardi fatakoonalahum quloobun yaAAqiloona biha aw athanunyasmaAAoona biha fa-innaha la taAAmaal-absaru walakin taAAma alquloobu allateefee assudoor
22:46.translation: So have they not traveled through the earth and have hearts by which to reason and ears by which to hear? For indeed, it is not eyes that are blinded, but blinded are the hearts which are within the breasts.

22:47.transliteration: WayastaAAjiloonaka bilAAathabiwalan yukhlifa Allahu waAAdahu wa-inna yawman AAindarabbika kaalfi sanatin mimma taAAuddoon
22:47.translation: And they urge you to hasten the punishment. But Allāh will never fail in His promise. And indeed, a day with your Lord is like a thousand years of those which you count.

22:48.transliteration: Wakaayyin min qaryatin amlaytu lahawahiya thalimatun thumma akhathtuhawa-ilayya almaseer
22:48.translation: And for how many a city did I prolong enjoyment while it was committing wrong. Then I seized it, and to Me is the [final] destination.

22:49.transliteration: Qul ya ayyuha annasuinnama ana lakum natheerun mubeen
22:49.translation: Say, "O people, I am only to you a clear warner."

22:50.transliteration: Fallatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati lahum maghfiratunwarizqun kareem
22:50.translation: And those who have believed and done righteous deeds - for them is forgiveness and noble provision.

22:51.transliteration: Wallatheena saAAaw fee ayatinamuAAajizeena ola-ika as-habu aljaheem
22:51.translation: But the ones who strove against Our verses, [seeking] to cause failure - those are the companions of Hellfire.

22:52.transliteration: Wama arsalna min qablika minrasoolin wala nabiyyin illa itha tamannaalqa ashshaytanu fee omniyyatihi fayansakhuAllahu ma yulqee ashshaytanu thummayuhkimu Allahu ayatihi wallahuAAaleemun hakeem
22:52.translation: And We did not send before you any messenger or prophet except that when he spoke [or recited], Satan threw into it [some misunderstanding]. But Allāh abolishes that which Satan throws in; then Allāh makes precise His verses. And Allāh is Knowing and Wise.

22:53.transliteration: LiyajAAala ma yulqee ashshaytanufitnatan lillatheena fee quloobihim maradun walqasiyatiquloobuhum wa-inna aththalimeenalafee shiqaqin baAAeed
22:53.translation: [That is] so He may make what Satan throws in [i.e., asserts] a trial for those within whose hearts is disease and those hard of heart. And indeed, the wrongdoers are in extreme dissension.

22:54.transliteration: WaliyaAAlama allatheena ootooalAAilma annahu alhaqqu min rabbika fayu/minoo bihifatukhbita lahu quloobuhum wa-inna Allaha lahadiallatheena amanoo ila siratinmustaqeem
22:54.translation: And so those who were given knowledge may know that it is the truth from your Lord and [therefore] believe in it, and their hearts humbly submit to it. And indeed is Allāh the Guide of those who have believed to a straight path.

22:55.transliteration: Wala yazalu allatheenakafaroo fee miryatin minhu hatta ta/tiyahumu assaAAatubaghtatan aw ya/tiyahum AAathabu yawmin AAaqeem
22:55.translation: But those who disbelieve will not cease to be in doubt of it until the Hour comes upon them unexpectedly or there comes to them the punishment of a barren Day.

22:56.transliteration: Almulku yawma-ithin lillahi yahkumubaynahum fallatheena amanoo waAAamiloo assalihatifee jannati annaAAeem
22:56.translation: [All] sovereignty that Day is for Allāh; He will judge between them. So they who believed and did righteous deeds will be in the Gardens of Pleasure.

22:57.transliteration: Wallatheena kafaroo wakaththaboobi-ayatina faola-ika lahum AAathabunmuheen
22:57.translation: And they who disbelieved and denied Our signs - for those there will be a humiliating punishment.

22:58.transliteration: Wallatheena hajaroofee sabeeli Allahi thumma qutiloo aw matoolayarzuqannahumu Allahu rizqan hasanan wa-inna Allahalahuwa khayru arraziqeen
22:58.translation: And those who emigrated for the cause of Allāh and then were killed or died - Allāh will surely provide for them a good provision. And indeed, it is Allāh who is the best of providers.

22:59.transliteration: Layudkhilannahum mudkhalan yardawnahuwa-inna Allaha laAAaleemun haleem
22:59.translation: He will surely cause them to enter an entrance with which they will be pleased, and indeed, Allāh is Knowing and Forbearing.

22:60.transliteration: Thalika waman AAaqaba bimithlima AAooqiba bihi thumma bughiya AAalayhi layansurannahuAllahu inna Allaha laAAafuwwun ghafoor
22:60.translation: That [is so]. And whoever responds [to injustice] with the equivalent of that with which he was harmed and then is tyrannized - Allāh will surely aid him. Indeed, Allāh is Pardoning and Forgiving.

22:61.transliteration: Thalika bi-anna Allaha yoolijuallayla fee annahari wayooliju annaharafee allayli waanna Allaha sameeAAun baseer
22:61.translation: That is because Allāh causes the night to enter the day and causes the day to enter the night and because Allāh is Hearing and Seeing.

22:62.transliteration: Thalika bi-anna Allaha huwa alhaqquwaanna ma yadAAoona min doonihi huwa albatiluwaanna Allaha huwa alAAaliyyu alkabeer
22:62.translation: That is because Allāh is the True Reality, and that which they call upon other than Him is falsehood, and because Allāh is the Most High, the Grand.

22:63.transliteration: Alam tara anna Allaha anzala mina assama-imaan fatusbihu al-ardu mukhdarrataninna Allaha lateefun khabeer
22:63.translation: Do you not see that Allāh has sent down rain from the sky and the earth becomes green? Indeed, Allāh is Subtle and Aware.

22:64.transliteration: Lahu ma fee assamawatiwama fee al-ardi wa-inna Allaha lahuwaalghaniyyu alhameed
22:64.translation: To Him belongs what is in the heavens and what is on the earth. And indeed, Allāh is the Free of need, the Praiseworthy.

22:65.transliteration: Alam tara anna Allaha sakhkhara lakumma fee al-ardi walfulka tajree fee albahribi-amrihi wayumsiku assamaa an taqaAAa AAalaal-ardi illa bi-ithnihi inna Allahabinnasi laraoofun raheem
22:65.translation: Do you not see that Allāh has subjected to you whatever is on the earth and the ships which run through the sea by His command? And He restrains the sky from falling upon the earth, unless by His permission. Indeed Allāh, to the people, is Kind and Merciful.

22:66.transliteration: Wahuwa allathee ahyakumthumma yumeetukum thumma yuhyeekum inna al-insanalakafoor
22:66.translation: And He is the one who gave you life; then He causes you to die and then will [again] give you life. Indeed, mankind is ungrateful.

22:67.transliteration: Likulli ommatin jaAAalna mansakan humnasikoohu fala yunaziAAunnaka fee al-amri wadAAuila rabbika innaka laAAala hudan mustaqeem
22:67.translation: For every [religious] community We have appointed rites which they perform. So, [O Muḥammad], let them [i.e., the disbelievers] not contend with you over the matter but invite [them] to your Lord. Indeed, you are upon straight guidance.

22:68.transliteration: Wa-in jadalooka faquli AllahuaAAlamu bima taAAmaloon
22:68.translation: And if they dispute with you, then say, "Allāh is most knowing of what you do.

22:69.transliteration: Allahu yahkumu baynakum yawmaalqiyamati feema kuntum feehi takhtalifoon
22:69.translation: Allāh will judge between you on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which you used to differ."

22:70.transliteration: Alam taAAlam anna Allaha yaAAlamu mafee assama-i wal-ardi inna thalikafee kitabin inna thalika AAala Allahiyaseer
22:70.translation: Do you not know that Allāh knows what is in the heaven and earth? Indeed, that is in a Record. Indeed that, for Allāh, is easy.

22:71.transliteration: WayaAAbudoona min dooni Allahi malam yunazzil bihi sultanan wama laysa lahum bihiAAilmun wama liththalimeenamin naseer
22:71.translation: And they worship besides Allāh that for which He has not sent down authority and that of which they have no knowledge. And there will not be for the wrongdoers any helper.

22:72.transliteration: Wa-itha tutla AAalayhim ayatunabayyinatin taAArifu fee wujoohi allatheena kafarooalmunkara yakadoona yastoona billatheenayatloona AAalayhim ayatina qulafaonabbi-okum bisharrin min thalikum annaruwaAAadaha Allahu allatheena kafaroo wabi/saalmaseer
22:72.translation: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, you recognize in the faces of those who disbelieve disapproval. They are almost on the verge of assaulting those who recite to them Our verses. Say, "Then shall I inform you of [what is] worse than that? [It is] the Fire which Allāh has promised those who disbelieve, and wretched is the destination."

22:73.transliteration: Ya ayyuha annasuduriba mathalun fastamiAAoo lahu inna allatheenatadAAoona min dooni Allahi lan yakhluqoo thubabanwalawi ijtamaAAoo lahu wa-in yaslubuhumu aththubabushay-an la yastanqithoohu minhu daAAufa attalibuwalmatloob
22:73.translation: O people, an example is presented, so listen to it. Indeed, those you invoke besides Allāh will never create [as much as] a fly, even if they gathered together for it [i.e., that purpose]. And if the fly should steal from them a [tiny] thing, they could not recover it from him. Weak are the pursuer and pursued.

22:74.transliteration: Ma qadaroo Allaha haqqaqadrihi inna Allaha laqawiyyun AAazeez
22:74.translation: They have not appraised Allāh with true appraisal. Indeed, Allāh is Powerful and Exalted in Might.

22:75.transliteration: Allahu yastafee mina almala-ikatirusulan wamina annasi inna Allaha sameeAAunbaseer
22:75.translation: Allāh chooses from the angels messengers and from the people. Indeed, Allāh is Hearing and Seeing.

22:76.transliteration: YaAAlamu ma bayna aydeehim wamakhalfahum wa-ila Allahi turjaAAu al-omoor
22:76.translation: He knows what is [presently] before them and what will be after them. And to Allāh will be returned [all] matters.

22:77.transliteration: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanooirkaAAoo wasjudoo waAAbudoo rabbakum wafAAalooalkhayra laAAallakum tuflihoon
22:77.translation: O you who have believed, bow and prostrate and worship your Lord and do good - that you may succeed.

22:78.transliteration: Wajahidoo fee Allahi haqqajihadihi huwa ijtabakum wama jaAAalaAAalaykum fee addeeni min harajin millata abeekumibraheema huwa sammakumu almuslimeena min qabluwafee hatha liyakoona arrasoolu shaheedanAAalaykum watakoonoo shuhadaa AAala annasifaaqeemoo assalata waatoo azzakatawaAAtasimoo billahi huwa mawlakumfaniAAma almawla waniAAma annaseer
22:78.translation: And strive for Allāh with the striving due to Him. He has chosen you and has not placed upon you in the religion any difficulty. [It is] the religion of your father, Abraham. He [i.e., Allāh] named you "Muslims" before [in former scriptures] and in this [revelation] that the Messenger may be a witness over you and you may be witnesses over the people. So establish prayer and give zakāh and hold fast to Allāh. He is your protector; and excellent is the protector, and excellent is the helper.

23:1.translation: Certainly will the believers have succeeded:

23:2.translation: They who are during their prayer humbly intent

23:3.translation: And they who turn away from ill speech

23:4.translation: And they who are observant of zakāh

23:5.translation: And they who guard their private parts

23:6.transliteration: Illa AAala azwajihim awma malakat aymanuhum fa-innahum ghayru maloomeen
23:6.translation: Except from their wives or those their right hands possess, for indeed, they will not be blamed -

23:7.transliteration: Famani ibtagha waraa thalikafaola-ika humu alAAadoon
23:7.translation: But whoever seeks beyond that, then those are the transgressors -

23:8.translation: And they who are to their trusts and their promises attentive

23:9.translation: And they who carefully maintain their prayers -

23:11.translation: Who will inherit al-Firdaus. They will abide therein eternally.

23:12.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna al-insana minsulalatin min teen
23:12.translation: And certainly did We create man from an extract of clay.

23:13.translation: Then We placed him as a sperm-drop in a firm lodging [i.e., the womb].

23:14.transliteration: Thumma khalaqna annutfataAAalaqatan fakhalaqna alAAalaqata mudghatanfakhalaqna almudghata AAithamanfakasawna alAAithama lahmanthumma ansha/nahu khalqan akhara fatabarakaAllahu ahsanu alkhaliqeen
23:14.translation: Then We made the sperm-drop into a clinging clot, and We made the clot into a lump [of flesh], and We made [from] the lump, bones, and We covered the bones with flesh; then We developed him into another creation. So blessed is Allāh, the best of creators.

23:15.translation: Then indeed, after that you are to die.

23:16.translation: Then indeed you, on the Day of Resurrection, will be resurrected.

23:17.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna fawqakum sabAAa tara-iqawama kunna AAani alkhalqi ghafileen
23:17.translation: And We have created above you seven layered heavens, and never have We been of [Our] creation unaware.

23:18.transliteration: Waanzalna mina assama-imaan biqadarin faaskannahu fee al-ardiwa-inna AAala thahabin bihi laqadiroon
23:18.translation: And We have sent down rain from the sky in a measured amount and settled it in the earth. And indeed, We are Able to take it away.

23:19.transliteration: Faansha/na lakum bihi jannatinmin nakheelin waaAAnabin lakum feeha fawakihukatheeratun waminha ta/kuloon
23:19.translation: And We brought forth for you thereby gardens of palm trees and grapevines in which for you are abundant fruits and from which you eat.

23:20.transliteration: Washajaratan takhruju min toori saynaatanbutu bidduhni wasibghin lilakileen
23:20.translation: And [We brought forth] a tree issuing from Mount Sinai which produces oil and food [i.e., olives] for those who eat.

23:21.transliteration: Wa-inna lakum fee al-anAAamilaAAibratan nusqeekum mimma fee butoonihawalakum feeha manafiAAu katheeratun waminhata/kuloon
23:21.translation: And indeed, for you in livestock is a lesson. We give you drink from that which is in their bellies, and for you in them are numerous benefits, and from them you eat.

23:22.translation: And upon them and on ships you are carried.

23:23.transliteration: Walaqad arsalna noohan ilaqawmihi faqala ya qawmi oAAbudoo Allaha malakum min ilahin ghayruhu afala tattaqoon
23:23.translation: And We had certainly sent Noah to his people, and he said, "O my people, worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him?"

23:24.transliteration: Faqala almalao allatheenakafaroo min qawmihi ma hatha illa basharunmithlukum yureedu an yatafaddala AAalaykum walaw shaaAllahu laanzala mala-ikatan ma samiAAnabihatha fee aba-ina al-awwaleen
23:24.translation: But the eminent among those who disbelieved from his people said, "This is not but a man like yourselves who wishes to take precedence over you; and if Allāh had willed [to send a messenger], He would have sent down angels. We have not heard of this among our forefathers.

23:25.transliteration: In huwa illa rajulun bihi jinnatunfatarabbasoo bihi hatta heen
23:25.translation: He is not but a man possessed with madness, so wait concerning him for a time."

23:26.translation: [Noah] said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."

23:27.transliteration: Faawhayna ilayhi ani isnaAAialfulka bi-aAAyunina wawahyina fa-ithajaa amruna wafara attannooru faslukfeeha min kullin zawjayni ithnayni waahlaka illaman sabaqa AAalayhi alqawlu minhum wala tukhatibneefee allatheena thalamoo innahum mughraqoon
23:27.translation: So We inspired to him, "Construct the ship under Our observation and Our inspiration, and when Our command comes and the oven overflows, put into it [i.e., the ship] from each [creature] two mates and your family, except him for whom the decree [of destruction] has proceeded. And do not address Me concerning those who have wronged; indeed, they are to be drowned.

23:28.transliteration: Fa-itha istawayta anta waman maAAakaAAala alfulki faquli alhamdu lillahi allatheenajjana mina alqawmi aththalimeen
23:28.translation: And when you have boarded the ship, you and those with you, then say, 'Praise to Allāh who has saved us from the wrongdoing people.'

23:29.transliteration: Waqul rabbi anzilnee munzalan mubarakanwaanta khayru almunzileen
23:29.translation: And say, 'My Lord, let me land at a blessed landing place, and You are the best to accommodate [us].'"

23:30.transliteration: Inna fee thalika laayatinwa-in kunna lamubtaleen
23:30.translation: Indeed in that are signs, and indeed, We are ever testing [Our servants].

23:31.transliteration: Thumma ansha/na min baAAdihim qarnan akhareen
23:31.translation: Then We produced after them a generation of others.

23:32.transliteration: Faarsalna feehim rasoolan minhum anioAAbudoo Allaha ma lakum min ilahin ghayruhuafala tattaqoon
23:32.translation: And We sent among them a messenger from themselves, [saying], "Worship Allāh; you have no deity other than Him; then will you not fear Him?"

23:33.transliteration: Waqala almalao min qawmihi allatheenakafaroo wakaththaboo biliqa-i al-akhiratiwaatrafnahum fee alhayati addunyama hatha illa basharun mithlukum ya/kulumimma ta/kuloona minhu wayashrabu mimma tashraboon
23:33.translation: And the eminent among his people who disbelieved and denied the meeting of the Hereafter while We had given them luxury in the worldly life said, "This is not but a man like yourselves. He eats of that from which you eat and drinks of what you drink.

23:34.transliteration: Wala-in ataAAtum basharan mithlakuminnakum ithan lakhasiroon
23:34.translation: And if you should obey a man like yourselves, indeed, you would then be losers.

23:35.transliteration: AyaAAidukum annakum itha mittumwakuntum turaban waAAithaman annakummukhrajoon
23:35.translation: Does he promise you that when you have died and become dust and bones that you will be brought forth [once more]?

23:36.translation: How far, how far, is that which you are promised.

23:37.transliteration: In hiya illa hayatunaaddunya namootu wanahya wamanahnu bimabAAootheen
23:37.translation: It [i.e., life] is not but our worldly life - we die and live, but we will not be resurrected.

23:38.transliteration: In huwa illa rajulun iftaraAAala Allahi kathiban wama nahnulahu bimu/mineen
23:38.translation: He is not but a man who has invented a lie about Allāh, and we will not believe him."

23:39.translation: He said, "My Lord, support me because they have denied me."

23:40.translation: [Allāh] said, "After a little, they will surely become regretful."

23:41.transliteration: Faakhathat-humu assayhatubilhaqqi fajaAAalnahum ghuthaanfabuAAdan lilqawmi aththalimeen
23:41.translation: So the shriek seized them in truth, and We made them as [plant] stubble. Then away with the wrongdoing people.

23:42.translation: Then We produced after them other generations.

23:43.transliteration: Ma tasbiqu min ommatin ajalahawama yasta/khiroon
23:43.translation: No nation will precede its time [of termination], nor will they remain [thereafter].

23:44.transliteration: Thumma arsalna rusulana tatrakulla ma jaa ommatan rasooluha kaththaboohufaatbaAAna baAAdahum baAAdan wajaAAalnahumahadeetha fabuAAdan liqawmin la yu/minoon
23:44.translation: Then We sent Our messengers in succession. Every time there came to a nation its messenger, they denied him, so We made them follow one another [to destruction], and We made them narrations. So away with a people who do not believe.

23:45.transliteration: Thumma arsalna moosa waakhahuharoona bi-ayatina wasultaninmubeen
23:45.translation: Then We sent Moses and his brother Aaron with Our signs and a clear authority

23:46.transliteration: Ila firAAawna wamala-ihi fastakbaroowakanoo qawman AAaleen
23:46.translation: To Pharaoh and his establishment, but they were arrogant and were a haughty people.

23:47.transliteration: Faqaloo anu/minu libasharayni mithlinawaqawmuhuma lana AAabidoon
23:47.translation: They said, "Should we believe two men like ourselves while their people are for us in servitude?"

23:48.translation: So they denied them and were of those destroyed.

23:49.translation: And We certainly gave Moses the Scripture that perhaps they would be guided.

23:50.transliteration: WajaAAalna ibna maryama waommahu ayatanwaawaynahuma ila rabwatin thatiqararin wamaAAeen
23:50.translation: And We made the son of Mary and his mother a sign and sheltered them within a high ground having level [areas] and flowing water.

23:51.transliteration: Ya ayyuha arrusulukuloo mina attayyibati waAAmaloo salihaninnee bima taAAmaloona AAaleem
23:51.translation: [Allāh said], "O messengers, eat from the good foods and work righteousness. Indeed I, of what you do, am Knowing.

23:52.transliteration: Wa-inna hathihi ommatukum ommatan wahidatanwaana rabbukum fattaqoon
23:52.translation: And indeed this, your religion, is one religion, and I am your Lord, so fear Me."

23:53.transliteration: FataqattaAAoo amrahum baynahumzuburan kullu hizbin bima ladayhim farihoon
23:53.translation: But they [i.e., the people] divided their religion among them into portions [i.e., sects] - each faction, in what it has, rejoicing.

23:54.translation: So leave them in their confusion for a time.

23:55.transliteration: Ayahsaboona annama numidduhumbihi min malin wabaneen
23:55.translation: Do they think that what We extend to them of wealth and children

23:56.transliteration: NusariAAu lahum fee alkhayratibal la yashAAuroon
23:56.translation: Is [because] We hasten for them good things? Rather, they do not perceive.

23:57.transliteration: Inna allatheena hum min khashyatirabbihim mushfiqoon
23:57.translation: Indeed, they who are apprehensive from fear of their Lord

23:58.translation: And they who believe in the signs of their Lord

23:59.translation: And they who do not associate anything with their Lord

23:60.transliteration: Wallatheena yu/toona maataw waquloobuhum wajilatun annahum ila rabbihim rajiAAoon
23:60.translation: And they who give what they give while their hearts are fearful because they will be returning to their Lord -

23:61.transliteration: Ola-ika yusariAAoona feealkhayrati wahum laha sabiqoon
23:61.translation: It is those who hasten to good deeds, and they outstrip [others] therein.

23:62.transliteration: Wala nukallifu nafsan illawusAAaha waladayna kitabun yantiqu bilhaqqiwahum la yuthlamoon
23:62.translation: And We charge no soul except [with that within] its capacity, and with Us is a record which speaks with truth; and they will not be wronged.

23:63.transliteration: Bal quloobuhum fee ghamratin min hathawalahum aAAmalun min dooni thalika hum lahaAAamiloon
23:63.translation: But their hearts are covered with confusion over this, and they have [evil] deeds besides that [i.e., disbelief] which they are doing,

23:64.transliteration: Hatta itha akhathnamutrafeehim bilAAathabi itha hum yaj-aroon
23:64.translation: Until when We seize their affluent ones with punishment, at once they are crying [to Allāh] for help.

23:65.transliteration: La taj-aroo alyawma innakum minnala tunsaroon
23:65.translation: Do not cry out today. Indeed, by Us you will not be helped.

23:66.transliteration: Qad kanat ayatee tutlaAAalaykum fakuntum AAala aAAqabikum tankisoon
23:66.translation: My verses had already been recited to you, but you were turning back on your heels.

23:67.translation: In arrogance regarding it, conversing by night, speaking evil.

23:68.transliteration: Afalam yaddabbaroo alqawla am jaahumma lam ya/ti abaahumu al-awwaleen
23:68.translation: Then have they not reflected over the word [i.e., the Qur’ān], or has there come to them that which had not come to their forefathers?

23:69.transliteration: Am lam yaAArifoo rasoolahum fahum lahumunkiroon
23:69.translation: Or did they not know their Messenger, so they are toward him disacknowledging?

23:70.transliteration: Am yaqooloona bihi jinnatun bal jaahumbilhaqqi waaktharuhum lilhaqqi karihoon
23:70.translation: Or do they say, "In him is madness"? Rather, he brought them the truth, but most of them, to the truth, are averse.

23:71.transliteration: Walawi ittabaAAa alhaqqu ahwaahumlafasadati assamawatu wal-arduwaman feehinna bal ataynahum bithikrihim fahum AAanthikrihim muAAridoon
23:71.translation: But if the Truth [i.e., Allāh] had followed their inclinations, the heavens and the earth and whoever is in them would have been ruined. Rather, We have brought them their message, but they, from their message, are turning away.

23:72.transliteration: Am tas-aluhum kharjan fakharajurabbika khayrun wahuwa khayru arraziqeen
23:72.translation: Or do you, [O Muḥammad], ask them for payment? But the reward of your Lord is best, and He is the best of providers.

23:73.translation: And indeed, you invite them to a straight path.

23:74.transliteration: Wa-inna allatheena layu/minoona bil-akhirati AAani assiratilanakiboon
23:74.translation: But indeed, those who do not believe in the Hereafter are deviating from the path.

23:75.transliteration: Walaw rahimnahum wakashafnama bihim min durrin lalajjoo fee tughyanihimyaAAmahoon
23:75.translation: And even if We gave them mercy and removed what was upon them of affliction, they would persist in their transgression, wandering blindly.

23:76.transliteration: Walaqad akhathnahum bilAAathabifama istakanoo lirabbihim wama yatadarraAAoon
23:76.translation: And We had gripped them with suffering [as a warning], but they did not yield to their Lord, nor did they humbly supplicate, [and will continue thus]

23:77.transliteration: Hatta itha fatahnaAAalayhim baban tha AAathabin shadeedin ithahum feehi mublisoon
23:77.translation: Until when We have opened before them a door of severe punishment, immediately they will be therein in despair.

23:78.transliteration: Wahuwa allathee anshaa lakumu assamAAawal-absara wal-af-idata qaleelan matashkuroon
23:78.translation: And it is He who produced for you hearing and vision and hearts [i.e., intellect]; little are you grateful.

23:79.transliteration: Wahuwa allathee tharaakum feeal-ardi wa-ilayhi tuhsharoon
23:79.translation: And it is He who has multiplied you throughout the earth, and to Him you will be gathered.

23:80.transliteration: Wahuwa allathee yuhyeewayumeetu walahu ikhtilafu allayli wannahariafala taAAqiloon
23:80.translation: And it is He who gives life and causes death, and His is the alternation of the night and the day. Then will you not reason?

23:81.translation: Rather, they say like what the former peoples said.

23:82.transliteration: Qaloo a-itha mitnawakunna turaban waAAithamana-inna lamabAAoothoon
23:82.translation: They said, "When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?

23:83.transliteration: Laqad wuAAidna nahnu waabaonahatha min qablu in hatha illa asateerual-awwaleen
23:83.translation: We have been promised this, we and our forefathers, before; this is not but legends of the former peoples."

23:84.transliteration: Qul limani al-ardu waman feehain kuntum taAAlamoon
23:84.translation: Say, [O Muḥammad], "To whom belongs the earth and whoever is in it, if you should know?"

23:85.translation: They will say, "To Allāh." Say, "Then will you not remember?"

23:86.transliteration: Qul man rabbu assamawatiassabAAi warabbu alAAarshi alAAatheem
23:86.translation: Say, "Who is Lord of the seven heavens and Lord of the Great Throne?"

23:87.translation: They will say, "[They belong] to Allāh." Say, "Then will you not fear Him?"

23:88.transliteration: Qul man biyadihi malakootu kulli shay-inwahuwa yujeeru wala yujaru AAalayhi in kuntumtaAAlamoon
23:88.translation: Say, "In whose hand is the realm of all things - and He protects while none can protect against Him - if you should know?"

23:89.translation: They will say, "[All belongs] to Allāh." Say, "Then how are you deluded?"

23:90.translation: Rather, We have brought them the truth, and indeed they are liars.

23:91.transliteration: Ma ittakhatha Allahumin waladin wama kana maAAahu min ilahin ithanlathahaba kullu ilahin bima khalaqa walaAAalabaAAduhum AAala baAAdin subhana AllahiAAamma yasifoon
23:91.translation: Allāh has not taken any son, nor has there ever been with Him any deity. [If there had been], then each deity would have taken what it created, and some of them would have [sought to] overcome others. Exalted is Allāh above what they describe [concerning Him].

23:92.translation: [He is] Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, so high is He above what they associate [with Him].

23:93.translation: Say, [O Muḥammad], "My Lord, if You should show me that which they are promised,

23:94.transliteration: Rabbi fala tajAAalnee fee alqawmi aththalimeen
23:94.translation: My Lord, then do not place me among the wrongdoing people."

23:95.transliteration: Wa-inna AAala an nuriyaka manaAAiduhum laqadiroon
23:95.translation: And indeed, We are Able to show you what We have promised them.

23:96.transliteration: IdfaAA billatee hiya ahsanu assayyi-atanahnu aAAlamu bima yasifoon
23:96.translation: Repel, by [means of] what is best, [their] evil. We are most knowing of what they describe.

23:97.transliteration: Waqul rabbi aAAoothu bika min hamazatiashshayateen
23:97.translation: And say, "My Lord, I seek refuge in You from the incitements of the devils,

23:98.translation: And I seek refuge in You, my Lord, lest they be present with me."

23:99.transliteration: Hatta itha jaa ahadahumualmawtu qala rabbi irjiAAoon
23:99.translation: [For such is the state of the disbelievers] until, when death comes to one of them, he says, "My Lord, send me back

23:100.transliteration: LaAAallee aAAmalu salihanfeema taraktu kalla innaha kalimatun huwa qa-iluhawamin wara-ihim barzakhun ila yawmi yubAAathoon
23:100.translation: That I might do righteousness in that which I left behind." No! It is only a word he is saying; and behind them is a barrier until the Day they are resurrected.

23:101.transliteration: Fa-itha nufikha fee assoorifala ansaba baynahum yawma-ithin walayatasaaloon
23:101.translation: So when the Horn is blown, no relationship will there be among them that Day, nor will they ask about one another.

23:102.translation: And those whose scales are heavy [with good deeds] - it is they who are the successful.

23:103.transliteration: Waman khaffat mawazeenuhu faola-ikaallatheena khasiroo anfusahum fee jahannama khalidoon
23:103.translation: But those whose scales are light - those are the ones who have lost their souls, [being] in Hell, abiding eternally.

23:104.translation: The Fire will sear their faces, and they therein will have taut smiles.

23:105.transliteration: Alam takun ayatee tutlaAAalaykum fakuntum biha tukaththiboon
23:105.translation: [It will be said], "Were not My verses recited to you and you used to deny them?"

23:106.transliteration: Qaloo rabbana ghalabatAAalayna shiqwatuna wakunna qawman dalleen
23:106.translation: They will say, "Our Lord, our wretchedness overcame us, and we were a people astray.

23:107.transliteration: Rabbana akhrijna minhafa-in AAudna fa-inna thalimoon
23:107.translation: Our Lord, remove us from it, and if we were to return [to evil], we would indeed be wrongdoers."

23:108.translation: He will say, "Remain despised therein and do not speak to Me.

23:109.transliteration: Innahu kana fareequn min AAibadeeyaqooloona rabbana amanna faghfirlana warhamna waanta khayru arrahimeen
23:109.translation: Indeed, there was a party of My servants who said, 'Our Lord, we have believed, so forgive us and have mercy upon us, and You are the best of the merciful.'

23:110.transliteration: Fattakhathtumoohumsikhriyyan hatta ansawkum thikree wakuntumminhum tadhakoon
23:110.translation: But you took them in mockery to the point that they made you forget My remembrance, and you used to laugh at them.

23:111.transliteration: Innee jazaytuhumu alyawma bima sabarooannahum humu alfa-izoon
23:111.translation: Indeed, I have rewarded them this Day for their patient endurance - that they are the attainers [of success]."

23:112.transliteration: Qala kam labithtum fee al-ardiAAadada sineen
23:112.translation: [Allāh] will say, "How long did you remain on earth in number of years?"

23:113.transliteration: Qaloo labithna yawman aw baAAdayawmin fas-ali alAAaddeen
23:113.translation: They will say, "We remained a day or part of a day; ask those who enumerate."

23:114.transliteration: Qala in labithtum illaqaleelan law annakum kuntum taAAlamoon
23:114.translation: He will say, "You stayed not but a little - if only you had known.

23:115.transliteration: Afahasibtum annama khalaqnakumAAabathan waannakum ilayna la turjaAAoon
23:115.translation: Then did you think that We created you uselessly and that to Us you would not be returned?"

23:116.transliteration: FataAAala Allahualmaliku alhaqqu la ilaha illa huwarabbu alAAarshi alkareem
23:116.translation: So exalted is Allāh, the Sovereign, the Truth; there is no deity except Him, Lord of the Noble Throne.

23:117.transliteration: Waman yadAAu maAAa Allahi ilahanakhara la burhana lahu bihi fa-innamahisabuhu AAinda rabbihi innahu la yuflihualkafiroon
23:117.translation: And whoever invokes besides Allāh another deity for which he has no proof - then his account is only with his Lord. Indeed, the disbelievers will not succeed.

23:118.transliteration: Waqul rabbi ighfir warhamwaanta khayru arrahimeen
23:118.translation: And, [O Muḥammad], say, "My Lord, forgive and have mercy, and You are the best of the merciful."

24:1.transliteration: Sooratun anzalnaha wafaradnahawaanzalna feeha ayatin bayyinatinlaAAallakum tathakkaroon
24:1.translation: [This is] a sūrah which We have sent down and made [that within it] obligatory and revealed therein verses of clear evidence that you might remember.

24:2.transliteration: Azzaniyatu wazzaneefajlidoo kulla wahidin minhuma mi-atajaldatin wala ta/khuthkum bihima ra/fatunfee deeni Allahi in kuntum tu/minoona billahiwalyawmi al-akhiri walyashhad AAathabahumata-ifatun mina almu/mineen
24:2.translation: The [unmarried] woman or [unmarried] man found guilty of sexual intercourse - lash each one of them with a hundred lashes, and do not be taken by pity for them in the religion [i.e., law] of Allāh, if you should believe in Allāh and the Last Day. And let a group of the believers witness their punishment.

24:3.transliteration: Azzanee la yankihuilla zaniyatan aw mushrikatan wazzaniyatula yankihuha illa zanin awmushrikun wahurrima thalika AAalaalmu/mineen
24:3.translation: The fornicator does not marry except a [female] fornicator or polytheist, and none marries her except a fornicator or a polytheist, and that [i.e., marriage to such persons] has been made unlawful to the believers.

24:4.transliteration: Wallatheena yarmoona almuhsanatithumma lam ya/too bi-arbaAAati shuhadaa fajlidoohumthamaneena jaldatan wala taqbaloo lahum shahadatanabadan waola-ika humu alfasiqoon
24:4.translation: And those who accuse chaste women and then do not produce four witnesses - lash them with eighty lashes and do not accept from them testimony ever after. And those are the defiantly disobedient,

24:5.transliteration: Illa allatheena taboomin baAAdi thalika waaslahoo fa-inna Allahaghafoorun raheem
24:5.translation: Except for those who repent thereafter and reform, for indeed, Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.
