35:30.transliteration: Liyuwaffiyahum ojoorahum wayazeedahum min fadlihiinnahu ghafoorun shakoor
35:30.translation: That He may give them in full their rewards and increase for them of His bounty. Indeed, He is Forgiving and Appreciative.

35:31.transliteration: Wallathee awhaynailayka mina alkitabi huwa alhaqqu musaddiqanlima bayna yadayhi inna Allaha biAAibadihilakhabeerun baseer
35:31.translation: And that which We have revealed to you, [O Muḥammad], of the Book is the truth, confirming what was before it. Indeed Allāh, of His servants, is Aware and Seeing.

35:32.transliteration: Thumma awrathna alkitaba allatheenaistafayna min AAibadina faminhum thalimunlinafsihi waminhum muqtasidun waminhum sabiqun bilkhayratibi-ithni Allahi thalika huwa alfadlualkabeer
35:32.translation: Then We caused to inherit the Book those We have chosen of Our servants; and among them is he who wrongs himself [i.e., sins], and among them is he who is moderate, and among them is he who is foremost in good deeds by permission of Allāh. That [inheritance] is what is the great bounty.

35:33.transliteration: Jannatu AAadnin yadkhuloonahayuhallawna feeha min asawira min thahabinwalu/lu-an walibasuhum feeha hareer
35:33.translation: [For them are] gardens of perpetual residence which they will enter. They will be adorned therein with bracelets of gold and pearls, and their garments therein will be silk.

35:34.transliteration: Waqaloo alhamdu lillahiallathee athhaba AAanna alhazana innarabbana laghafoorun shakoor
35:34.translation: And they will say, "Praise to Allāh, who has removed from us [all] sorrow. Indeed, our Lord is Forgiving and Appreciative -

35:35.transliteration: Allathee ahallana daraalmuqamati min fadlihi la yamassunafeeha nasabun wala yamassuna feehalughoob
35:35.translation: He who has settled us in the home of duration [i.e., Paradise] out of His bounty. There touches us not in it any fatigue, and there touches us not in it weariness [of mind]."

35:36.transliteration: Wallatheena kafaroo lahum narujahannama la yuqda AAalayhim fayamootoo walayukhaffafu AAanhum min AAathabiha kathalikanajzee kulla kafoor
35:36.translation: And for those who disbelieve will be the fire of Hell. [Death] is not decreed for them so they may die, nor will its torment be lightened for them. Thus do We recompense every ungrateful one.

35:37.transliteration: Wahum yastarikhoona feeharabbana akhrijna naAAmal salihanghayra allathee kunna naAAmalu awa lam nuAAammirkumma yatathakkaru feehi man tathakkara wajaakumuannatheeru fathooqoo fama liththalimeenamin naseer
35:37.translation: And they will cry out therein, "Our Lord, remove us; we will do righteousness - other than what we were doing!" But did We not grant you life enough for whoever would remember therein to remember, and the warner had come to you? So taste [the punishment], for there is not for the wrongdoers any helper.

35:38.transliteration: Inna Allaha AAalimu ghaybi assamawatiwal-ardi innahu AAaleemun bithati assudoor
35:38.translation: Indeed, Allāh is Knower of the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and earth. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.

35:39.transliteration: Huwa allathee jaAAalakum khala-ifafee al-ardi faman kafara faAAalayhi kufruhu walayazeedu alkafireena kufruhum AAinda rabbihim illamaqtan wala yazeedu alkafireena kufruhum illakhasara
35:39.translation: It is He who has made you successors upon the earth. And whoever disbelieves - upon him will be [the consequence of] his disbelief. And the disbelief of the disbelievers does not increase them in the sight of their Lord except in hatred; and the disbelief of the disbelievers does not increase them except in loss.

35:40.transliteration: Qul araaytum shurakaakumu allatheenatadAAoona min dooni Allahi aroonee matha khalaqoomina al-ardi am lahum shirkun fee assamawatiam ataynahum kitaban fahum AAalabayyinatin minhu bal in yaAAidu aththalimoonabaAAduhum baAAdan illa ghuroora
35:40.translation: Say, "Have you considered your 'partners' whom you invoke besides Allāh? Show me what they have created from the earth, or have they partnership [with Him] in the heavens? Or have We given them a book so they are [standing] on evidence therefrom? [No], rather, the wrongdoers do not promise each other except delusion."

35:41.transliteration: Inna Allaha yumsiku assamawatiwal-arda an tazoola wala-in zalatain amsakahuma min ahadin min baAAdihi innahu kanahaleeman ghafoora
35:41.translation: Indeed, Allāh holds the heavens and the earth, lest they cease. And if they should cease, no one could hold them [in place] after Him. Indeed, He is Forbearing and Forgiving.

35:42.transliteration: Waaqsamoo billahi jahda aymanihimla-in jaahum natheerun layakoonunna ahda minihda al-omami falamma jaahum natheerunma zadahum illa nufoora
35:42.translation: And they swore by Allāh their strongest oaths that if a warner came to them, they would be more guided than [any] one of the [previous] nations. But when a warner came to them, it did not increase them except in aversion

35:43.transliteration: Istikbaran fee al-ardi wamakraassayyi-i wala yaheequ almakru assayyi-oilla bi-ahlihi fahal yanthuroona illasunnata al-awwaleena falan tajida lisunnati Allahitabdeelan walan tajida lisunnati Allahi tahweela
35:43.translation: [Due to] arrogance in the land and plotting of evil; but the evil plot does not encompass except its own people. Then do they await except the way [i.e., fate] of the former peoples? But you will never find in the way [i.e., established method] of Allāh any change, and you will never find in the way of Allāh any alteration.

35:44.transliteration: Awa lam yaseeroo fee al-ardi fayanthurookayfa kana AAaqibatu allatheena min qablihimwakanoo ashadda minhum quwwatan wama kanaAllahu liyuAAjizahu min shay-in fee assamawatiwala fee al-ardi innahu kana AAaleemanqadeera
35:44.translation: Have they not traveled through the land and observed how was the end of those before them? And they were greater than them in power. But Allāh is not to be caused failure [i.e., prevented] by anything in the heavens or on the earth. Indeed, He is ever Knowing and Competent.

35:45.transliteration: Walaw yu-akhithu Allahuannasa bima kasaboo ma taraka AAalathahriha min dabbatin walakinyu-akhkhiruhum ila ajalin musamman fa-itha jaaajaluhum fa-inna Allaha kana biAAibadihi baseera
35:45.translation: And if Allāh were to impose blame on the people for what they have earned, He would not leave upon it [i.e., the earth] any creature. But He defers them for a specified term. And when their time comes, then indeed Allāh has ever been, of His servants, Seeing.

36:3.translation: Indeed you, [O Muḥammad], are from among the messengers,

36:5.translation: [This is] a revelation of the Exalted in Might, the Merciful,

36:6.transliteration: Litunthira qawman ma onthiraabaohum fahum ghafiloon
36:6.translation: That you may warn a people whose forefathers were not warned, so they are unaware.

36:7.transliteration: Laqad haqqa alqawlu AAalaaktharihim fahum la yu/minoon
36:7.translation: Already the word [i.e., decree] has come into effect upon most of them, so they do not believe.

36:8.transliteration: Inna jaAAalna fee aAAnaqihimaghlalan fahiya ila al-athqani fahummuqmahoon
36:8.translation: Indeed, We have put shackles on their necks, and they are to their chins, so they are with heads [kept] aloft.

36:9.transliteration: WajaAAalna min bayni aydeehim saddanwamin khalfihim saddan faaghshaynahum fahum la yubsiroon
36:9.translation: And We have put before them a barrier and behind them a barrier and covered them, so they do not see.

36:10.transliteration: Wasawaon AAalayhim aanthartahumam lam tunthirhum la yu/minoon
36:10.translation: And it is all the same for them whether you warn them or do not warn them - they will not believe.

36:11.transliteration: Innama tunthiru mani ittabaAAaaththikra wakhashiya arrahmanabilghaybi fabashshirhu bimaghfiratin waajrin kareem
36:11.translation: You can only warn one who follows the message and fears the Most Merciful unseen. So give him good tidings of forgiveness and noble reward.

36:12.transliteration: Inna nahnu nuhyeealmawta wanaktubu ma qaddamoo waatharahumwakulla shay-in ahsaynahu fee imamin mubeen
36:12.translation: Indeed, it is We who bring the dead to life and record what they have put forth and what they left behind, and all things We have enumerated in a clear register.

36:13.transliteration: Wadrib lahum mathalan as-habaalqaryati ith jaaha almursaloon
36:13.translation: And present to them an example: the people of the city, when the messengers came to it -

36:14.transliteration: Ith arsalna ilayhimu ithnaynifakaththaboohuma faAAazzazna bithalithinfaqaloo inna ilaykum mursaloon
36:14.translation: When We sent to them two but they denied them, so We strengthened [them] with a third, and they said, "Indeed, we are messengers to you."

36:15.transliteration: Qaloo ma antum illabasharun mithluna wama anzala arrahmanumin shay-in in antum illa takthiboon
36:15.translation: They said, "You are not but human beings like us, and the Most Merciful has not revealed a thing. You are only telling lies."

36:16.translation: They said, "Our Lord knows that we are messengers to you,

36:17.translation: And we are not responsible except for clear notification."

36:18.transliteration: Qaloo inna tatayyarnabikum la-in lam tantahoo lanarjumannakum walayamassannakum minnaAAathabun aleem
36:18.translation: They said, "Indeed, we consider you a bad omen. If you do not desist, we will surely stone you, and there will surely touch you, from us, a painful punishment."

36:19.transliteration: Qaloo ta-irukum maAAakum a-in thukkirtumbal antum qawmun musrifoon
36:19.translation: They said, "Your omen [i.e., fate] is with yourselves. Is it because you were reminded? Rather, you are a transgressing people."

36:20.transliteration: Wajaa min aqsa almadeenatirajulun yasAAa qala ya qawmi ittabiAAooalmursaleen
36:20.translation: And there came from the farthest end of the city a man, running. He said, "O my people, follow the messengers.

36:21.transliteration: IttabiAAoo man la yas-alukum ajranwahum muhtadoon
36:21.translation: Follow those who do not ask of you [any] payment, and they are [rightly] guided.

36:22.transliteration: Wama liya la aAAbudu allatheefataranee wa-ilayhi turjaAAoon
36:22.translation: And why should I not worship He who created me and to whom you will be returned?

36:23.transliteration: Aattakhithu min doonihi alihatanin yuridni arrahmanu bidurrin la tughniAAannee shafaAAatuhum shay-an wala yunqithoon
36:23.translation: Should I take other than Him [false] deities [while], if the Most Merciful intends for me some adversity, their intercession will not avail me at all, nor can they save me?

36:24.translation: Indeed, I would then be in manifest error.

36:25.translation: Indeed, I have believed in your Lord, so listen to me."

36:26.transliteration: Qeela odkhuli aljannata qala yalayta qawmee yaAAlamoon
36:26.translation: It was said, "Enter Paradise." He said, "I wish my people could know

36:27.transliteration: Bima ghafara lee rabbee wajaAAalaneemina almukrameen
36:27.translation: Of how my Lord has forgiven me and placed me among the honored."

36:28.transliteration: Wama anzalna AAalaqawmihi min baAAdihi min jundin mina assama-i wamakunna munzileen
36:28.translation: And We did not send down upon his people after him any soldiers from the heaven, nor would We have done so.

36:29.transliteration: In kanat illa sayhatanwahidatan fa-itha hum khamidoon
36:29.translation: It was not but one shout, and immediately they were extinguished.

36:30.transliteration: Ya hasratan AAalaalAAibadi ma ya/teehim min rasoolin illa kanoobihi yastahzi-oon
36:30.translation: How regretful for the servants. There did not come to them any messenger except that they used to ridicule him.

36:31.transliteration: Alam yaraw kam ahlakna qablahum minaalqurooni annahum ilayhim la yarjiAAoon
36:31.translation: Have they not considered how many generations We destroyed before them - that they to them will not return?

36:32.translation: And indeed, all of them will yet be brought present before Us.

36:33.transliteration: Waayatun lahumu al-ardualmaytatu ahyaynaha waakhrajna minhahabban faminhu ya/kuloon
36:33.translation: And a sign for them is the dead earth. We have brought it to life and brought forth from it grain, and from it they eat.

36:34.transliteration: WajaAAalna feeha jannatinmin nakheelin waaAAnabin wafajjarna feehamina alAAuyoon
36:34.translation: And We placed therein gardens of palm trees and grapevines and caused to burst forth therefrom some springs -

36:35.transliteration: Liya/kuloo min thamarihi wamaAAamilat-hu aydeehim afala yashkuroon
36:35.translation: That they may eat of His fruit. And their hands have not produced it, so will they not be grateful?

36:36.transliteration: Subhana allathee khalaqaal-azwaja kullaha mimma tunbitu al-arduwamin anfusihim wamimma la yaAAlamoon
36:36.translation: Exalted is He who created all pairs - from what the earth grows and from themselves and from that which they do not know.

36:37.transliteration: Waayatun lahumu allaylu naslakhuminhu annahara fa-itha hum muthlimoon
36:37.translation: And a sign for them is the night. We remove from it the [light of] day, so they are [left] in darkness.

36:38.transliteration: Washshamsu tajree limustaqarrin lahathalika taqdeeru alAAazeezi alAAaleem
36:38.translation: And the sun runs [on course] toward its stopping point. That is the determination of the Exalted in Might, the Knowing.

36:39.transliteration: Walqamara qaddarnahu manazilahatta AAada kalAAurjooni alqadeem
36:39.translation: And the moon - We have determined for it phases, until it returns [appearing] like the old date stalk.

36:40.transliteration: La ashshamsu yanbaghee lahaan tudrika alqamara wala allaylu sabiqu annahariwakullun fee falakin yasbahoon
36:40.translation: It is not allowable [i.e., possible] for the sun to reach the moon, nor does the night overtake the day, but each, in an orbit, is swimming.

36:41.transliteration: Waayatun lahum anna hamalnathurriyyatahum fee alfulki almashhoon
36:41.translation: And a sign for them is that We carried their forefathers in a laden ship.

36:42.translation: And We created for them from the likes of it that which they ride.

36:43.transliteration: Wa-in nasha/ nughriqhum fala sareekhalahum wala hum yunqathoon
36:43.translation: And if We should will, We could drown them; then no one responding to a cry would there be for them, nor would they be saved

36:44.translation: Except as a mercy from Us and provision for a time.

36:45.transliteration: Wa-itha qeela lahumu ittaqoo mabayna aydeekum wama khalfakum laAAallakum turhamoon
36:45.translation: But when it is said to them, "Beware of what is before you and what is behind you; perhaps you will receive mercy..."

36:46.transliteration: Wama ta/teehim min ayatin min ayatirabbihim illa kanoo AAanha muAArideen
36:46.translation: And no sign comes to them from the signs of their Lord except that they are from it turning away.

36:47.transliteration: Wa-itha qeela lahum anfiqoo mimmarazaqakumu Allahu qala allatheena kafaroolillatheena amanoo anutAAimu man law yashaoAllahu atAAamahu in antum illa fee dalalinmubeen
36:47.translation: And when it is said to them, "Spend from that which Allāh has provided for you," those who disbelieve say to those who believe, "Should we feed one whom, if Allāh had willed, He would have fed? You are not but in clear error."

36:48.transliteration: Wayaqooloona mata hathaalwaAAdu in kuntum sadiqeen
36:48.translation: And they say, "When is this promise, if you should be truthful?"

36:49.transliteration: Ma yanthuroona illasayhatan wahidatan ta/khuthuhum wahumyakhissimoon
36:49.translation: They do not await except one blast which will seize them while they are disputing.

36:50.transliteration: Fala yastateeAAoona tawsiyatanwala ila ahlihim yarjiAAoon
36:50.translation: And they will not be able [to give] any instruction, nor to their people can they return.

36:51.transliteration: Wanufikha fee assoori fa-ithahum mina al-ajdathi ila rabbihim yansiloon
36:51.translation: And the Horn will be blown; and at once from the graves to their Lord they will hasten.

36:52.transliteration: Qaloo ya waylana manbaAAathana min marqadina hatha mawaAAada arrahmanu wasadaqaalmursaloon
36:52.translation: They will say, "O woe to us! Who has raised us up from our sleeping place?" [The reply will be], "This is what the Most Merciful had promised, and the messengers told the truth."

36:53.transliteration: In kanat illa sayhatanwahidatan fa-itha hum jameeAAun ladayna muhdaroon
36:53.translation: It will not be but one blast, and at once they are all brought present before Us.

36:54.transliteration: Falyawma la tuthlamunafsun shay-an wala tujzawna illa ma kuntumtaAAmaloon
36:54.translation: So today [i.e., the Day of Judgement] no soul will be wronged at all, and you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do.

36:55.transliteration: Inna as-haba aljannati alyawmafee shughulin fakihoon
36:55.translation: Indeed the companions of Paradise, that Day, will be amused in [joyful] occupation -

36:56.transliteration: Hum waazwajuhum fee thilalinAAala al-ara-iki muttaki-oon
36:56.translation: They and their spouses - in shade, reclining on adorned couches.

36:57.translation: For them therein is fruit, and for them is whatever they request [or wish]

36:58.translation: [And] "Peace," a word from a Merciful Lord.

36:59.translation: [Then He will say], "But stand apart today, you criminals.

36:60.transliteration: Alam aAAhad ilaykum ya banee adamaan la taAAbudoo ashshaytana innahu lakumAAaduwwun mubeen
36:60.translation: Did I not enjoin upon you, O children of Adam, that you not worship Satan - [for] indeed, he is to you a clear enemy -

36:61.translation: And that you worship [only] Me? This is a straight path.

36:62.transliteration: Walaqad adalla minkum jibillankatheeran afalam takoonoo taAAqiloon
36:62.translation: And he had already led astray from among you much of creation, so did you not use reason?

36:63.translation: This is the Hellfire which you were promised.

36:64.translation: [Enter to] burn therein today for what you used to deny."

36:65.transliteration: Alyawma nakhtimu AAala afwahihimwatukallimuna aydeehim watashhadu arjuluhum bima kanooyaksiboon
36:65.translation: That Day, We will seal over their mouths, and their hands will speak to Us, and their feet will testify about what they used to earn.

36:66.transliteration: Walaw nashao latamasnaAAala aAAyunihim fastabaqoo assiratafaanna yubsiroon
36:66.translation: And if We willed, We could have obliterated their eyes, and they would race to [find] the path, and how could they see?

36:67.transliteration: Walaw nashao lamasakhnahumAAala makanatihim fama istataAAoo mudiyyanwala yarjiAAoon
36:67.translation: And if We willed, We could have deformed them, [paralyzing them] in their places so they would not be able to proceed, nor could they return.

36:68.transliteration: Waman nuAAammirhu nunakkis-hu fee alkhalqiafala yaAAqiloon
36:68.translation: And he to whom We grant long life We reverse in creation; so will they not understand?

36:69.transliteration: Wama AAallamnahu ashshiAArawama yanbaghee lahu in huwa illa thikrunwaqur-anun mubeen
36:69.translation: And We did not give him [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] knowledge of poetry, nor is it befitting for him. It is not but a message and a clear Qur’ān

36:70.transliteration: Liyunthira man kana hayyanwayahiqqa alqawlu AAala alkafireen
36:70.translation: To warn whoever is alive and justify the word [i.e., decree] against the disbelievers.

36:71.transliteration: Awa lam yaraw anna khalaqnalahum mimma AAamilat aydeena anAAaman fahumlaha malikoon
36:71.translation: Do they not see that We have created for them from what Our hands have made, grazing livestock, and [then] they are their owners?

36:72.translation: And We have tamed them for them, so some of them they ride, and some of them they eat.

36:73.translation: And for them therein are [other] benefits and drinks, so will they not be grateful?

36:74.transliteration: Wattakhathoo min dooni Allahialihatan laAAallahum yunsaroon
36:74.translation: But they have taken besides Allāh [false] deities that perhaps they would be helped.

36:75.transliteration: La yastateeAAoona nasrahumwahum lahum jundun muhdaroon
36:75.translation: They are not able to help them, and they [themselves] are for them soldiers in attendance.

36:76.transliteration: Fala yahzunka qawluhum innanaAAlamu ma yusirroona wama yuAAlinoon
36:76.translation: So let not their speech grieve you. Indeed, We know what they conceal and what they declare.

36:77.transliteration: Awa lam yara al-insanu annakhalaqnahu min nutfatin fa-itha huwa khaseemunmubeen
36:77.translation: Does man not consider that We created him from a [mere] sperm-drop - then at once he is a clear adversary?

36:78.transliteration: Wadaraba lana mathalanwanasiya khalqahu qala man yuhyee alAAithamawahiya rameem
36:78.translation: And he presents for Us an example and forgets his [own] creation. He says, "Who will give life to bones while they are disintegrated?"

36:79.transliteration: Qul yuhyeeha allatheeanshaaha awwala marratin wahuwa bikulli khalqin AAaleem
36:79.translation: Say, "He will give them life who produced them the first time; and He is, of all creation, Knowing."

36:80.transliteration: Allathee jaAAala lakum mina ashshajarial-akhdari naran fa-itha antum minhutooqidoon
36:80.translation: [It is] He who made for you from the green tree, fire, and then from it you ignite.

36:81.transliteration: Awa laysa allathee khalaqa assamawatiwal-arda biqadirin AAala an yakhluqamithlahum bala wahuwa alkhallaqu alAAaleem
36:81.translation: Is not He who created the heavens and the earth Able to create the likes of them? Yes, [it is so]; and He is the Knowing Creator.

36:82.transliteration: Innama amruhu itha aradashay-an an yaqoola lahu kun fayakoon
36:82.translation: His command is only when He intends a thing that He says to it, "Be," and it is.

36:83.transliteration: Fasubhana allathee biyadihimalakootu kulli shay-in wa-ilayhi turjaAAoon
36:83.translation: So exalted is He in whose hand is the realm of all things, and to Him you will be returned.

37:1.translation: By those [angels] lined up in rows

37:3.translation: And those who recite the message,

37:5.transliteration: Rabbu assamawati wal-ardiwama baynahuma warabbu almashariq
37:5.translation: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them and Lord of the sunrises.

37:6.translation: Indeed, We have adorned the nearest heaven with an adornment of stars

37:7.translation: And as protection against every rebellious devil

37:8.transliteration: La yassammaAAoona ila almala-ial-aAAla wayuqthafoona min kulli janib
37:8.translation: [So] they may not listen to the exalted assembly [of angels] and are pelted from every side,

37:9.translation: Repelled; and for them is a constant punishment,

37:10.transliteration: Illa man khatifa alkhatfatafaatbaAAahu shihabun thaqib
37:10.translation: Except one who snatches [some words] by theft, but they are pursued by a burning flame, piercing [in brightness].

37:11.transliteration: Fastaftihim ahum ashaddu khalqan amman khalaqna inna khalaqnahum min teeninlazib
37:11.translation: Then inquire of them, [O Muḥammad], "Are they a stronger [or more difficult] creation or those [others] We have created?" Indeed, We created them [i.e., men] from sticky clay.

37:12.translation: But you wonder, while they mock,

37:13.translation: And when they are reminded, they remember not.

37:14.translation: And when they see a sign, they ridicule.

37:15.translation: And say, "This is not but obvious magic.

37:16.translation: When we have died and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?

37:18.translation: Say, "Yes, and you will be [rendered] contemptible."

37:19.transliteration: Fa-innama hiya zajratun wahidatunfa-itha hum yanthuroon
37:19.translation: It will be only one shout, and at once they will be observing.

37:20.translation: They will say, "O woe to us! This is the Day of Recompense."

37:21.transliteration: Hatha yawmu alfasli allatheekuntum bihi tukaththiboon
37:21.translation: [They will be told], "This is the Day of Judgement which you used to deny."

37:22.transliteration: Ohshuroo allatheena thalamoowaazwajahum wama kanoo yaAAbudoon
37:22.translation: [The angels will be ordered], "Gather those who committed wrong, their kinds, and what they used to worship

37:23.transliteration: Min dooni Allahi fahdoohum ilasirati aljaheem
37:23.translation: Other than Allāh, and guide them to the path of Hellfire

37:24.translation: And stop them; indeed, they are to be questioned."

37:25.translation: [They will be asked], "What is [wrong] with you? Why do you not help each other?"

37:26.translation: But they, that Day, are in surrender.

37:27.translation: And they will approach one another asking [i.e., blaming] each other.

37:28.translation: They will say, "Indeed, you used to come at us from the right."

37:29.translation: They [i.e., the oppressors] will say, "Rather, you [yourselves] were not believers,

37:30.transliteration: Wama kana lanaAAalaykum min sultanin bal kuntum qawman tagheen
37:30.translation: And we had over you no authority, but you were a transgressing people.

37:31.translation: So the word [i.e., decree] of our Lord has come into effect upon us; indeed, we will taste [punishment].

37:32.translation: And we led you to deviation; indeed, we were deviators."

37:33.translation: So indeed they, that Day, will be sharing in the punishment.

37:34.translation: Indeed, that is how We deal with the criminals.

37:35.transliteration: Innahum kanoo itha qeela lahumla ilaha illa Allahu yastakbiroon
37:35.translation: Indeed they, when it was said to them, "There is no deity but Allāh," were arrogant

37:36.translation: And were saying, "Are we to leave our gods for a mad poet?"

37:37.translation: Rather, he [i.e., the Prophet (ﷺ)] has come with the truth and confirmed the [previous] messengers.

37:38.translation: Indeed, you [disbelievers] will be tasters of the painful punishment,

37:39.translation: And you will not be recompensed except for what you used to do -

37:40.translation: But not the chosen servants of Allāh.

37:41.translation: Those will have a provision determined -

37:42.translation: Fruits; and they will be honored

37:45.translation: There will be circulated among them a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring,

37:46.translation: White and delicious to the drinkers;

37:47.transliteration: La feeha ghawlun walahum AAanha yunzafoon
37:47.translation: No bad effect is there in it, nor from it will they be intoxicated.

37:48.translation: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances, with large, [beautiful] eyes,

37:49.translation: As if they were [delicate] eggs, well-protected.

37:50.translation: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other.

37:51.transliteration: Qala qa-ilun minhum innee kanalee qareen
37:51.translation: A speaker among them will say, "Indeed, I had a companion [on earth].

37:52.translation: Who would say, 'Are you indeed of those who believe

37:53.translation: That when we have died and become dust and bones, we will indeed be recompensed?'"

37:54.translation: He will say, "Would you [care to] look?"

37:55.translation: And he will look and see him in the midst of the Hellfire.

37:56.translation: He will say, "By Allāh, you almost ruined me.

37:57.translation: If not for the favor of my Lord, I would have been of those brought in [to Hell].

37:58.translation: Then, are we not to die

37:59.translation: Except for our first death, and we will not be punished?"

37:60.translation: Indeed, this is the great attainment.

37:61.translation: For the like of this let the workers [on earth] work.

37:62.translation: Is that [i.e., Paradise] a better accommodation or the tree of zaqqūm?

37:63.translation: Indeed, We have made it a torment for the wrongdoers.

37:64.translation: Indeed, it is a tree issuing from the bottom of the Hellfire,

37:65.translation: Its emerging fruit as if it was heads of the devils.

37:66.translation: And indeed, they will eat from it and fill with it their bellies.

37:67.transliteration: Thumma inna lahum AAalayha lashawbanmin hameem
37:67.translation: Then indeed, they will have after it a mixture of scalding water.

37:68.translation: Then indeed, their return will be to the Hellfire.

37:69.translation: Indeed they found their fathers astray.

37:70.translation: So they hastened [to follow] in their footsteps.

37:71.translation: And there had already strayed before them most of the former peoples,

37:72.translation: And We had already sent among them warners.

37:73.translation: Then look how was the end of those who were warned -

37:74.translation: But not the chosen servants of Allāh.

37:75.translation: And Noah had certainly called Us, and [We are] the best of responders.

37:76.translation: And We saved him and his family from the great affliction.

37:77.translation: And We made his descendants those remaining [on the earth]

37:78.translation: And left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:

37:80.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.

37:81.translation: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.

37:82.translation: Then We drowned the others [i.e., disbelievers].

37:83.translation: And indeed, among his kind was Abraham,

37:84.translation: When he came to his Lord with a sound heart

37:85.translation: [And] when he said to his father and his people, "What do you worship?

37:86.translation: Is it falsehood [as] gods other than Allāh you desire?

37:87.translation: Then what is your thought about the Lord of the worlds?"

37:88.translation: And he cast a look at the stars.

37:89.translation: And said, "Indeed, I am [about to be] ill."

37:90.translation: So they turned away from him, departing.

37:91.translation: Then he turned to their gods and said, "Do you not eat?

37:92.translation: What is [wrong] with you that you do not speak?".

37:93.translation: And he turned upon them a blow with [his] right hand.

37:94.translation: Then they [i.e., the people] came toward him, hastening.

37:95.translation: He said, "Do you worship that which you [yourselves] carve,

37:96.translation: While Allāh created you and that which you do?"

37:97.transliteration: Qaloo ibnoo lahu bunyananfaalqoohu fee aljaheem
37:97.translation: They said, "Construct for him a structure [i.e., furnace] and throw him into the burning fire."

37:98.translation: And they intended for him a plan [i.e., harm], but We made them the most debased.

37:99.translation: And [then] he said, "Indeed, I will go to [where I am ordered by] my Lord; He will guide me.

37:100.translation: My Lord, grant me [a child] from among the righteous."

37:101.translation: So We gave him good tidings of a forbearing boy.

37:102.transliteration: Falamma balagha maAAahu assaAAyaqala ya bunayya innee ara fee almanamiannee athbahuka fanthur mathatara qala ya abati ifAAal ma tu/marusatajidunee in shaa Allahu mina assabireen
37:102.translation: And when he reached with him [the age of] exertion, he said, "O my son, indeed I have seen in a dream that I [must] sacrifice you, so see what you think." He said, "O my father, do as you are commanded. You will find me, if Allāh wills, of the steadfast."

37:103.translation: And when they had both submitted and he put him down upon his forehead,

37:105.transliteration: Qad saddaqta arru/yainna kathalika najzee almuhsineen
37:105.translation: You have fulfilled the vision." Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.

37:106.translation: Indeed, this was the clear trial.

37:107.translation: And We ransomed him with a great sacrifice,

37:108.translation: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:

37:110.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.

37:111.translation: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.

37:112.translation: And We gave him good tidings of Isaac, a prophet from among the righteous.

37:113.transliteration: Wabarakna AAalayhi waAAalaishaqa wamin thurriyyatihima muhsinunwathalimun linafsihi mubeen
37:113.translation: And We blessed him and Isaac. But among their descendants is the doer of good and the clearly unjust to himself [i.e., sinner].

37:114.translation: And We did certainly confer favor upon Moses and Aaron.

37:115.translation: And We saved them and their people from the great affliction,

37:116.translation: And We supported them so it was they who overcame.

37:117.translation: And We gave them the explicit Scripture [i.e., the Torah],

37:118.translation: And We guided them on the straight path.

37:119.translation: And We left for them [favorable mention] among later generations:

37:121.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.

37:122.translation: Indeed, they were of Our believing servants.

37:123.translation: And indeed, Elias was from among the messengers,

37:124.translation: When he said to his people, "Will you not fear Allāh?

37:125.translation: Do you call upon Baʿl and leave the best of creators -

37:126.translation: Allāh, your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers?"

37:127.translation: And they denied him, so indeed, they will be brought [for punishment],

37:128.translation: Except the chosen servants of Allāh.

37:129.translation: And We left for him [favorable mention] among later generations:

37:131.translation: Indeed, We thus reward the doers of good.

37:132.translation: Indeed, he was of Our believing servants.

37:133.translation: And indeed, Lot was among the messengers.

37:134.translation: [So mention] when We saved him and his family, all,

37:135.translation: Except an old woman [i.e., his wife] among those who remained [with the evildoers].

37:137.translation: And indeed, you pass by them in the morning

37:138.translation: And at night. Then will you not use reason?

37:139.translation: And indeed, Jonah was among the messengers.

37:140.translation: [Mention] when he ran away to the laden ship.

37:141.translation: And he drew lots and was among the losers.

37:142.translation: Then the fish swallowed him, while he was blameworthy.

37:143.translation: And had he not been of those who exalt Allāh,

37:144.translation: He would have remained inside its belly until the Day they are resurrected.

37:145.translation: But We threw him onto the open shore while he was ill.

37:146.translation: And We caused to grow over him a gourd vine.

37:147.translation: And We sent him to [his people of] a hundred thousand or more.

37:148.translation: And they believed, so We gave them enjoyment [of life] for a time.

37:149.translation: So inquire of them, [O Muḥammad], "Does your Lord have daughters while they have sons?

37:150.translation: Or did We create the angels as females while they were witnesses?"

37:151.translation: Unquestionably, it is out of their [invented] falsehood that they say,

37:152.translation: "Allāh has begotten," and indeed, they are liars.

37:153.translation: Has He chosen daughters over sons?

37:154.translation: What is [wrong] with you? How do you make judgement?

37:155.translation: Then will you not be reminded?

37:156.translation: Or do you have a clear authority?

37:157.translation: Then produce your scripture, if you should be truthful.

37:158.transliteration: WajaAAaloo baynahu wabayna aljinnatinasaban walaqad AAalimati aljinnatu innahum lamuhdaroon
37:158.translation: And they have made [i.e., claimed] between Him and the jinn a lineage, but the jinn have already known that they [who made such claims] will be brought [to punishment].

37:159.translation: Exalted is Allāh above what they describe,

37:160.translation: Except the chosen servants of Allāh [who do not share in that sin].

37:161.translation: So indeed, you [disbelievers] and whatever you worship,

37:162.translation: You cannot tempt [anyone] away from Him

37:163.translation: Except he who is to [enter and] burn in the Hellfire.

37:164.translation: [The angels say], "There is not among us any except that he has a known position.

37:165.translation: And indeed, we are those who line up [for prayer].

37:166.translation: And indeed, we are those who exalt Allāh."

37:167.translation: And indeed, they [i.e., the disbelievers] used to say,

37:168.translation: "If we had a message from [those of] the former peoples,

37:169.translation: We would have been the chosen servants of Allāh."

37:170.translation: But they disbelieved in it, so they are going to know.

37:171.translation: And Our word [i.e., decree] has already preceded for Our servants, the messengers,

37:172.translation: [That] indeed, they would be those given victory

37:173.translation: And [that] indeed, Our soldiers [i.e., the believers] will be those who overcome.

37:174.translation: So, [O Muḥammad], leave them for a time.

37:175.translation: And see [what will befall] them, for they are going to see.

37:176.translation: Then for Our punishment are they impatient?

37:177.translation: But when it descends in their territory, then evil is the morning of those who were warned.

37:178.translation: And leave them for a time.

37:179.translation: And see, for they are going to see.

37:180.translation: Exalted is your Lord, the Lord of might, above what they describe.

37:182.translation: And praise to Allāh, Lord of the worlds.

38:1.translation: Ṣād. By the Qur’ān containing reminder...

38:2.translation: But those who disbelieve are in pride and dissension.

38:3.transliteration: Kam ahlakna min qablihim min qarninfanadaw walata heena manas
38:3.translation: How many a generation have We destroyed before them, and they [then] called out; but it was not a time for escape.

38:4.transliteration: WaAAajiboo an jaahum munthirunminhum waqala alkafiroona hatha sahirunkaththab
38:4.translation: And they wonder that there has come to them a warner [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)] from among themselves. And the disbelievers say, "This is a magician and a liar.

38:5.transliteration: AjaAAala al-alihata ilahan wahidaninna hatha lashay-on AAujab
38:5.translation: Has he made the gods [only] one God? Indeed, this is a curious thing."

38:6.transliteration: Wantalaqa almalao minhum aniimshoo wasbiroo AAala alihatikuminna hatha lashay-on yurad
38:6.translation: And the eminent among them went forth, [saying], "Continue, and be patient over [the defense of] your gods. Indeed, this is a thing intended.

38:7.transliteration: Ma samiAAna bihatha feealmillati al-akhirati in hatha illa ikhtilaq
38:7.translation: We have not heard of this in the latest religion. This is not but a fabrication.

38:8.transliteration: Aonzila AAalayhi aththikru minbaynina bal hum fee shakkin min thikree bal lammayathooqoo AAathab
38:8.translation: Has the message been revealed to him out of [all of] us?" Rather, they are in doubt about My message. Rather, they have not yet tasted My punishment.

38:9.transliteration: Am AAindahum khaza-inu rahmatirabbika alAAazeezi alwahhab
38:9.translation: Or do they have the depositories of the mercy of your Lord, the Exalted in Might, the Bestower?

38:10.transliteration: Am lahum mulku assamawatiwal-ardi wama baynahuma falyartaqoofee al-asbab
38:10.translation: Or is theirs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and what is between them? Then let them ascend through [any] ways of access.

38:11.translation: [They are but] soldiers [who will be] defeated there among the companies [of disbelievers].

38:12.transliteration: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohinwaAAadun wafirAAawnu thoo al-awtad
38:12.translation: The people of Noah denied before them, and [the tribe of] ʿAad and Pharaoh, the owner of stakes,

38:13.transliteration: Wathamoodu waqawmu lootin waas-habual-aykati ola-ika al-ahzab
38:13.translation: And [the tribe of] Thamūd and the people of Lot and the companions of the thicket [i.e., people of Madyan]. Those are the companies.

38:14.transliteration: In kullun illa kaththaba arrusulafahaqqa AAiqab
38:14.translation: Each of them denied the messengers, so My penalty was justified.

38:15.transliteration: Wama yanthuru haola-iilla sayhatan wahidatan ma lahamin fawaq
38:15.translation: And these [disbelievers] await not but one blast [of the Horn]; for it there will be no delay.

38:16.transliteration: Waqaloo rabbana AAajjil lanaqittana qabla yawmi alhisab
38:16.translation: And they say, "Our Lord, hasten for us our share [of the punishment] before the Day of Account."

38:17.transliteration: Isbir AAala mayaqooloona wathkur AAabdana dawooda thaal-aydi innahu awwab
38:17.translation: Be patient over what they say and remember Our servant, David, the possessor of strength; indeed, he was one who repeatedly turned back [to Allāh].

38:18.transliteration: Inna sakhkharna aljibalamaAAahu yusabbihna bilAAashiyyi wal-ishraq
38:18.translation: Indeed, We subjected the mountains [to praise] with him, exalting [Allāh] in the [late] afternoon and [after] sunrise.

38:19.translation: And the birds were assembled, all with him repeating [praises].

38:20.translation: And We strengthened his kingdom and gave him wisdom and discernment in speech.

38:21.transliteration: Wahal ataka nabao alkhasmi ithtasawwaroo almihrab
38:21.translation: And has there come to you the news of the adversaries, when they climbed over the wall of [his] prayer chamber -

38:22.transliteration: Ith dakhaloo AAala dawoodafafaziAAa minhum qaloo la takhaf khasmanibagha baAAduna AAala baAAdinfahkum baynana bilhaqqi walatushtit wahdina ila sawa-iassirat
38:22.translation: When they entered upon David and he was alarmed by them? They said, "Fear not. [We are] two adversaries, one of whom has wronged the other, so judge between us with truth and do not exceed [it] and guide us to the sound path.

38:23.transliteration: Inna hatha akhee lahu tisAAunwatisAAoona naAAjatan waliya naAAjatun wahidatun faqalaakfilneeha waAAazzanee fee alkhitab
38:23.translation: Indeed this, my brother, has ninety-nine ewes, and I have one ewe; so he said, 'Entrust her to me,' and he overpowered me in speech."

38:24.transliteration: Qala laqad thalamakabisu-ali naAAjatika ila niAAajihi wa-innakatheeran mina alkhulata-i layabghee baAAduhum AAalabaAAdin illa allatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati waqaleelun mahum wathanna dawoodu annama fatannahufastaghfara rabbahu wakharra rakiAAan waanab
38:24.translation: [David] said, "He has certainly wronged you in demanding your ewe [in addition] to his ewes. And indeed, many associates oppress one another, except for those who believe and do righteous deeds - and few are they." And David became certain that We had tried him, and he asked forgiveness of his Lord and fell down bowing [in prostration] and turned in repentance [to Allāh].

38:25.transliteration: Faghafarna lahu thalikawa-inna lahu AAindana lazulfa wahusna maab
38:25.translation: So We forgave him that; and indeed, for him is nearness to Us and a good place of return.

38:26.transliteration: Ya dawoodu inna jaAAalnakakhaleefatan fee al-ardi fahkum bayna annasibilhaqqi wala tattabiAAi alhawa fayudillakaAAan sabeeli Allahi inna allatheena yadilloonaAAan sabeeli Allahi lahum AAathabun shadeedun bimanasoo yawma alhisab
38:26.translation: [We said], "O David, indeed We have made you a successor upon the earth, so judge between the people in truth and do not follow [your own] desire, as it will lead you astray from the way of Allāh." Indeed, those who go astray from the way of Allāh will have a severe punishment for having forgotten the Day of Account.

38:27.transliteration: Wama khalaqna assamaawal-arda wama baynahuma batilanthalika thannu allatheena kafaroofawaylun lillatheena kafaroo mina annar
38:27.translation: And We did not create the heaven and the earth and that between them aimlessly. That is the assumption of those who disbelieve, so woe to those who disbelieve from the Fire.

38:28.transliteration: Am najAAalu allatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati kalmufsideenafee al-ardi am najAAalu almuttaqeena kalfujjar
38:28.translation: Or should We treat those who believe and do righteous deeds like corrupters in the land? Or should We treat those who fear Allāh like the wicked?

38:29.transliteration: Kitabun anzalnahu ilayka mubarakunliyaddabbaroo ayatihi waliyatathakkara olooal-albab
38:29.translation: [This is] a blessed Book which We have revealed to you, [O Muḥammad], that they might reflect upon its verses and that those of understanding would be reminded.

38:30.transliteration: Wawahabna lidawooda sulaymananiAAma alAAabdu innahu awwab
38:30.translation: And to David We gave Solomon. An excellent servant, indeed he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allāh].

38:31.translation: [Mention] when there were exhibited before him in the afternoon the poised [standing] racehorses.

38:32.transliteration: Faqala innee ahbabtu hubbaalkhayri AAan thikri rabbee hatta tawaratbilhijab
38:32.translation: And he said, "Indeed, I gave preference to the love of good [things] over the remembrance of my Lord until it [i.e., the sun] disappeared into the curtain [of darkness]."

38:33.translation: [He said], "Return them to me," and set about striking [their] legs and necks.

38:34.transliteration: Walaqad fatanna sulaymanawaalqayna AAala kursiyyihi jasadan thumma anab
38:34.translation: And We certainly tried Solomon and placed on his throne a body; then he returned.

38:35.transliteration: Qala rabbi ighfir lee wahab leemulkan la yanbaghee li-ahadin min baAAdee innakaanta alwahhab
38:35.translation: He said, "My Lord, forgive me and grant me a kingdom such as will not belong to anyone after me. Indeed, You are the Bestower."

38:36.transliteration: Fasakhkharna lahu arreehatajree bi-amrihi rukhaan haythu asab
38:36.translation: So We subjected to him the wind blowing by his command, gently, wherever he directed,

38:37.translation: And [also] the devils [of jinn] - every builder and diver.

38:38.translation: And others bound together in irons.

38:39.transliteration: Hatha AAataona famnunaw amsik bighayri hisab
38:39.translation: [We said], "This is Our gift, so grant or withhold without account."

38:40.translation: And indeed, for him is nearness to Us and a good place of return.

38:41.transliteration: Wathkur AAabdanaayyooba ith nada rabbahu annee massaniya ashshaytanubinusbin waAAathab
38:41.translation: And remember Our servant Job, when he called to his Lord, "Indeed, Satan has touched me with hardship and torment."

38:42.translation: [So he was told], "Strike [the ground] with your foot; this is a [spring for a] cool bath and drink."

38:43.transliteration: Wawahabna lahu ahlahu wamithlahummaAAahum rahmatan minna wathikrali-olee al-albab
38:43.translation: And We granted him his family and a like [number] with them as mercy from Us and a reminder for those of understanding.

38:44.transliteration: Wakhuth biyadika dighthan fadribbihi wala tahnath inna wajadnahu sabiranniAAma alAAabdu innahu awwab
38:44.translation: [We said], "And take in your hand a bunch [of grass] and strike with it and do not break your oath." Indeed, We found him patient, an excellent servant. Indeed, he was one repeatedly turning back [to Allāh].

38:45.transliteration: Wathkur AAibadanaibraheema wa-ishaqa wayaAAqooba olee al-aydee wal-absar
38:45.translation: And remember Our servants, Abraham, Isaac and Jacob - those of strength and [religious] vision.

38:46.translation: Indeed, We chose them for an exclusive quality: remembrance of the home [of the Hereafter].

38:47.translation: And indeed they are, to Us, among the chosen and outstanding.

38:48.transliteration: Wathkur ismaAAeelawa-ilyasaAAa watha alkifli wakullun mina al-akhyar
38:48.translation: And remember Ishmael, Elisha and Dhul-Kifl, and all are among the outstanding.

38:49.translation: This is a reminder. And indeed, for the righteous is a good place of return -

38:50.translation: Gardens of perpetual residence, whose doors will be opened to them.

38:51.transliteration: Muttaki-eena feeha yadAAoona feehabifakihatin katheeratin washarab
38:51.translation: Reclining within them, they will call therein for abundant fruit and drink.

38:52.translation: And with them will be women limiting [their] glances and of equal age.

38:53.translation: This is what you, [the righteous], are promised for the Day of Account.

38:54.transliteration: Inna hatha larizquna malahu min nafad
38:54.translation: Indeed, this is Our provision; for it there is no depletion.

38:55.translation: This [is so]. But indeed, for the transgressors is an evil place of return -

38:56.translation: Hell, which they will [enter to] burn, and wretched is the resting place.

38:57.translation: This - so let them taste it - is scalding water and [foul] purulence.

38:58.translation: And other [punishments] of its type [in various] kinds.

38:59.transliteration: Hatha fawjun muqtahimunmaAAakum la marhaban bihim innahum saloo annar
38:59.translation: [Its inhabitants will say], "This is a company bursting in with you. No welcome for them. Indeed, they will burn in the Fire."

38:60.transliteration: Qaloo bal antum la marhabanbikum antum qaddamtumoohu lana fabi/sa alqarar
38:60.translation: They will say, "Nor you! No welcome for you. You, [our leaders], brought this upon us, and wretched is the settlement."

38:61.transliteration: Qaloo rabbana man qaddama lanahatha fazidhu AAathaban diAAfan fee annar
38:61.translation: They will say, "Our Lord, whoever brought this upon us - increase for him double punishment in the Fire."

38:62.transliteration: Waqaloo ma lana lanara rijalan kunna naAAudduhum mina al-ashrar
38:62.translation: And they will say, "Why do we not see men whom we used to count among the worst?

38:63.translation: Is it [because] we took them in ridicule, or has [our] vision turned away from them?"

38:64.translation: Indeed, that is truth [i.e., reality] - the quarreling of the people of the Fire.

38:65.transliteration: Qul innama ana munthirunwama min ilahin illa Allahu alwahidualqahhar
38:65.translation: Say, [O Muḥammad], "I am only a warner, and there is not any deity except Allāh, the One, the Prevailing,

38:66.transliteration: Rabbu assamawati wal-ardiwama baynahuma alAAazeezu alghaffar
38:66.translation: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver."

38:69.transliteration: Ma kana liya min AAilmin bilmala-ial-aAAla ith yakhtasimoon
38:69.translation: I had no knowledge of the exalted assembly [of angels] when they were disputing [the creation of Adam].

38:70.transliteration: In yooha ilayya illa annamaana natheerun mubeen
38:70.translation: It has not been revealed to me except that I am a clear warner."

38:71.transliteration: Ith qala rabbuka lilmala-ikatiinnee khaliqun basharan min teen
38:71.translation: [So mention] when your Lord said to the angels, "Indeed, I am going to create a human being from clay.

38:72.transliteration: Fa-itha sawwaytuhu wanafakhtu feehimin roohee faqaAAoo lahu sajideen
38:72.translation: So when I have proportioned him and breathed into him of My [created] soul, then fall down to him in prostration."

38:73.translation: So the angels prostrated - all of them entirely,

38:74.translation: Except Iblees; he was arrogant and became among the disbelievers.

38:75.transliteration: Qala ya ibleesu mamanaAAaka an tasjuda lima khalaqtu biyadayya astakbarta amkunta mina alAAaleen
38:75.translation: [Allāh] said, "O Iblees, what prevented you from prostrating to that which I created with My hands? Were you arrogant [then], or were you [already] among the haughty?"

38:76.transliteration: Qala ana khayrun minhukhalaqtanee min narin wakhalaqtahu min teen
38:76.translation: He said, "I am better than him. You created me from fire and created him from clay."

38:77.translation: [Allāh] said, "Then get out of it [i.e., Paradise], for indeed, you are expelled.

38:78.translation: And indeed, upon you is My curse until the Day of Recompense."

38:79.translation: He said, "My Lord, then reprieve me until the Day they are resurrected."

38:80.translation: [Allāh] said, "So indeed, you are of those reprieved

38:81.translation: Until the Day of the time well-known."

38:82.translation: [Iblees] said, "By Your might, I will surely mislead them all.

38:83.translation: Except, among them, Your chosen servants."

38:84.translation: [Allāh] said, "The truth [is My oath], and the truth I say -

38:85.transliteration: Laamlaanna jahannama minka wamimmantabiAAaka minhum ajmaAAeen
38:85.translation: [That] I will surely fill Hell with you and those of them that follow you all together."

38:86.transliteration: Qul ma as-alukum AAalayhi min ajrinwama ana mina almutakallifeen
38:86.translation: Say, [O Muḥammad], "I do not ask you for it [i.e., the Qur’ān] any payment, and I am not of the pretentious.

38:87.translation: It is but a reminder to the worlds.

38:88.translation: And you will surely know [the truth of] its information after a time."

39:1.translation: The revelation of the Book [i.e., the Qur’ān] is from Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

39:2.transliteration: Inna anzalna ilayka alkitababilhaqqi faAAbudi Allaha mukhlisanlahu addeen
39:2.translation: Indeed, We have sent down to you the Book, [O Muḥammad], in truth. So worship Allāh, [being] sincere to Him in religion.

39:3.transliteration: Ala lillahi addeenualkhalisu wallatheena ittakhathoomin doonihi awliyaa ma naAAbuduhum illaliyuqarriboona ila Allahi zulfa innaAllaha yahkumu baynahum fee ma hum feehiyakhtalifoona inna Allaha la yahdee man huwa kathibunkaffar
39:3.translation: Unquestionably, for Allāh is the pure religion. And those who take protectors besides Him [say], "We only worship them that they may bring us nearer to Allāh in position." Indeed, Allāh will judge between them concerning that over which they differ. Indeed, Allāh does not guide he who is a liar and [confirmed] disbeliever.

39:4.transliteration: Law arada Allahu an yattakhithawaladan lastafa mimma yakhluqu mayashao subhanahu huwa Allahu alwahidualqahhar
39:4.translation: If Allāh had intended to take a son, He could have chosen from what He creates whatever He willed. Exalted is He; He is Allāh, the One, the Prevailing.

39:5.transliteration: Khalaqa assamawati wal-ardabilhaqqi yukawwiru allayla AAala annahariwayukawwiru annahara AAala allayliwasakhkhara ashshamsa walqamara kullun yajreeli-ajalin musamman ala huwa alAAazeezu alghaffar
39:5.translation: He created the heavens and earth in truth. He wraps the night over the day and wraps the day over the night and has subjected the sun and the moon, each running [its course] for a specified term. Unquestionably, He is the Exalted in Might, the Perpetual Forgiver.

39:6.transliteration: Khalaqakum min nafsin wahidatin thummajaAAala minha zawjaha waanzala lakum mina al-anAAamithamaniyata azwajin yakhluqukum fee butooniommahatikum khalqan min baAAdi khalqin fee thulumatinthalathin thalikumu Allahu rabbukum lahualmulku la ilaha illa huwa faanna tusrafoon
39:6.translation: He created you from one soul. Then He made from it its mate, and He produced for you from the grazing livestock eight mates. He creates you in the wombs of your mothers, creation after creation, within three darknesses. That is Allāh, your Lord; to Him belongs dominion. There is no deity except Him, so how are you averted?

39:7.transliteration: In takfuroo fa-inna Allaha ghaniyyunAAankum wala yarda liAAibadihi alkufra wa-intashkuroo yardahu lakum wala taziru waziratunwizra okhra thumma ila rabbikum marjiAAukumfayunabbi-okum bima kuntum taAAmaloona innahu AAaleemun bithatiassudoor
39:7.translation: If you disbelieve - indeed, Allāh is Free from need of you. And He does not approve for His servants disbelief. And if you are grateful, He approves [i.e., likes] it for you; and no bearer of burdens will bear the burden of another. Then to your Lord is your return, and He will inform you about what you used to do. Indeed, He is Knowing of that within the breasts.

39:8.transliteration: Wa-itha massa al-insana durrundaAAa rabbahu muneeban ilayhi thumma ithakhawwalahu niAAmatan minhu nasiya ma kana yadAAooilayhi min qablu wajaAAala lillahi andadan liyudillaAAan sabeelihi qul tamattaAA bikufrika qaleelan innaka min as-habiannar
39:8.translation: And when adversity touches man, he calls upon his Lord, turning to Him [alone]; then when He bestows on him a favor from Himself, he forgets Him whom he called upon before, and he attributes to Allāh equals to mislead [people] from His way. Say, "Enjoy your disbelief for a little; indeed, you are of the companions of the Fire."

39:9.transliteration: Amman huwa qanitun anaaallayli sajidan waqa-iman yahtharu al-akhiratawayarjoo rahmata rabbihi qul hal yastawee allatheenayaAAlamoona wallatheena la yaAAlamoonainnama yatathakkaru oloo al-albab
39:9.translation: Is one who is devoutly obedient during periods of the night, prostrating and standing [in prayer], fearing the Hereafter and hoping for the mercy of his Lord, [like one who does not]? Say, "Are those who know equal to those who do not know?" Only they will remember [who are] people of understanding.

39:10.transliteration: Qul ya AAibadi allatheenaamanoo ittaqoo rabbakum lillatheena ahsanoofee hathihi addunya hasanatun waarduAllahi wasiAAatun innama yuwaffa assabiroonaajrahum bighayri hisab
39:10.translation: Say, "O My servants who have believed, fear your Lord. For those who do good in this world is good, and the earth of Allāh is spacious. Indeed, the patient will be given their reward without account [i.e., limit]."

39:11.transliteration: Qul innee omirtu an aAAbuda Allahamukhlisan lahu addeen
39:11.translation: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Indeed, I have been commanded to worship Allāh, [being] sincere to Him in religion.

39:12.translation: And I have been commanded to be the first [among you] of the Muslims."

39:13.transliteration: Qul innee akhafu in AAasayturabbee AAathaba yawmin AAatheem
39:13.translation: Say, "Indeed I fear, if I should disobey my Lord, the punishment of a tremendous Day."

39:14.translation: Say, "Allāh [alone] do I worship, sincere to Him in my religion,

39:15.transliteration: FaAAbudoo ma shi/tum mindoonihi qul inna alkhasireena allatheena khasirooanfusahum waahleehim yawma alqiyamati ala thalikahuwa alkhusranu almubeen
39:15.translation: So worship what you will besides Him." Say, "Indeed, the losers are the ones who will lose themselves and their families on the Day of Resurrection. Unquestionably, that is the manifest loss."

39:16.transliteration: Lahum min fawqihim thulalunmina annari wamin tahtihim thulalunthalika yukhawwifu Allahu bihi AAibadahu yaAAibadi fattaqoon
39:16.translation: They will have canopies [i.e., layers] of fire above them and below them, canopies. By that Allāh threatens [i.e., warns] His servants. O My servants, then fear Me.

39:17.transliteration: Wallatheena ijtanaboo attaghootaan yaAAbudooha waanaboo ila Allahilahumu albushra fabashshir AAibad
39:17.translation: But those who have avoided ṭāghūt, lest they worship it, and turned back to Allāh - for them are good tidings. So give good tidings to My servants

39:18.transliteration: Allatheena yastamiAAoona alqawlafayattabiAAoona ahsanahu ola-ika allatheenahadahumu Allahu waola-ika hum oloo al-albab
39:18.translation: Who listen to speech and follow the best of it. Those are the ones Allāh has guided, and those are people of understanding.

39:19.transliteration: Afaman haqqa AAalayhi kalimatu alAAathabiafaanta tunqithu man fee annar
39:19.translation: Then, is one who has deserved the decree of punishment [to be guided]? Then, can you save one who is in the Fire?

39:20.transliteration: Lakini allatheena ittaqawrabbahum lahum ghurafun min fawqiha ghurafun mabniyyatuntajree min tahtiha al-anharu waAAda Allahila yukhlifu Allahu almeeAAad
39:20.translation: But those who have feared their Lord - for them are chambers, above them chambers built high, beneath which rivers flow. [This is] the promise of Allāh. Allāh does not fail in [His] promise.

39:21.transliteration: Alam tara anna Allaha anzala mina assama-imaan fasalakahu yanabeeAAa fee al-ardithumma yukhriju bihi zarAAan mukhtalifan alwanuhu thummayaheeju fatarahu musfarran thumma yajAAaluhu hutamaninna fee thalika lathikra li-olee al-albab
39:21.translation: Do you not see that Allāh sends down rain from the sky and makes it flow as springs [and rivers] in the earth; then He produces thereby crops of varying colors; then they dry and you see them turned yellow; then He makes them [scattered] debris. Indeed in that is a reminder for those of understanding.

39:22.transliteration: Afaman sharaha Allahu sadrahulil-islami fahuwa AAala noorin min rabbihi fawaylunlilqasiyati quloobuhum min thikri Allahi ola-ikafee dalalin mubeen
39:22.translation: So is one whose breast Allāh has expanded to [accept] Islām and he is upon [i.e., guided by] a light from his Lord [like one whose heart rejects it]? Then woe to those whose hearts are hardened against the remembrance of Allāh. Those are in manifest error.

39:23.transliteration: Allahu nazzala ahsana alhadeethikitaban mutashabihan mathaniya taqshaAAirruminhu juloodu allatheena yakhshawna rabbahum thummataleenu julooduhum waquloobuhum ila thikri Allahithalika huda Allahi yahdee bihi man yashaowaman yudlili Allahu fama lahu min had
39:23.translation: Allāh has sent down the best statement: a consistent Book wherein is reiteration. The skins shiver therefrom of those who fear their Lord; then their skins and their hearts relax at the remembrance [i.e., mention] of Allāh. That is the guidance of Allāh by which He guides whom He wills. And one whom Allāh sends astray - for him there is no guide.

39:24.transliteration: Afaman yattaqee biwajhihi soo-a alAAathabiyawma alqiyamati waqeela liththalimeenathooqoo ma kuntum taksiboon
39:24.translation: Then is he who will shield with his face the worst of the punishment on the Day of Resurrection [like one secure from it]? And it will be said to the wrongdoers, "Taste what you used to earn."

39:25.transliteration: Kaththaba allatheena minqablihim faatahumu alAAathabu min haythu layashAAuroon
39:25.translation: Those before them denied, and punishment came upon them from where they did not perceive.

39:26.transliteration: Faathaqahumu Allahu alkhizyafee alhayati addunya walaAAathabual-akhirati akbaru law kanoo yaAAlamoon
39:26.translation: So Allāh made them taste disgrace in worldly life. But the punishment of the Hereafter is greater, if they only knew.

39:27.transliteration: Walaqad darabna linnasifee hatha alqur-ani min kulli mathalin laAAallahumyatathakkaroon
39:27.translation: And We have certainly presented for the people in this Qur’ān from every [kind of] example - that they might remember.

39:28.transliteration: Qur-anan AAarabiyyan ghayra theeAAiwajin laAAallahum yattaqoon
39:28.translation: [It is] an Arabic Qur’ān, without any deviance that they might become righteous.

39:29.transliteration: Daraba Allahu mathalan rajulanfeehi shurakao mutashakisoona warajulan salamanlirajulin hal yastawiyani mathalan alhamdu lillahibal aktharuhum la yaAAlamoon
39:29.translation: Allāh presents an example: a man [i.e., slave] owned by quarreling partners and another belonging exclusively to one man - are they equal in comparison? Praise be to Allāh! But most of them do not know.

39:30.translation: Indeed, you are to die, and indeed, they are to die.

39:31.transliteration: Thumma innakum yawma alqiyamatiAAinda rabbikum takhtasimoon
39:31.translation: Then indeed you, on the Day of Resurrection, before your Lord, will dispute.

39:32.transliteration: Faman athlamu mimman kathabaAAala Allahi wakaththaba bissidqiith jaahu alaysa fee jahannama mathwan lilkafireen
39:32.translation: So who is more unjust than one who lies about Allāh and denies the truth when it has come to him? Is there not in Hell a residence for the disbelievers?

39:33.transliteration: Wallathee jaa bissidqiwasaddaqa bihi ola-ika humu almuttaqoon
39:33.translation: And the one who has brought the truth [i.e., the Prophet (ﷺ)] and [they who] believed in it - those are the righteous.

39:34.transliteration: Lahum ma yashaoona AAindarabbihim thalika jazao almuhsineen
39:34.translation: They will have whatever they desire with their Lord. That is the reward of the doers of good -

39:35.transliteration: Liyukaffira Allahu AAanhum aswaa allatheeAAamiloo wayajziyahum ajrahum bi-ahsani allathee kanooyaAAmaloon
39:35.translation: That Allāh may remove from them the worst of what they did and reward them their due for the best of what they used to do.

39:36.transliteration: Alaysa Allahu bikafin AAabdahuwayukhawwifoonaka billatheena min doonihi waman yudliliAllahu fama lahu min had
39:36.translation: Is not Allāh sufficient for His Servant [i.e., Prophet Muḥammad (ﷺ)]? And [yet], they threaten you with those [they worship] other than Him. And whoever Allāh leaves astray - for him there is no guide.

39:37.transliteration: Waman yahdi Allahu fama lahumin mudillin alaysa Allahu biAAazeezin theeintiqam
39:37.translation: And whoever Allāh guides - for him there is no misleader. Is not Allāh Exalted in Might and Owner of Retribution?

39:38.transliteration: Wala-in saaltahum man khalaqa assamawatiwal-arda layaqoolunna Allahu qul afaraaytumma tadAAoona min dooni Allahi in aradaniyaAllahu bidurrin hal hunna kashifatu durrihiaw aradanee birahmatin hal hunna mumsikaturahmatihi qul hasbiya Allahu AAalayhiyatawakkalu almutawakkiloon
39:38.translation: And if you asked them, "Who created the heavens and the earth?" they would surely say, "Allāh." Say, "Then have you considered what you invoke besides Allāh? If Allāh intended me harm, are they removers of His harm; or if He intended me mercy, are they withholders of His mercy?" Say, "Sufficient for me is Allāh; upon Him [alone] rely the [wise] reliers."

39:39.transliteration: Qul ya qawmi iAAmaloo AAalamakanatikum innee AAamilun fasawfa taAAlamoon
39:39.translation: Say, "O my people, work according to your position, [for] indeed, I am working; and you are going to know

39:40.transliteration: Man ya/teehi AAathabun yukhzeehi wayahilluAAalayhi AAathabun muqeem
39:40.translation: To whom will come a torment disgracing him and on whom will descend an enduring punishment."

39:41.transliteration: Inna anzalna AAalayka alkitabalinnasi bilhaqqi famani ihtadafalinafsihi waman dalla fa-innama yadilluAAalayha wama anta AAalayhim biwakeel
39:41.translation: Indeed, We sent down to you the Book for the people in truth. So whoever is guided - it is for [the benefit of] his soul; and whoever goes astray only goes astray to its detriment. And you are not a manager [i.e., authority] over them.

39:42.transliteration: Allahu yatawaffa al-anfusa heenamawtiha wallatee lam tamut fee manamihafayumsiku allatee qada AAalayha almawta wayursilual-okhra ila ajalin musamman inna fee thalikalaayatin liqawmin yatafakkaroon
39:42.translation: Allāh takes the souls at the time of their death, and those that do not die [He takes] during their sleep. Then He keeps those for which He has decreed death and releases the others for a specified term. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.

39:43.transliteration: Ami ittakhathoo min dooni AllahishufaAAaa qul awa law kanoo la yamlikoonashay-an wala yaAAqiloon
39:43.translation: Or have they taken other than Allāh as intercessors? Say, "Even though they do not possess [power over] anything, nor do they reason?"

39:44.transliteration: Qul lillahi ashshafaAAatujameeAAan lahu mulku assamawati wal-ardithumma ilayhi turjaAAoon
39:44.translation: Say, "To Allāh belongs [the right to allow] intercession entirely. To Him belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. Then to Him you will be returned."

39:45.transliteration: Wa-itha thukira Allahuwahdahu ishmaazzat quloobu allatheena layu/minoona bil-akhirati wa-itha thukiraallatheena min doonihi itha hum yastabshiroon
39:45.translation: And when Allāh is mentioned alone, the hearts of those who do not believe in the Hereafter shrink with aversion, but when those [worshipped] other than Him are mentioned, immediately they rejoice.

39:46.transliteration: Quli allahumma fatira assamawatiwal-ardi AAalima alghaybi washshahadatianta tahkumu bayna AAibadika fee ma kanoofeehi yakhtalifoon
39:46.translation: Say, "O Allāh, Creator of the heavens and the earth, Knower of the unseen and the witnessed, You will judge between your servants concerning that over which they used to differ."

39:47.transliteration: Walaw anna lillatheena thalamooma fee al-ardi jameeAAan wamithlahu maAAahu laftadawbihi min soo-i alAAathabi yawma alqiyamati wabadalahum mina Allahi ma lam yakoonoo yahtasiboon
39:47.translation: And if those who did wrong had all that is in the earth entirely and the like of it with it, they would [attempt to] ransom themselves thereby from the worst of the punishment on the Day of Resurrection. And there will appear to them from Allāh that which they had not taken into account.

39:48.transliteration: Wabada lahum sayyi-atu makasaboo wahaqa bihim ma kanoo bihiyastahzi-oon
39:48.translation: And there will appear to them the evils they had earned, and they will be enveloped by what they used to ridicule.

39:49.transliteration: Fa-itha massa al-insana durrundaAAana thumma itha khawwalnahuniAAmatan minna qala innama ooteetuhu AAalaAAilmin bal hiya fitnatun walakinna aktharahum layaAAlamoon
39:49.translation: And when adversity touches man, he calls upon Us; then when We bestow on him a favor from Us, he says, "I have only been given it because of [my] knowledge." Rather, it is a trial, but most of them do not know.

39:50.transliteration: Qad qalaha allatheenamin qablihim fama aghna AAanhum ma kanooyaksiboon
39:50.translation: Those before them had already said it, but they were not availed by what they used to earn.

39:51.transliteration: Faasabahum sayyi-atu makasaboo wallatheena thalamoo min haola-isayuseebuhum sayyi-atu ma kasaboo wamahum bimuAAjizeen
39:51.translation: And the evil consequences of what they earned struck them. And those who have wronged of these [people] will be struck [i.e., afflicted] by the evil consequences of what they earned; and they will not cause failure.

39:52.transliteration: Awa lam yaAAlamoo anna Allaha yabsutuarrizqa liman yashao wayaqdiru inna fee thalikalaayatin liqawmin yu/minoon
39:52.translation: Do they not know that Allāh extends provision for whom He wills and restricts [it]? Indeed in that are signs for a people who believe.

39:53.transliteration: Qul ya AAibadiya allatheenaasrafoo AAala anfusihim la taqnatoo min rahmatiAllahi inna Allaha yaghfiru aththunoobajameeAAan innahu huwa alghafooru arraheem
39:53.translation: Say, "O My servants who have transgressed against themselves [by sinning], do not despair of the mercy of Allāh. Indeed, Allāh forgives all sins. Indeed, it is He who is the Forgiving, the Merciful."

39:54.transliteration: Waaneeboo ila rabbikum waaslimoo lahumin qabli an ya/tiyakumu alAAathabu thumma la tunsaroon
39:54.translation: And return [in repentance] to your Lord and submit to Him before the punishment comes upon you; then you will not be helped.

39:55.transliteration: WattabiAAoo ahsana maonzila ilaykum min rabbikum min qabli an ya/tiyakumu alAAathabubaghtatan waantum la tashAAuroon
39:55.translation: And follow the best of what was revealed to you from your Lord [i.e., the Qur’ān] before the punishment comes upon you suddenly while you do not perceive,

39:56.transliteration: An taqoola nafsun ya hasrataAAala ma farrattu fee janbi Allahiwa-in kuntu lamina assakhireen
39:56.translation: Lest a soul should say, "Oh, [how great is] my regret over what I neglected in regard to Allāh and that I was among the mockers."

39:57.transliteration: Aw taqoola law anna Allaha hadaneelakuntu mina almuttaqeen
39:57.translation: Or [lest] it say, "If only Allāh had guided me, I would have been among the righteous."

39:58.transliteration: Aw taqoola heena tara alAAathabalaw anna lee karratan faakoona mina almuhsineen
39:58.translation: Or [lest] it say when it sees the punishment, "If only I had another turn so I could be among the doers of good."

39:59.transliteration: Bala qad jaatka ayateefakaththabta biha wastakbarta wakunta minaalkafireen
39:59.translation: But yes, there had come to you My verses, but you denied them and were arrogant, and you were among the disbelievers.

39:60.transliteration: Wayawma alqiyamati tara allatheenakathaboo AAala Allahi wujoohuhum muswaddatunalaysa fee jahannama mathwan lilmutakabbireen
39:60.translation: And on the Day of Resurrection you will see those who lied about Allāh [with] their faces blackened. Is there not in Hell a residence for the arrogant?

39:61.transliteration: Wayunajjee Allahu allatheenaittaqaw bimafazatihim la yamassuhumu assoo-owala hum yahzanoon
39:61.translation: And Allāh will save those who feared Him by their attainment; no evil will touch them, nor will they grieve.

39:62.transliteration: Allahu khaliqu kulli shay-inwahuwa AAala kulli shay-in wakeel
39:62.translation: Allāh is the Creator of all things, and He is, over all things, Disposer of affairs.

39:63.transliteration: Lahu maqaleedu assamawatiwal-ardi wallatheena kafaroo bi-ayatiAllahi ola-ika humu alkhasiroon
39:63.translation: To Him belong the keys of the heavens and the earth. And they who disbelieve in the verses of Allāh - it is those who are the losers.

39:64.transliteration: Qul afaghayra Allahi ta/muroonneeaAAbudu ayyuha aljahiloon
39:64.translation: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Is it other than Allāh that you order me to worship, O ignorant ones?"

39:65.transliteration: Walaqad oohiya ilayka wa-ilaallatheena min qablika la-in ashrakta layahbatannaAAamaluka walatakoonanna mina alkhasireen
39:65.translation: And it was already revealed to you and to those before you that if you should associate [anything] with Allāh, your work would surely become worthless, and you would surely be among the losers.

39:66.translation: Rather, worship [only] Allāh and be among the grateful.

39:67.transliteration: Wama qadaroo Allaha haqqaqadrihi wal-ardu jameeAAan qabdatuhu yawmaalqiyamati wassamawatu matwiyyatunbiyameenihi subhanahu wataAAala AAammayushrikoon
39:67.translation: They have not appraised Allāh with true appraisal, while the earth entirely will be [within] His grip on the Day of Resurrection, and the heavens will be folded in His right hand. Exalted is He and high above what they associate with Him.

39:68.transliteration: Wanufikha fee assoori fasaAAiqaman fee assamawati waman fee al-ardiilla man shaa Allahu thumma nufikha feehiokhra fa-itha hum qiyamun yanthuroon
39:68.translation: And the Horn will be blown, and whoever is in the heavens and whoever is on the earth will fall dead except whom Allāh wills. Then it will be blown again, and at once they will be standing, looking on.

39:69.transliteration: Waashraqati al-ardu binoori rabbihawawudiAAa alkitabu wajee-a binnabiyyeenawashshuhada-i waqudiya baynahum bilhaqqiwahum la yuthlamoon
39:69.translation: And the earth will shine with the light of its Lord, and the record [of deeds] will be placed, and the prophets and the witnesses will be brought, and it will be judged between them in truth, and they will not be wronged.

39:70.transliteration: Wawuffiyat kullu nafsin ma AAamilatwahuwa aAAlamu bima yafAAaloon
39:70.translation: And every soul will be fully compensated [for] what it did; and He is most knowing of what they do.

39:71.transliteration: Waseeqa allatheena kafaroo ilajahannama zumaran hatta itha jaoohafutihat abwabuha waqala lahumkhazanatuha alam ya/tikum rusulun minkum yatloonaAAalaykum ayati rabbikum wayunthiroonakumliqaa yawmikum hatha qaloo bala walakinhaqqat kalimatu alAAathabi AAala alkafireen
39:71.translation: And those who disbelieved will be driven to Hell in groups until, when they reach it, its gates are opened and its keepers will say, "Did there not come to you messengers from yourselves, reciting to you the verses of your Lord and warning you of the meeting of this Day of yours?" They will say, "Yes, but the word [i.e., decree] of punishment has come into effect upon the disbelievers."

39:72.transliteration: Qeela odkhuloo abwaba jahannama khalideenafeeha fabi/sa mathwa almutakabbireen
39:72.translation: [To them] it will be said, "Enter the gates of Hell to abide eternally therein, and wretched is the residence of the arrogant."

39:73.transliteration: Waseeqa allatheena ittaqaw rabbahumila aljannati zumaran hatta itha jaoohawafutihat abwabuha waqala lahumkhazanatuha salamun AAalaykum tibtum fadkhuloohakhalideen
39:73.translation: But those who feared their Lord will be driven to Paradise in groups until, when they reach it while its gates have been opened and its keepers say, "Peace be upon you; you have become pure; so enter it to abide eternally therein," [they will enter].

39:74.transliteration: Waqaloo alhamdu lillahiallathee sadaqana waAAdahu waawrathanaal-arda natabawwao mina aljannati haythu nashaofaniAAma ajru alAAamileen
39:74.translation: And they will say, "Praise to Allāh, who has fulfilled for us His promise and made us inherit the earth [so] we may settle in Paradise wherever we will. And excellent is the reward of [righteous] workers."

39:75.transliteration: Watara almala-ikata haffeenamin hawli alAAarshi yusabbihoona bihamdirabbihim waqudiya baynahum bilhaqqi waqeelaalhamdu lillahi rabbi alAAalameen
39:75.translation: And you will see the angels surrounding the Throne, exalting [Allāh] with praise of their Lord. And it will be judged between them in truth, and it will be said, "[All] praise to Allāh, Lord of the worlds."

40:2.translation: The revelation of the Book [i.e., the Qur’ān] is from Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Knowing,

40:3.transliteration: Ghafiri aththanbi waqabiliattawbi shadeedi alAAiqabi thee attawlila ilaha illa huwa ilayhi almaseer
40:3.translation: The forgiver of sin, acceptor of repentance, severe in punishment, owner of abundance. There is no deity except Him; to Him is the destination.

40:4.transliteration: Ma yujadilu fee ayatiAllahi illa allatheena kafaroo falayaghrurka taqallubuhum fee albilad
40:4.translation: No one disputes concerning the signs of Allāh except those who disbelieve, so be not deceived by their [uninhibited] movement throughout the land.

40:5.transliteration: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohinwal-ahzabu min baAAdihim wahammat kulluommatin birasoolihim liya/khuthoohu wajadaloo bilbatililiyudhidoo bihi alhaqqa faakhathtuhumfakayfa kana AAiqab
40:5.translation: The people of Noah denied before them and the [disbelieving] factions after them, and every nation intended [a plot] for their messenger to seize him, and they disputed by [using] falsehood to [attempt to] invalidate thereby the truth. So I seized them, and how [terrible] was My penalty.

40:6.transliteration: Wakathalika haqqat kalimaturabbika AAala allatheena kafaroo annahum as-habuannar
40:6.translation: And thus has the word [i.e., decree] of your Lord come into effect upon those who disbelieved that they are companions of the Fire.

40:7.transliteration: Allatheena yahmiloona alAAarshawaman hawlahu yusabbihoona bihamdi rabbihimwayu/minoona bihi wayastaghfiroona lillatheena amanoorabbana wasiAAta kulla shay-in rahmatan waAAilmanfaghfir lillatheena taboo wattabaAAoosabeelaka waqihim AAathaba aljaheem
