44:15.translation: Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief].

44:16.translation: The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution.

44:17.transliteration: Walaqad fatanna qablahum qawmafirAAawna wajaahum rasoolun kareem
44:17.translation: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger [i.e., Moses],

44:18.transliteration: An addoo ilayya AAibada Allahiinnee lakum rasoolun ameen
44:18.translation: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allāh. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger,"

44:19.transliteration: Waan la taAAloo AAala Allahiinnee ateekum bisultanin mubeen
44:19.translation: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allāh. Indeed, I have come to you with clear evidence.

44:20.translation: And indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me.

44:21.translation: But if you do not believe me, then leave me alone."

44:22.translation: And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people.

44:23.translation: [Allāh said], "Then set out with My servants by night. Indeed, you are to be pursued.

44:24.translation: And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned."

44:25.translation: How much they left behind of gardens and springs

44:27.translation: And comfort wherein they were amused.

44:28.translation: Thus. And We caused to inherit it another people.

44:29.transliteration: Fama bakat AAalayhimu assamaowal-ardu wama kanoo munthareen
44:29.translation: And the heaven and earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved.

44:30.transliteration: Walaqad najjayna banee isra-eelamina alAAathabi almuheen
44:30.translation: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment -

44:31.transliteration: Min firAAawna innahu kana AAaliyanmina almusrifeen
44:31.translation: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors.

44:32.translation: And We certainly chose them by knowledge over [all] the worlds.

44:33.transliteration: Waataynahum mina al-ayatima feehi balaon mubeen
44:33.translation: And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial.

44:35.transliteration: In hiya illa mawtatuna al-oolawama nahnu bimunshareen
44:35.translation: "There is not but our first death, and we will not be resurrected.

44:36.translation: Then bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful."

44:37.transliteration: Ahum khayrun am qawmu tubbaAAin wallatheenamin qablihim ahlaknahum innahum kanoo mujrimeen
44:37.translation: Are they better or the people of Tubbaʿ and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.

44:38.transliteration: Wama khalaqna assamawatiwal-arda wama baynahuma laAAibeen
44:38.translation: And We did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play.

44:39.transliteration: Ma khalaqnahuma illabilhaqqi walakinna aktharahum layaAAlamoon
44:39.translation: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know.

44:40.translation: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is the appointed time for them all -

44:41.transliteration: Yawma la yughnee mawlan AAan mawlanshay-an wala hum yunsaroon
44:41.translation: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -

44:42.transliteration: Illa man rahima Allahuinnahu huwa alAAazeezu arraheem
44:42.translation: Except those [believers] on whom Allāh has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.

44:45.translation: Like murky oil, it boils within bellies

44:46.translation: Like the boiling of scalding water.

44:47.translation: [It will be commanded], "Seize him and drag him into the midst of the Hellfire,

44:48.transliteration: Thumma subboo fawqa ra/sihi min AAathabialhameem
44:48.translation: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water."

44:49.translation: [It will be said], "Taste! Indeed, you are the honored, the noble!

44:50.translation: Indeed, this is what you used to dispute."

44:51.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be in a secure place:

44:53.translation: Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other.

44:54.translation: Thus. And We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.

44:55.translation: They will call therein for every [kind of] fruit - safe and secure.

44:56.transliteration: La yathooqoona feehaalmawta illa almawtata al-oola wawaqahum AAathabaaljaheem
44:56.translation: They will not taste death therein except the first death, and He will have protected them from the punishment of Hellfire

44:57.transliteration: Fadlan min rabbika thalikahuwa alfawzu alAAatheem
44:57.translation: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment.

44:58.translation: And indeed, We have eased it [i.e., the Qur’ān] in your tongue that they might be reminded.

44:59.translation: So watch, [O Muḥammad]; indeed, they are watching [for your end].

45:2.translation: The revelation of the Book is from Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

45:3.translation: Indeed, within the heavens and earth are signs for the believers.

45:4.transliteration: Wafee khalqikum wama yabuththu min dabbatinayatun liqawmin yooqinoon
45:4.translation: And in the creation of yourselves and what He disperses of moving creatures are signs for people who are certain [in faith].

45:5.transliteration: Wakhtilafi allayli wannahariwama anzala Allahu mina assama-i minrizqin faahya bihi al-arda baAAda mawtihawatasreefi arriyahi ayatunliqawmin yaAAqiloon
45:5.translation: And [in] the alternation of night and day and [in] what Allāh sends down from the sky of provision [i.e., rain] and gives life thereby to the earth after its lifelessness and [in His] directing of the winds are signs for a people who reason.

45:6.transliteration: Tilka ayatu Allahinatlooha AAalayka bilhaqqi fabi-ayyi hadeethinbaAAda Allahi waayatihi yu/minoon
45:6.translation: These are the verses of Allāh which We recite to you in truth. Then in what statement after Allāh and His verses will they believe?

45:8.transliteration: YasmaAAu ayati Allahitutla AAalayhi thumma yusirru mustakbiran kaan lamyasmaAAha fabashshirhu biAAathabin aleem
45:8.translation: Who hears the verses of Allāh recited to him, then persists arrogantly as if he had not heard them. So give him tidings of a painful punishment.

45:9.transliteration: Wa-itha AAalima min ayatinashay-an ittakhathaha huzuwan ola-ika lahumAAathabun muheen
45:9.translation: And when he knows anything of Our verses, he takes them in ridicule. Those will have a humiliating punishment.

45:10.transliteration: Min wara-ihim jahannamu walayughnee AAanhum ma kasaboo shay-an wala maittakhathoo min dooni Allahi awliyaa walahumAAathabun AAatheem
45:10.translation: Before them is Hell, and what they had earned will not avail them at all nor what they had taken besides Allāh as allies. And they will have a great punishment.

45:11.transliteration: Hatha hudan wallatheenakafaroo bi-ayati rabbihim lahum AAathabunmin rijzin aleem
45:11.translation: This [Qur’ān] is guidance. And those who have disbelieved in the verses of their Lord will have a painful punishment of foul nature.

45:12.transliteration: Allahu allathee sakhkharalakumu albahra litajriya alfulku feehi bi-amrihiwalitabtaghoo min fadlihi walaAAallakum tashkuroon
45:12.translation: It is Allāh who subjected to you the sea so that ships may sail upon it by His command and that you may seek of His bounty; and perhaps you will be grateful.

45:13.transliteration: Wasakhkhara lakum ma fee assamawatiwama fee al-ardi jameeAAan minhu inna fee thalikalaayatin liqawmin yatafakkaroon
45:13.translation: And He has subjected to you whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth - all from Him. Indeed in that are signs for a people who give thought.

45:14.transliteration: Qul lillatheena amanooyaghfiroo lillatheena la yarjoona ayyama Allahiliyajziya qawman bima kanoo yaksiboon
45:14.translation: Say, [O Muḥammad], to those who have believed that they [should] forgive those who expect not the days of Allāh [i.e., of His retribution] so that He may recompense a people for what they used to earn.

45:15.transliteration: Man AAamila salihanfalinafsihi waman asaa faAAalayha thumma ilarabbikum turjaAAoon
45:15.translation: Whoever does a good deed - it is for himself; and whoever does evil - it is against it [i.e., the self or soul]. Then to your Lord you will be returned.

45:16.transliteration: Walaqad atayna banee isra-eelaalkitaba walhukma wannubuwwatawarazaqnahum mina attayyibati wafaddalnahumAAala alAAalameen
45:16.translation: And We did certainly give the Children of Israel the Scripture and judgement and prophethood, and We provided them with good things and preferred them over the worlds.

45:17.transliteration: Waataynahum bayyinatinmina al-amri fama ikhtalafoo illa min baAAdi majaahumu alAAilmu baghyan baynahum inna rabbaka yaqdeebaynahum yawma alqiyamati feema kanoo feehiyakhtalifoon
45:17.translation: And We gave them clear proofs of the matter [of religion]. And they did not differ except after knowledge had come to them - out of jealous animosity between themselves. Indeed, your Lord will judge between them on the Day of Resurrection concerning that over which they used to differ.

45:18.transliteration: Thumma jaAAalnaka AAalashareeAAatin mina al-amri fattabiAAha walatattabiAA ahwaa allatheena la yaAAlamoon
45:18.translation: Then We put you, [O Muḥammad], on an ordained way concerning the matter [of religion]; so follow it and do not follow the inclinations of those who do not know.

45:19.transliteration: Innahum lan yughnoo AAanka mina Allahishay-an wa-inna aththalimeena baAAduhumawliyao baAAdin wallahu waliyyualmuttaqeen
45:19.translation: Indeed, they will never avail you against Allāh at all. And indeed, the wrongdoers are allies of one another; but Allāh is the protector of the righteous.

45:20.transliteration: Hatha basa-iru linnasiwahudan warahmatun liqawmin yooqinoon
45:20.translation: This [Qur’ān] is enlightenment for mankind and guidance and mercy for a people who are certain [in faith].

45:21.transliteration: Am hasiba allatheena ijtarahooassayyi-ati an najAAalahum kallatheenaamanoo waAAamiloo assalihati sawaanmahyahum wamamatuhum saa ma yahkumoon
45:21.translation: Or do those who commit evils think We will make them like those who have believed and done righteous deeds - [make them] equal in their life and their death? Evil is that which they judge [i.e., assume].

45:22.transliteration: Wakhalaqa Allahu assamawatiwal-arda bilhaqqi walitujzakullu nafsin bima kasabat wahum la yuthlamoon
45:22.translation: And Allāh created the heavens and earth in truth and so that every soul may be recompensed for what it has earned, and they will not be wronged.

45:23.transliteration: Afaraayta mani ittakhatha ilahahuhawahu waadallahu Allahu AAalaAAilmin wakhatama AAala samAAihi waqalbihi wajaAAala AAalabasarihi ghishawatan faman yahdeehi min baAAdi Allahiafala tathakkaroon
45:23.translation: Have you seen he who has taken as his god his [own] desire, and Allāh has sent him astray due to knowledge and has set a seal upon his hearing and his heart and put over his vision a veil? So who will guide him after Allāh? Then will you not be reminded?

45:24.transliteration: Waqaloo ma hiya illa hayatunaaddunya namootu wanahya wamayuhlikuna illa addahru wama lahum bithalikamin AAilmin in hum illa yathunnoon
45:24.translation: And they say, "There is not but our worldly life; we die and live, and nothing destroys us except time." And they have of that no knowledge; they are only assuming.

45:25.transliteration: Wa-itha tutla AAalayhim ayatunabayyinatin ma kana hujjatahum illaan qaloo i/too bi-aba-ina in kuntum sadiqeen
45:25.translation: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, their argument is only that they say, "Bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful."

45:26.transliteration: Quli Allahu yuhyeekum thummayumeetukum thumma yajmaAAukum ila yawmi alqiyamatila rayba feehi walakinna akthara annasila yaAAlamoon
45:26.translation: Say, "Allāh causes you to live, then causes you to die; then He will assemble you for the Day of Resurrection, about which there is no doubt, but most of the people do not know."

45:27.transliteration: Walillahi mulku assamawatiwal-ardi wayawma taqoomu assaAAatuyawma-ithin yakhsaru almubtiloon
45:27.translation: And to Allāh belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And the Day the Hour appears - that Day the falsifiers will lose.

45:28.transliteration: Watara kulla ommatin jathiyatankullu ommatin tudAAa ila kitabihaalyawma tujzawna ma kuntum taAAmaloon
45:28.translation: And you will see every nation kneeling [from fear]. Every nation will be called to its record [and told], "Today you will be recompensed for what you used to do.

45:29.transliteration: Hatha kitabuna yantiquAAalaykum bilhaqqi inna kunnanastansikhu ma kuntum taAAmaloon
45:29.translation: This, Our record, speaks about you in truth. Indeed, We were having transcribed whatever you used to do."

45:30.transliteration: Faamma allatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati fayudkhiluhumrabbuhum fee rahmatihi thalika huwa alfawzualmubeen
45:30.translation: So as for those who believed and did righteous deeds, their Lord will admit them into His mercy. That is what is the clear attainment.

45:31.transliteration: Waamma allatheena kafarooafalam takun ayatee tutla AAalaykum fastakbartumwakuntum qawman mujrimeen
45:31.translation: But as for those who disbelieved, [it will be said], "Were not Our verses recited to you, but you were arrogant and became a criminal people?

45:32.transliteration: Wa-itha qeela inna waAAda Allahihaqqun wassaAAatu la rayba feehaqultum ma nadree ma assaAAatu in nathunnuilla thannan wama nahnubimustayqineen
45:32.translation: And when it was said, 'Indeed, the promise of Allāh is truth and the Hour [is coming] - no doubt about it,' you said, 'We know not what is the Hour. We assume only assumption, and we are not convinced.'"

45:33.transliteration: Wabada lahum sayyi-atu maAAamiloo wahaqa bihim ma kanoo bihiyastahzi-oon
45:33.translation: And the evil consequences of what they did will appear to them, and they will be enveloped by what they used to ridicule.

45:34.transliteration: Waqeela alyawma nansakum kamanaseetum liqaa yawmikum hatha wama/wakumu annaruwama lakum min nasireen
45:34.translation: And it will be said, "Today We will forget you as you forgot the meeting of this Day of yours, and your refuge is the Fire, and for you there are no helpers.

45:35.transliteration: Thalikum bi-annakumu ittakhathtumayati Allahi huzuwan wagharratkumu alhayatuaddunya falyawma la yukhrajoonaminha wala hum yustaAAtaboon
45:35.translation: That is because you took the verses of Allāh in ridicule, and worldly life deluded you." So that Day they will not be removed from it, nor will they be asked to appease [Allāh].

45:36.transliteration: Falillahi alhamdu rabbi assamawatiwarabbi al-ardi rabbi alAAalameen
45:36.translation: Then, to Allāh belongs [all] praise - Lord of the heavens and Lord of the earth, Lord of the worlds.

45:37.transliteration: Walahu alkibriyao fee assamawatiwal-ardi wahuwa alAAazeezu alhakeem
45:37.translation: And to Him belongs [all] grandeur within the heavens and the earth, and He is the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

46:2.translation: The revelation of the Book is from Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Wise.

46:3.transliteration: Ma khalaqna assamawatiwal-arda wama baynahuma illabilhaqqi waajalin musamman wallatheenakafaroo AAamma onthiroo muAAridoon
46:3.translation: We did not create the heavens and earth and what is between them except in truth and [for] a specified term. But those who disbelieve, from that of which they are warned, are turning away.

46:4.transliteration: Qul araaytum ma tadAAoona min dooniAllahi aroonee matha khalaqoo mina al-ardiam lahum shirkun fee assamawati eetooneebikitabin min qabli hatha aw atharatin minAAilmin in kuntum sadiqeen
46:4.translation: Say, [O Muḥammad], "Have you considered that which you invoke besides Allāh? Show me what they have created of the earth; or did they have partnership in [creation of] the heavens? Bring me a scripture [revealed] before this or a [remaining] trace of knowledge, if you should be truthful."

46:5.transliteration: Waman adallu mimman yadAAoo min dooniAllahi man la yastajeebu lahu ila yawmialqiyamati wahum AAan duAAa-ihim ghafiloon
46:5.translation: And who is more astray than he who invokes besides Allāh those who will not respond to him until the Day of Resurrection [i.e., never], and they, of their invocation, are unaware.

46:6.transliteration: Wa-itha hushira annasukanoo lahum aAAdaan wakanoo biAAibadatihimkafireen
46:6.translation: And when the people are gathered [that Day], they [who were invoked] will be enemies to them, and they will be deniers of their worship.

46:7.transliteration: Wa-itha tutla AAalayhim ayatunabayyinatin qala allatheena kafaroo lilhaqqilamma jaahum hatha sihrun mubeen
46:7.translation: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, those who disbelieve say of the truth when it has come to them, "This is obvious magic."

46:8.transliteration: Am yaqooloona iftarahu qul iniiftaraytuhu fala tamlikoona lee mina Allahi shay-anhuwa aAAlamu bima tufeedoona feehi kafa bihishaheedan baynee wabaynakum wahuwa alghafooru arraheem
46:8.translation: Or do they say, "He has invented it"? Say, "If I have invented it, you will not possess for me [the power of protection] from Allāh at all. He is most knowing of that in which you are involved. Sufficient is He as Witness between me and you, and He is the Forgiving, the Merciful."

46:9.transliteration: Qul ma kuntu bidAAan mina arrusuliwama adree ma yufAAalu bee wala bikum inattabiAAu illa ma yooha ilayya wamaana illa natheerun mubeen
46:9.translation: Say, "I am not something original among the messengers, nor do I know what will be done with me or with you. I only follow that which is revealed to me, and I am not but a clear warner."

46:10.transliteration: Qul araaytum in kana min AAindi Allahiwakafartum bihi washahida shahidun min banee isra-eelaAAala mithlihi faamana wastakbartum innaAllaha la yahdee alqawma aththalimeen
46:10.translation: Say, "Have you considered: if it [i.e., the Qur’ān] was from Allāh, and you disbelieved in it while a witness from the Children of Israel has testified to something similar and believed while you were arrogant...?" Indeed, Allāh does not guide the wrongdoing people.

46:11.transliteration: Waqala allatheena kafaroolillatheena amanoo law kana khayran masabaqoona ilayhi wa-ith lam yahtadoo bihifasayaqooloona hatha ifkun qadeem
46:11.translation: And those who disbelieve say of those who believe, "If it had [truly] been good, they would not have preceded us to it." And when they are not guided by it, they will say, "This is an ancient falsehood."

46:12.transliteration: Wamin qablihi kitabu moosa imamanwarahmatan wahatha kitabun musaddiqunlisanan AAarabiyyan liyunthira allatheena thalamoowabushra lilmuhsineen
46:12.translation: And before it was the scripture of Moses to lead and as a mercy. And this is a confirming Book in an Arabic tongue to warn those who have wronged and as good tidings to the doers of good.

46:13.transliteration: Inna allatheena qaloo rabbunaAllahu thumma istaqamoo fala khawfunAAalayhim wala hum yahzanoon
46:13.translation: Indeed, those who have said, "Our Lord is Allāh," and then remained on a right course - there will be no fear concerning them, nor will they grieve.

46:14.transliteration: Ola-ika as-habualjannati khalideena feeha jazaan bimakanoo yaAAmaloon
46:14.translation: Those are the companions of Paradise, abiding eternally therein as reward for what they used to do.

46:15.transliteration: Wawassayna al-insanabiwalidayhi ihsanan hamalat-hu ommuhukurhan wawadaAAat-hu kurhan wahamluhu wafisaluhuthalathoona shahran hatta ithabalagha ashuddahu wabalagha arbaAAeena sanatan qala rabbiawziAAnee an ashkura niAAmataka allatee anAAamta AAalayya waAAalawalidayya waan aAAmala salihan tardahuwaaslih lee fee thurriyyatee innee tubtuilayka wa-innee mina almuslimeen
46:15.translation: And We have enjoined upon man, to his parents, good treatment. His mother carried him with hardship and gave birth to him with hardship, and his gestation and weaning [period] is thirty months. [He grows] until, when he reaches maturity and reaches [the age of] forty years, he says, "My Lord, enable me to be grateful for Your favor which You have bestowed upon me and upon my parents and to work righteousness of which You will approve and make righteous for me my offspring. Indeed, I have repented to You, and indeed, I am of the Muslims."

46:16.transliteration: Ola-ika allatheena nataqabbaluAAanhum ahsana ma AAamiloo wanatajawazu AAansayyi-atihim fee as-habi aljannati waAAda assidqiallathee kanoo yooAAadoon
46:16.translation: Those are the ones from whom We will accept the best of what they did and overlook their misdeeds, [their being] among the companions of Paradise. [That is] the promise of truth which they had been promised.

46:17.transliteration: Wallathee qala liwalidayhioffin lakuma ataAAidaninee an okhraja waqad khalatialquroonu min qablee wahuma yastagheethani Allahawaylaka amin inna waAAda Allahi haqqunfayaqoolu ma hatha illa asateerual-awwaleen
46:17.translation: But one who says to his parents, "Uff to you; do you promise me that I will be brought forth [from the earth] when generations before me have already passed on [into oblivion]?" while they call to Allāh for help [and to their son], "Woe to you! Believe! Indeed, the promise of Allāh is truth." But he says, "This is not but legends of the former peoples" -

46:18.transliteration: Ola-ika allatheena haqqaAAalayhimu alqawlu fee umamin qad khalat min qablihim minaaljinni wal-insi innahum kanoo khasireen
46:18.translation: Those are the ones upon whom the word [i.e., decree] has come into effect, [who will be] among nations which had passed on before them of jinn and men. Indeed, they [all] were losers.

46:19.transliteration: Walikullin darajatun mimmaAAamiloo waliyuwaffiyahum aAAmalahum wahum la yuthlamoon
46:19.translation: And for all there are degrees [of reward and punishment] for what they have done, and [it is] so that He may fully compensate them for their deeds, and they will not be wronged.

46:20.transliteration: Wayawma yuAAradu allatheenakafaroo AAala annari athhabtum tayyibatikumfee hayatikumu addunya wastamtaAAtumbiha falyawma tujzawna AAathaba alhooni bimakuntum tastakbiroona fee al-ardi bighayri alhaqqiwabima kuntum tafsuqoon
46:20.translation: And the Day those who disbelieved are exposed to the Fire [it will be said], "You exhausted your pleasures during your worldly life and enjoyed them, so this Day you will be awarded the punishment of [extreme] humiliation because you were arrogant upon the earth without right and because you were defiantly disobedient."

46:21.transliteration: Wathkur akha AAadinith anthara qawmahu bil-ahqafiwaqad khalati annuthuru min bayni yadayhi waminkhalfihi alla taAAbudoo illa Allaha inneeakhafu AAalaykum AAathaba yawmin AAatheem
46:21.translation: And mention, [O Muḥammad], the brother of ʿAad, when he warned his people in [the region of] al-Aḥqāf - and warners had already passed on before him and after him - [saying], "Do not worship except Allāh. Indeed, I fear for you the punishment of a terrible day."

46:22.transliteration: Qaloo aji/tana lita/fikanaAAan alihatina fa/tina bima taAAidunain kunta mina assadiqeen
46:22.translation: They said, "Have you come to delude us away from our gods? Then bring us what you promise us, if you should be of the truthful."

46:23.transliteration: Qala innama alAAilmu AAindaAllahi waoballighukum ma orsiltu bihi walakinneearakum qawman tajhaloon
46:23.translation: He said, "Knowledge [of its time] is only with Allāh, and I convey to you that with which I was sent; but I see you [to be] a people behaving ignorantly."

46:24.transliteration: Falamma raawhu AAaridanmustaqbila awdiyatihim qaloo hatha AAaridunmumtiruna bal huwa ma istaAAjaltum bihi reehunfeeha AAathabun aleem
46:24.translation: And when they saw it as a cloud approaching their valleys, they said, "This is a cloud bringing us rain!" Rather, it is that for which you were impatient: a wind, within it a painful punishment,

46:25.transliteration: Tudammiru kulla shay-in bi-amri rabbihafaasbahoo la yura illa masakinuhumkathalika najzee alqawma almujrimeen
46:25.translation: Destroying everything by command of its Lord. And they became so that nothing was seen [of them] except their dwellings. Thus do We recompense the criminal people.

46:26.transliteration: Walaqad makkannahum feema inmakkannakum feehi wajaAAalna lahum samAAan waabsaranwaaf-idatan fama aghna AAanhum samAAuhum walaabsaruhum wala af-idatuhum min shay-in ith kanooyajhadoona bi-ayati Allahi wahaqabihim ma kanoo bihi yastahzi-oon
46:26.translation: And We had certainly established them in such as We have not established you, and We made for them hearing and vision and hearts [i.e., intellect]. But their hearing and vision and hearts availed them not from anything [of the punishment] when they were [continually] rejecting the signs of Allāh; and they were enveloped by what they used to ridicule.

46:27.transliteration: Walaqad ahlakna ma hawlakummina alqura wasarrafna al-ayatilaAAallahum yarjiAAoon
46:27.translation: And We have already destroyed what surrounds you of [those] cities, and We have diversified the signs [or verses] that perhaps they might return [from disbelief].

46:28.transliteration: Falawla nasarahumu allatheenaittakhathoo min dooni Allahi qurbanan alihatanbal dalloo AAanhum wathalika ifkuhum wama kanooyaftaroon
46:28.translation: Then why did those they took besides Allāh as deities by which to approach [Him] not aid them? But they had strayed [i.e., departed] from them. And that was their falsehood and what they were inventing.

46:29.transliteration: Wa-ith sarafna ilaykanafaran mina aljinni yastamiAAoona alqur-ana falammahadaroohu qaloo ansitoo falammaqudiya wallaw ila qawmihim munthireen
46:29.translation: And [mention, O Muḥammad], when We directed to you a few of the jinn, listening to the Qur’ān. And when they attended it, they said, "Listen attentively." And when it was concluded, they went back to their people as warners.

46:30.transliteration: Qaloo ya qawmana innasamiAAna kitaban onzila min baAAdi moosa musaddiqanlima bayna yadayhi yahdee ila alhaqqi wa-ilatareeqin mustaqeem
46:30.translation: They said, "O our people, indeed we have heard a [recited] Book revealed after Moses confirming what was before it which guides to the truth and to a straight path.

46:31.transliteration: Ya qawmana ajeeboo daAAiyaAllahi waaminoo bihi yaghfir lakum min thunoobikumwayujirkum min AAathabin aleem
46:31.translation: O our people, respond to the Caller [i.e., Messenger] of Allāh and believe in him; He [i.e., Allāh] will forgive for you your sins and protect you from a painful punishment.

46:32.transliteration: Waman la yujib daAAiya Allahifalaysa bimuAAjizin fee al-ardi walaysa lahu min doonihiawliyaa ola-ika fee dalalin mubeen
46:32.translation: But he who does not respond to the Caller of Allāh will not cause failure [to Him] upon earth, and he will not have besides Him any protectors. Those are in manifest error."

46:33.transliteration: Awa lam yaraw anna Allaha allatheekhalaqa assamawati wal-ardawalam yaAAya bikhalqihinna biqadirin AAala an yuhyiyaalmawta bala innahu AAala kulli shay-inqadeer
46:33.translation: Do they not see that Allāh, who created the heavens and earth and did not fail in their creation, is able to give life to the dead? Yes. Indeed, He is over all things competent.

46:34.transliteration: Wayawma yuAAradu allatheenakafaroo AAala annari alaysa hatha bilhaqqiqaloo bala warabbina qala fathooqooalAAathaba bima kuntum takfuroon
46:34.translation: And the Day those who disbelieved are exposed to the Fire [it will be said], "Is this not the truth?" They will say, "Yes, by our Lord." He will say, "Then taste the punishment for what you used to deny."

46:35.transliteration: Fasbir kama sabaraoloo alAAazmi mina arrusuli wala tastaAAjil lahumkaannahum yawma yarawna ma yooAAadoona lam yalbathoo illasaAAatan min naharin balaghun fahal yuhlakuilla alqawmu alfasiqoon
46:35.translation: So be patient, [O Muḥammad], as were those of determination among the messengers and do not be impatient for them. It will be - on the Day they see that which they are promised - as though they had not remained [in the world] except an hour of a day. [This is] notification. And will [any] be destroyed except the defiantly disobedient people?

47:1.transliteration: Allatheena kafaroo wasaddooAAan sabeeli Allahi adalla aAAmalahum
47:1.translation: Those who disbelieve and avert [people] from the way of Allāh - He will waste their deeds.

47:2.transliteration: Wallatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati waamanoo bimanuzzila AAala muhammadin wahuwa alhaqqu minrabbihim kaffara AAanhum sayyi-atihim waaslahabalahum
47:2.translation: And those who believe and do righteous deeds and believe in what has been sent down upon Muḥammad - and it is the truth from their Lord - He will remove from them their misdeeds and amend their condition.

47:3.transliteration: Thalika bi-anna allatheenakafaroo ittabaAAoo albatila waanna allatheena amanooittabaAAoo alhaqqa min rabbihim kathalika yadribuAllahu linnasi amthalahum
47:3.translation: That is because those who disbelieve follow falsehood, and those who believe follow the truth from their Lord. Thus does Allāh present to the people their comparisons.

47:4.transliteration: Fa-itha laqeetumu allatheenakafaroo fadarba arriqabi hattaitha athkhantumoohum fashuddoo alwathaqa fa-immamannan baAAdu wa-imma fidaan hatta tadaAAaalharbu awzaraha thalika walaw yashaoAllahu lantasara minhum walakinliyabluwa baAAdakum bibaAAdin wallatheenaqutiloo fee sabeeli Allahi falan yudillaaAAmalahum
47:4.translation: So when you meet those who disbelieve [in battle], strike [their] necks until, when you have inflicted slaughter upon them, then secure [their] bonds, and either [confer] favor afterwards or ransom [them] until the war lays down its burdens. That [is the command]. And if Allāh had willed, He could have taken vengeance upon them [Himself], but [He ordered armed struggle] to test some of you by means of others. And those who are killed in the cause of Allāh - never will He waste their deeds.

47:5.translation: He will guide them and amend their condition

47:6.translation: And admit them to Paradise, which He has made known to them.

47:7.transliteration: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanooin tansuroo Allaha yansurkum wayuthabbit aqdamakum
47:7.translation: O you who have believed, if you support Allāh, He will support you and plant firmly your feet.

47:8.translation: But those who disbelieve - for them is misery, and He will waste their deeds.

47:9.transliteration: Thalika bi-annahum karihoo maanzala Allahu faahbata aAAmalahum
47:9.translation: That is because they disliked what Allāh revealed, so He rendered worthless their deeds.

47:10.transliteration: Afalam yaseeroo fee al-ardi fayanthurookayfa kana AAaqibatu allatheena min qablihimdammara Allahu AAalayhim walilkafireena amthaluha
47:10.translation: Have they not traveled through the land and seen how was the end of those before them? Allāh destroyed [everything] over them, and for the disbelievers is something comparable.

47:11.transliteration: Thalika bi-anna Allaha mawlaallatheena amanoo waanna alkafireena lamawla lahum
47:11.translation: That is because Allāh is the protector of those who have believed and because the disbelievers have no protector.

47:12.transliteration: Inna Allaha yudkhilu allatheenaamanoo waAAamiloo assalihati jannatintajree min tahtiha al-anharu wallatheenakafaroo yatamattaAAoona waya/kuloona kama ta/kulu al-anAAamuwannaru mathwan lahum
47:12.translation: Indeed, Allāh will admit those who have believed and done righteous deeds to gardens beneath which rivers flow, but those who disbelieve enjoy themselves and eat as grazing livestock eat, and the Fire will be a residence for them.

47:13.transliteration: Wakaayyin min qaryatin hiya ashaddu quwwatanmin qaryatika allatee akhrajatka ahlaknahum fala nasiralahum
47:13.translation: And how many a city was stronger than your city [i.e., Makkah] which drove you out? We destroyed them; and there was no helper for them.

47:14.transliteration: Afaman kana AAala bayyinatinmin rabbihi kaman zuyyina lahu soo-o AAamalihi wattabaAAooahwaahum
47:14.translation: So is he who is on clear evidence from his Lord like him to whom the evil of his work has been made attractive and they follow their [own] desires?

47:15.transliteration: Mathalu aljannati allatee wuAAidaalmuttaqoona feeha anharun min ma-in ghayri asininwaanharun min labanin lam yataghayyar taAAmuhuwaanharun min khamrin laththatin lishsharibeenawaanharun min AAasalin musaffan walahum feehamin kulli aththamarati wamaghfiratun min rabbihimkaman huwa khalidun fee annari wasuqoo maanhameeman faqattaAAa amAAaahum
47:15.translation: Is the description of Paradise, which the righteous are promised, wherein are rivers of water unaltered, rivers of milk the taste of which never changes, rivers of wine delicious to those who drink, and rivers of purified honey, in which they will have from all [kinds of] fruits and forgiveness from their Lord... [Are its inhabitants] like those who abide eternally in the Fire and are given to drink scalding water that will sever their intestines?

47:16.transliteration: Waminhum man yastamiAAu ilayka hattaitha kharajoo min AAindika qaloo lillatheenaootoo alAAilma matha qala anifan ola-ikaallatheena tabaAAa Allahu AAalaquloobihim wattabaAAoo ahwaahum
47:16.translation: And among them, [O Muḥammad], are those who listen to you, until when they depart from you, they say to those who were given knowledge, "What has he said just now?" Those are the ones of whom Allāh has sealed over their hearts and who have followed their [own] desires.

47:17.translation: And those who are guided - He increases them in guidance and gives them their righteousness.

47:18.transliteration: Fahal yanthuroona illaassaAAata an ta/tiyahum baghtatan faqad jaaashratuha faanna lahum itha jaat-humthikrahum
47:18.translation: Then do they await except that the Hour should come upon them unexpectedly? But already there have come [some of] its indications. Then how [i.e., what good] to them, when it has come, will be their remembrance?

47:19.transliteration: FaAAlam annahu la ilahailla Allahu wastaghfir lithanbikawalilmu/mineena walmu/minati wallahuyaAAlamu mutaqallabakum wamathwakum
47:19.translation: So know, [O Muḥammad], that there is no deity except Allāh and ask forgiveness for your sin and for the believing men and believing women. And Allāh knows of your movement and your resting place.

47:20.transliteration: Wayaqoolu allatheena amanoolawla nuzzilat sooratun fa-itha onzilat sooratun muhkamatunwathukira feeha alqitalu raayta allatheenafee quloobihim maradun yanthuroona ilayka natharaalmaghshiyyi AAalayhi mina almawti faawla lahum
47:20.translation: Those who believe say, "Why has a sūrah not been sent down?" But when a precise sūrah is revealed and battle is mentioned therein, you see those in whose hearts is disease [i.e., hypocrisy] looking at you with a look of one overcome by death. And more appropriate for them [would have been]

47:21.transliteration: TaAAatun waqawlun maAAroofun fa-ithaAAazama al-amru falaw sadaqoo Allaha lakanakhayran lahum
47:21.translation: Obedience and good words. And when the matter [of fighting] was determined, if they had been true to Allāh, it would have been better for them.

47:22.transliteration: Fahal AAasaytum in tawallaytum an tufsidoofee al-ardi watuqattiAAoo arhamakum
47:22.translation: So would you perhaps, if you turned away, cause corruption on earth and sever your [ties of] relationship?

47:23.transliteration: Ola-ika allatheena laAAanahumuAllahu faasammahum waaAAma absarahum
47:23.translation: Those [who do so] are the ones that Allāh has cursed, so He deafened them and blinded their vision.

47:24.transliteration: Afala yatadabbaroona alqur-anaam AAala quloobin aqfaluha
47:24.translation: Then do they not reflect upon the Qur’ān, or are there locks upon [their] hearts?

47:25.transliteration: Inna allatheena irtaddoo AAalaadbarihim min baAAdi ma tabayyana lahumu alhudaashshaytanu sawwala lahum waamla lahum
47:25.translation: Indeed, those who reverted back [to disbelief] after guidance had become clear to them - Satan enticed them and prolonged hope for them.

47:26.transliteration: Thalika bi-annahum qaloo lillatheenakarihoo ma nazzala Allahu sanuteeAAukum feebaAAdi al-amri wallahu yaAAlamu israrahum
47:26.translation: That is because they said to those who disliked what Allāh sent down, "We will obey you in part of the matter." And Allāh knows what they conceal.

47:27.transliteration: Fakayfa itha tawaffat-humu almala-ikatuyadriboona wujoohahum waadbarahum
47:27.translation: Then how [will it be] when the angels take them in death, striking their faces and their backs?

47:28.transliteration: Thalika bi-annahumu ittabaAAoo maaskhata Allaha wakarihoo ridwanahufaahbata aAAmalahum
47:28.translation: That is because they followed what angered Allāh and disliked [what earns] His pleasure, so He rendered worthless their deeds.

47:29.transliteration: Am hasiba allatheena feequloobihim maradun an lan yukhrija Allahu adghanahum
47:29.translation: Or do those in whose hearts is disease think that Allāh would never expose their [feelings of] hatred?

47:30.transliteration: Walaw nashao laaraynakahumfalaAAaraftahum biseemahum walataAArifannahum fee lahnialqawli wallahu yaAAlamu aAAmalakum
47:30.translation: And if We willed, We could show them to you, and you would know them by their mark; but you will surely know them by the tone of [their] speech. And Allāh knows your deeds.

47:31.transliteration: Walanabluwannakum hattanaAAlama almujahideena minkum wassabireenawanabluwa akhbarakum
47:31.translation: And We will surely test you until We make evident those who strive among you [for the cause of Allāh] and the patient, and We will test your affairs.

47:32.transliteration: Inna allatheena kafaroo wasaddooAAan sabeeli Allahi washaqqoo arrasoola minbaAAdi ma tabayyana lahumu alhuda lan yadurooAllaha shay-an wasayuhbitu aAAmalahum
47:32.translation: Indeed, those who disbelieved and averted [people] from the path of Allāh and opposed the Messenger after guidance had become clear to them - never will they harm Allāh at all, and He will render worthless their deeds.

47:33.transliteration: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanooateeAAoo Allaha waateeAAoo arrasoolawala tubtiloo aAAmalakum
47:33.translation: O you who have believed, obey Allāh and obey the Messenger and do not invalidate your deeds.

47:34.transliteration: Inna allatheena kafaroo wasaddooAAan sabeeli Allahi thumma matoo wahum kuffarunfalan yaghfira Allahu lahum
47:34.translation: Indeed, those who disbelieved and averted [people] from the path of Allāh and then died while they were disbelievers - never will Allāh forgive them.

47:35.transliteration: Fala tahinoo watadAAoo ila assalmiwaantumu al-aAAlawna wallahu maAAakum walanyatirakum aAAmalakum
47:35.translation: So do not weaken and call for peace while you are superior; and Allāh is with you and will never deprive you of [the reward of] your deeds.

47:36.transliteration: Innama alhayatu addunyalaAAibun walahwun wa-in tu/minoo watattaqoo yu/tikum ojoorakumwala yas-alkum amwalakum
47:36.translation: [This] worldly life is only amusement and diversion. And if you believe and fear Allāh, He will give you your rewards and not ask you for your properties.

47:37.translation: If He should ask you for them and press you, you would withhold, and He would expose your hatred [i.e., unwillingness].

47:38.transliteration: Ha antum haola-itudAAawna litunfiqoo fee sabeeli Allahi faminkum manyabkhalu waman yabkhal fa-innama yabkhalu AAan nafsihi wallahualghaniyyu waantumu alfuqarao wa-in tatawallaw yastabdilqawman ghayrakum thumma la yakoonoo amthalakum
47:38.translation: Here you are - those invited to spend in the cause of Allāh - but among you are those who withhold [out of greed]. And whoever withholds only withholds [benefit] from himself; and Allāh is the Free of need, while you are the needy. And if you turn away [i.e., refuse], He will replace you with another people; then they will not be the likes of you.

48:1.translation: Indeed, We have given you, [O Muḥammad], a clear conquest

48:2.transliteration: Liyaghfira laka Allahu mataqaddama min thanbika wama taakhkhara wayutimmaniAAmatahu AAalayka wayahdiyaka siratan mustaqeema
48:2.translation: That Allāh may forgive for you what preceded of your sin [i.e., errors] and what will follow and complete His favor upon you and guide you to a straight path

48:3.translation: And [that] Allāh may aid you with a mighty victory.

48:4.transliteration: Huwa allathee anzala assakeenatafee quloobi almu/mineena liyazdadoo eemanan maAAaeemanihim walillahi junoodu assamawatiwal-ardi wakana Allahu AAaleeman hakeema
48:4.translation: It is He who sent down tranquility into the hearts of the believers that they would increase in faith along with their [present] faith. And to Allāh belong the soldiers of the heavens and the earth, and ever is Allāh Knowing and Wise.

48:5.transliteration: Liyudkhila almu/mineena walmu/minatijannatin tajree min tahtiha al-anharukhalideena feeha wayukaffira AAanhum sayyi-atihimwakana thalika AAinda Allahi fawzan AAatheema
48:5.translation: [And] that He may admit the believing men and the believing women to gardens beneath which rivers flow to abide therein eternally and remove from them their misdeeds - and ever is that, in the sight of Allāh, a great attainment

48:6.transliteration: WayuAAaththiba almunafiqeena walmunafiqatiwalmushrikeena walmushrikati aththanneenabillahi thanna assaw-iAAalayhim da-iratu assaw-i waghadiba AllahuAAalayhim walaAAanahum waaAAadda lahum jahannama wasaat maseera
48:6.translation: And [that] He may punish the hypocrite men and hypocrite women, and the polytheist men and polytheist women - those who assume about Allāh an assumption of evil nature. Upon them is a misfortune of evil nature; and Allāh has become angry with them and has cursed them and prepared for them Hell, and evil it is as a destination.

48:7.transliteration: Walillahi junoodu assamawatiwal-ardi wakana Allahu AAazeezan hakeema
48:7.translation: And to Allāh belong the soldiers of the heavens and the earth. And ever is Allāh Exalted in Might and Wise.

48:8.translation: Indeed, We have sent you as a witness and a bringer of good tidings and a warner

48:9.transliteration: Litu/minoo billahi warasoolihiwatuAAazziroohu watuwaqqiroohu watusabbihoohu bukratan waaseela
48:9.translation: That you [people] may believe in Allāh and His Messenger and honor him and respect him [i.e., the Prophet (ﷺ)] and exalt Him [i.e., Allāh] morning and afternoon.

48:10.transliteration: Inna allatheena yubayiAAoonakainnama yubayiAAoona Allaha yadu Allahifawqa aydeehim faman nakatha fa-innama yankuthu AAalanafsihi waman awfa bima AAahada AAalayhu Allahafasayu/teehi ajran AAatheema
48:10.translation: Indeed, those who pledge allegiance to you, [O Muḥammad] - they are actually pledging allegiance to Allāh. The hand of Allāh is over their hands. So he who breaks his word only breaks it to the detriment of himself. And he who fulfills that which he has promised Allāh - He will give him a great reward.

48:11.transliteration: Sayaqoolu laka almukhallafoona mina al-aAArabishaghalatna amwaluna waahloona fastaghfirlana yaqooloona bi-alsinatihim ma laysa feequloobihim qul faman yamliku lakum mina Allahi shay-an inarada bikum darran aw arada bikum nafAAanbal kana Allahu bima taAAmaloona khabeera
48:11.translation: Those who remained behind of the bedouins will say to you, "Our properties and our families occupied us, so ask forgiveness for us." They say with their tongues what is not within their hearts. Say, "Then who could prevent Allāh at all if He intended for you harm or intended for you benefit? Rather, ever is Allāh, of what you do, Aware.

48:12.transliteration: Bal thanantum an lan yanqalibaarrasoolu walmu/minoona ila ahleehimabadan wazuyyina thalika fee quloobikum wathanantumthanna assaw-i wakuntum qawman boora
48:12.translation: But you thought that the Messenger and the believers would never return to their families, ever, and that was made pleasing in your hearts. And you assumed an assumption of evil and became a people ruined."

48:13.transliteration: Waman lam yu/min billahiwarasoolihi fa-inna aAAtadna lilkafireenasaAAeera
48:13.translation: And whoever has not believed in Allāh and His Messenger - then indeed, We have prepared for the disbelievers a Blaze.

48:14.transliteration: Walillahi mulku assamawatiwal-ardi yaghfiru liman yashao wayuAAaththibuman yashao wakana Allahu ghafooran raheema
48:14.translation: And to Allāh belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. He forgives whom He wills and punishes whom He wills. And ever is Allāh Forgiving and Merciful.

48:15.transliteration: Sayaqoolu almukhallafoona itha intalaqtumila maghanima lita/khuthooha tharoonanattabiAAkum yureedoona an yubaddiloo kalama Allahiqul lan tattabiAAoona kathalikum qala Allahumin qablu fasayaqooloona bal tahsudoonana bal kanoola yafqahoona illa qaleela
48:15.translation: Those who remained behind will say when you set out toward the war booty to take it, "Let us follow you." They wish to change the words of Allāh. Say, "Never will you follow us. Thus did Allāh say before." So they will say, "Rather, you envy us." But [in fact] they were not understanding except a little.

48:16.transliteration: Qul lilmukhallafeena mina al-aAArabisatudAAawna ila qawmin olee ba/sin shadeedin tuqatiloonahumaw yuslimoona fa-in tuteeAAoo yu/tikumu Allahuajran hasanan wa-in tatawallaw kama tawallaytum minqablu yuAAaththibkum AAathaban aleema
48:16.translation: Say to those who remained behind of the bedouins, "You will be called to [face] a people of great military might; you may fight them, or they will submit. So if you obey, Allāh will give you a good reward; but if you turn away as you turned away before, He will punish you with a painful punishment."

48:17.transliteration: Laysa AAala al-aAAma harajunwala AAala al-aAAraji harajun walaAAala almareedi harajun waman yutiAAiAllaha warasoolahu yudkhilhu jannatin tajree min tahtihaal-anharu waman yatawalla yuAAaththibhu AAathabanaleema
48:17.translation: There is not upon the blind any guilt or upon the lame any guilt or upon the ill any guilt [for remaining behind]. And whoever obeys Allāh and His Messenger - He will admit him to gardens beneath which rivers flow; but whoever turns away - He will punish him with a painful punishment.

48:18.transliteration: Laqad radiya Allahu AAanialmu/mineena ith yubayiAAoonaka tahta ashshajaratifaAAalima ma fee quloobihim faanzala asakeenataAAalayhim waathabahum fathan qareeba
48:18.translation: Certainly was Allāh pleased with the believers when they pledged allegiance to you, [O Muḥammad], under the tree, and He knew what was in their hearts, so He sent down tranquility upon them and rewarded them with an imminent conquest

48:19.transliteration: Wamaghanima katheeratan ya/khuthoonahawakana Allahu AAazeezan hakeema
48:19.translation: And much war booty which they will take. And ever is Allāh Exalted in Might and Wise.

48:20.transliteration: WaAAadakumu Allahu maghanimakatheeratan ta/khuthoonaha faAAajjala lakum hathihiwakaffa aydiya annasi AAankum walitakoona ayatanlilmu/mineena wayahdiyakum siratan mustaqeema
48:20.translation: Allāh has promised you much booty that you will take [in the future] and has hastened for you this [victory] and withheld the hands of people from you - that it may be a sign for the believers and [that] He may guide you to a straight path.

48:21.transliteration: Waokhra lam taqdiroo AAalayhaqad ahata Allahu biha wakana AllahuAAala kulli shay-in qadeera
48:21.translation: And [He promises] other [victories] that you were [so far] unable to [realize] which Allāh has already encompassed. And ever is Allāh, over all things, competent.

48:22.transliteration: Walaw qatalakumu allatheenakafaroo lawallawoo al-adbara thumma la yajidoonawaliyyan wala naseera
48:22.translation: And if those [Makkans] who disbelieve had fought you, they would have turned their backs [in flight]. Then they would not find a protector or a helper.

48:23.transliteration: Sunnata Allahi allatee qad khalat minqablu walan tajida lisunnati Allahi tabdeela
48:23.translation: [This is] the established way of Allāh which has occurred before. And never will you find in the way of Allāh any change.

48:24.transliteration: Wahuwa allathee kaffa aydiyahumAAankum waaydiyakum AAanhum bibatni makkata min baAAdi anathfarakum AAalayhim wakana Allahubima taAAmaloona baseera
48:24.translation: And it is He who withheld their hands from you and your hands from them within [the area of] Makkah after He caused you to overcome them. And ever is Allāh, of what you do, Seeing.

48:25.transliteration: Humu allatheena kafaroo wasaddookumAAani almasjidi alharami walhadyamaAAkoofan an yablugha mahillahu walawla rijalunmu/minoona wanisaon mu/minatun lam taAAlamoohum antataoohum fatuseebakum minhum maAAarratun bighayriAAilmin liyudkhila Allahu fee rahmatihi man yashaolaw tazayyaloo laAAaththabna allatheenakafaroo minhum AAathaban aleema
48:25.translation: They are the ones who disbelieved and obstructed you from al-Masjid al-Ḥarām while the offering was prevented from reaching its place of sacrifice. And if not for believing men and believing women whom you did not know - that you might trample [i.e., kill] them and there would befall you because of them dishonor without [your] knowledge - [you would have been permitted to enter Makkah]. [This was so] that Allāh might admit to His mercy whom He willed. If they had been apart [from them], We would have punished those who disbelieved among them with painful punishment

48:26.transliteration: Ith jaAAala allatheena kafaroofee quloobihimu alhamiyyata hamiyyata aljahiliyyatifaanzala Allahu sakeenatahu AAala rasoolihi waAAalaalmu/mineena waalzamahum kalimata attaqwa wakanooahaqqa biha waahlaha wakana Allahubikulli shay-in AAaleema
48:26.translation: When those who disbelieved had put into their hearts chauvinism - the chauvinism of the time of ignorance. But Allāh sent down His tranquility upon His Messenger and upon the believers and imposed upon them the word of righteousness, and they were more deserving of it and worthy of it. And ever is Allāh, of all things, Knowing.

48:27.transliteration: Laqad sadaqa Allahu rasoolahuarru/ya bilhaqqi latadkhulunnaalmasjida alharama in shaa Allahu amineenamuhalliqeena ruoosakum wamuqassireena latakhafoona faAAalima ma lam taAAlamoo fajaAAala mindooni thalika fathan qareeba
48:27.translation: Certainly has Allāh showed to His Messenger the vision [i.e., dream] in truth. You will surely enter al-Masjid al-Ḥarām, if Allāh wills, in safety, with your heads shaved and [hair] shortened, not fearing [anyone]. He knew what you did not know and has arranged before that a conquest near [at hand].

48:28.transliteration: Huwa allathee arsala rasoolahu bilhudawadeeni alhaqqi liyuthhirahu AAala addeenikullihi wakafa billahi shaheeda
48:28.translation: It is He who sent His Messenger with guidance and the religion of truth to manifest it over all religion. And sufficient is Allāh as Witness.

48:29.transliteration: Muhammadun rasoolu Allahi wallatheenamaAAahu ashiddao AAala alkuffari ruhamaobaynahum tarahum rukkaAAan sujjadan yabtaghoona fadlanmina Allahi waridwanan seemahum feewujoohihim min athari assujoodi thalika mathaluhumfee attawrati wamathaluhum fee al-injeelikazarAAin akhraja shat-ahu faazarahu fastaghlathafastawa AAala sooqihi yuAAjibu azzurraAAaliyagheetha bihimu alkuffara waAAada Allahuallatheena amanoo waAAamiloo assalihatiminhum maghfiratan waajran AAatheema
48:29.translation: Muḥammad is the Messenger of Allāh; and those with him are forceful against the disbelievers, merciful among themselves. You see them bowing and prostrating [in prayer], seeking bounty from Allāh and [His] pleasure. Their sign is in their faces from the effect of prostration [i.e., prayer]. That is their description in the Torah. And their description in the Gospel is as a plant which produces its offshoots and strengthens them so they grow firm and stand upon their stalks, delighting the sowers - so that He [i.e., Allāh] may enrage by them the disbelievers. Allāh has promised those who believe and do righteous deeds among them forgiveness and a great reward.

49:1.transliteration: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoola tuqaddimoo bayna yadayi Allahi warasoolihi wattaqooAllaha inna Allaha sameeAAun AAaleem
49:1.translation: O you who have believed, do not put [yourselves] before Allāh and His Messenger but fear Allāh. Indeed, Allāh is Hearing and Knowing.

49:2.transliteration: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoola tarfaAAoo aswatakum fawqa sawti annabiyyiwala tajharoo lahu bilqawli kajahri baAAdikumlibaAAdin an tahbata aAAmalukumwaantum la tashAAuroon
49:2.translation: O you who have believed, do not raise your voices above the voice of the Prophet or be loud to him in speech like the loudness of some of you to others, lest your deeds become worthless while you perceive not.

49:3.transliteration: Inna allatheena yaghuddoona aswatahumAAinda rasooli Allahi ola-ika allatheenaimtahana Allahu quloobahum littaqwalahum maghfiratun waajrun AAatheem
49:3.translation: Indeed, those who lower their voices before the Messenger of Allāh - they are the ones whose hearts Allāh has tested for righteousness. For them is forgiveness and great reward.

49:4.transliteration: Inna allatheena yunadoonaka minwara-i alhujurati aktharuhum layaAAqiloon
49:4.translation: Indeed, those who call you, [O Muḥammad], from behind the chambers - most of them do not use reason.

49:5.transliteration: Walaw annahum sabaroo hattatakhruja ilayhim lakana khayran lahum wallahughafoorun raheem
49:5.translation: And if they had been patient until you [could] come out to them, it would have been better for them. But Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful.

49:6.transliteration: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanooin jaakum fasiqun binaba-in fatabayyanoo an tuseebooqawman bijahalatin fatusbihoo AAala mafaAAaltum nadimeen
49:6.translation: O you who have believed, if there comes to you a disobedient one with information, investigate, lest you harm a people out of ignorance and become, over what you have done, regretful.

49:7.transliteration: WaAAlamoo anna feekum rasoola Allahilaw yuteeAAukum fee katheerin mina al-amri laAAanittum walakinnaAllaha habbaba ilaykumu al-eemanawazayyanahu fee quloobikum wakarraha ilaykumu alkufra walfusooqawalAAisyana ola-ika humu arrashidoon
49:7.translation: And know that among you is the Messenger of Allāh. If he were to obey you in much of the matter, you would be in difficulty, but Allāh has endeared to you the faith and has made it pleasing in your hearts and has made hateful to you disbelief, defiance and disobedience. Those are the [rightly] guided.

49:8.transliteration: Fadlan mina Allahi waniAAmatanwallahu AAaleemun hakeem
49:8.translation: [It is] as bounty from Allāh and favor. And Allāh is Knowing and Wise.

49:9.transliteration: Wa-in ta-ifatani minaalmu/mineena iqtataloo faaslihoo baynahumafa-in baghat ihdahuma AAala al-okhrafaqatiloo allatee tabghee hatta tafee-a ilaamri Allahi fa-in faat faaslihoobaynahuma bilAAadli waaqsitoo inna Allahayuhibbu almuqsiteen
49:9.translation: And if two factions among the believers should fight, then make settlement between the two. But if one of them oppresses the other, then fight against the one that oppresses until it returns to the ordinance of Allāh. And if it returns, then make settlement between them in justice and act justly. Indeed, Allāh loves those who act justly.

49:10.transliteration: Innama almu/minoona ikhwatun faaslihoobayna akhawaykum wattaqoo Allaha laAAallakum turhamoon
49:10.translation: The believers are but brothers, so make settlement between your brothers. And fear Allāh that you may receive mercy.

49:11.transliteration: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanoola yaskhar qawmun min qawmin AAasa an yakoonookhayran minhum wala nisaon min nisa-in AAasaan yakunna khayran minhunna wala talmizoo anfusakum walatanabazoo bil-alqabi bi/sa al-ismualfusooqu baAAda al-eemani waman lam yatub faola-ikahumu aththalimoon
49:11.translation: O you who have believed, let not a people ridicule [another] people; perhaps they may be better than them; nor let women ridicule [other] women; perhaps they may be better than them. And do not insult one another and do not call each other by [offensive] nicknames. Wretched is the name [i.e., mention] of disobedience after [one's] faith. And whoever does not repent - then it is those who are the wrongdoers.

49:12.transliteration: Ya ayyuha allatheena amanooijtaniboo katheeran mina aththanni innabaAAda aththanni ithmun walatajassasoo wala yaghtab baAAdukum baAAdanayuhibbu ahadukum an ya/kula lahma akheehimaytan fakarihtumoohu wattaqoo Allaha inna Allahatawwabun raheem
49:12.translation: O you who have believed, avoid much [negative] assumption. Indeed, some assumption is sin. And do not spy or backbite each other. Would one of you like to eat the flesh of his brother when dead? You would detest it. And fear Allāh; indeed, Allāh is Accepting of Repentance and Merciful.

49:13.transliteration: Ya ayyuha annasuinna khalaqnakum min thakarin waonthawajaAAalnakum shuAAooban waqaba-ila litaAAarafooinna akramakum AAinda Allahi atqakum inna AllahaAAaleemun khabeer
49:13.translation: O mankind, indeed We have created you from male and female and made you peoples and tribes that you may know one another. Indeed, the most noble of you in the sight of Allāh is the most righteous of you. Indeed, Allāh is Knowing and Aware.

49:14.transliteration: Qalati al-aAArabu amannaqul lam tu/minoo walakin qooloo aslamna walammayadkhuli al-eemanu fee quloobikum wa-in tuteeAAooAllaha warasoolahu la yalitkum min aAAmalikumshay-an inna Allaha ghafoorun raheem
49:14.translation: The bedouins say, "We have believed." Say, "You have not [yet] believed; but say [instead], 'We have submitted,' for faith has not yet entered your hearts. And if you obey Allāh and His Messenger, He will not deprive you from your deeds of anything. Indeed, Allāh is Forgiving and Merciful."

49:15.transliteration: Innama almu/minoona allatheenaamanoo billahi warasoolihi thumma lam yartaboowajahadoo bi-amwalihim waanfusihim fee sabeeli Allahiola-ika humu assadiqoon
49:15.translation: The believers are only the ones who have believed in Allāh and His Messenger and then doubt not but strive with their properties and their lives in the cause of Allāh. It is those who are the truthful.

49:16.transliteration: Qul atuAAallimoona Allaha bideenikumwallahu yaAAlamu ma fee assamawatiwama fee al-ardi wallahu bikullishay-in AAaleem
49:16.translation: Say, "Would you acquaint Allāh with your religion while Allāh knows whatever is in the heavens and whatever is on the earth, and Allāh is Knowing of all things?"

49:17.transliteration: Yamunnoona AAalayka an aslamoo qul latamunnoo AAalayya islamakum bali Allahu yamunnuAAalaykum an hadakum lil-eemani in kuntum sadiqeen
49:17.translation: They consider it a favor to you that they have accepted Islām. Say, "Do not consider your Islām a favor to me. Rather, Allāh has conferred favor upon you that He has guided you to the faith, if you should be truthful."

49:18.transliteration: Inna Allaha yaAAlamu ghayba assamawatiwal-ardi wallahu baseerunbima taAAmaloon
49:18.translation: Indeed, Allāh knows the unseen [aspects] of the heavens and the earth. And Allāh is Seeing of what you do.

50:2.transliteration: Bal AAajiboo an jaahum munthirunminhum faqala alkafiroona hatha shay-onAAajeeb
50:2.translation: But they wonder that there has come to them a warner from among themselves, and the disbelievers say, "This is an amazing thing.

50:3.transliteration: A-itha mitna wakunna turabanthalika rajAAun baAAeed
50:3.translation: When we have died and have become dust, [we will return to life]? That is a distant [i.e., unlikely] return."

50:4.transliteration: Qad AAalimna ma tanqusual-ardu minhum waAAindana kitabun hafeeth
50:4.translation: We know what the earth diminishes [i.e., consumes] of them, and with Us is a retaining record.

50:5.transliteration: Bal kaththaboo bilhaqqilamma jaahum fahum fee amrin mareej
50:5.translation: But they denied the truth when it came to them, so they are in a confused condition.

50:6.transliteration: Afalam yanthuroo ila assama-ifawqahum kayfa banaynaha wazayyannahawama laha min furooj
50:6.translation: Have they not looked at the heaven above them - how We structured it and adorned it and [how] it has no rifts?

50:7.transliteration: Wal-arda madadnahawaalqayna feeha rawasiya waanbatnafeeha min kulli zawjin baheej
50:7.translation: And the earth - We spread it out and cast therein firmly set mountains and made grow therein [something] of every beautiful kind,

50:8.translation: Giving insight and a reminder for every servant who turns [to Allāh].

50:9.transliteration: Wanazzalna mina assama-imaan mubarakan faanbatna bihi jannatinwahabba alhaseed
50:9.translation: And We have sent down blessed rain from the sky and made grow thereby gardens and grain from the harvest

50:10.translation: And lofty palm trees having fruit arranged in layers -

50:11.transliteration: Rizqan lilAAibadi waahyaynabihi baldatan maytan kathalika alkhurooj
50:11.translation: As provision for the servants, and We have given life thereby to a dead land. Thus is the emergence [i.e., resurrection].

50:12.transliteration: Kaththabat qablahum qawmu noohinwaas-habu arrassi wathamood
50:12.translation: The people of Noah denied before them, and the companions of the well and Thamūd

50:13.translation: And ʿAad and Pharaoh and the brothers [i.e., people] of Lot

50:14.transliteration: Waas-habu al-aykati waqawmutubbaAAin kullun kaththaba arrusula fahaqqawaAAeed
50:14.translation: And the companions of the thicket and the people of Tubbaʿ. All denied the messengers, so My threat was justly fulfilled.

50:15.transliteration: AfaAAayeena bilkhalqial-awwali bal hum fee labsin min khalqin jadeed
50:15.translation: Did We fail in the first creation? But they are in confusion over a new creation.

50:16.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna al-insanawanaAAlamu ma tuwaswisu bihi nafsuhu wanahnu aqrabuilayhi min habli alwareed
50:16.translation: And We have already created man and know what his soul whispers to him, and We are closer to him than [his] jugular vein.

50:17.transliteration: Ith yatalaqqa almutalaqqiyaniAAani alyameeni waAAani ashshimali qaAAeed
50:17.translation: When the two receivers [i.e., recording angels] receive, seated on the right and on the left.

50:18.transliteration: Ma yalfithu min qawlinilla ladayhi raqeebun AAateed
50:18.translation: He [i.e., man] utters no word except that with him is an observer prepared [to record].

50:19.transliteration: Wajaat sakratu almawti bilhaqqithalika ma kunta minhu taheed
50:19.translation: And the intoxication of death will bring the truth; that is what you were trying to avoid.

50:20.translation: And the Horn will be blown. That is the Day of [carrying out] the threat.

50:21.translation: And every soul will come, with it a driver and a witness.

50:22.transliteration: Laqad kunta fee ghaflatin min hathafakashafna AAanka ghitaaka fabasarukaalyawma hadeed
50:22.translation: [It will be said], "You were certainly in unmindfulness of this, and We have removed from you your cover, so your sight, this Day, is sharp."

50:23.translation: And his companion, [the angel], will say, "This [record] is what is with me, prepared."

50:24.translation: [Allāh will say], "Throw into Hell every obstinate disbeliever,

50:25.translation: Preventer of good, aggressor, and doubter,

50:26.transliteration: Allathee jaAAala maAAa Allahiilahan akhara faalqiyahu fee alAAathabiashshadeed
50:26.translation: Who made [as equal] with Allāh another deity; then throw him into the severe punishment."

50:27.transliteration: Qala qareenuhu rabbana maatghaytuhu walakin kana fee dalalinbaAAeed
50:27.translation: His [devil] companion will say, "Our Lord, I did not make him transgress, but he [himself] was in extreme error."

50:28.transliteration: Qala la takhtasimooladayya waqad qaddamtu ilaykum bilwaAAeed
50:28.translation: [Allāh] will say, "Do not dispute before Me, while I had already presented to you the threat [i.e., warning].

50:29.transliteration: Ma yubaddalu alqawlu ladayya wamaana bithallamin lilAAabeed
50:29.translation: The word [i.e., decree] will not be changed with Me, and never will I be unjust to the servants."

50:30.transliteration: Yawma naqoolu lijahannama hali imtala/tiwataqoolu hal min mazeed
50:30.translation: On the Day We will say to Hell, "Have you been filled?" and it will say, "Are there some more,"

50:31.translation: And Paradise will be brought near to the righteous, not far,

50:32.translation: [It will be said], "This is what you were promised - for every returner [to Allāh] and keeper [of His covenant].

50:33.transliteration: Man khashiya arrahmanabilghaybi wajaa biqalbin muneeb
50:33.translation: Who feared the Most Merciful in the unseen and came with a heart returning [in repentance].

50:34.translation: Enter it in peace. This is the Day of Eternity."

50:35.translation: They will have whatever they wish therein, and with Us is more.

50:36.transliteration: Wakam ahlakna qablahum min qarnin humashaddu minhum batshan fanaqqaboo fee albiladi halmin mahees
50:36.translation: And how many a generation before them did We destroy who were greater than them in [striking] power and had explored throughout the lands. Is there any place of escape?

50:37.transliteration: Inna fee thalika lathikraliman kana lahu qalbun aw alqa assamAAawahuwa shaheed
50:37.translation: Indeed in that is a reminder for whoever has a heart or who listens while he is present [in mind].

50:38.transliteration: Walaqad khalaqna assamawatiwal-arda wama baynahuma fee sittatiayyamin wama massana min lughoob
50:38.translation: And We did certainly create the heavens and earth and what is between them in six days, and there touched Us no weariness.

50:39.transliteration: Fasbir AAala mayaqooloona wasabbih bihamdi rabbika qabla tulooAAiashshamsi waqabla alghuroob
50:39.translation: So be patient, [O Muḥammad], over what they say and exalt [Allāh] with praise of your Lord before the rising of the sun and before its setting,

50:40.translation: And [in part] of the night exalt Him and after prostration [i.e., prayer].

50:41.transliteration: WastamiAA yawma yunadi almunadimin makanin qareeb
50:41.translation: And listen on the Day when the Caller will call out from a place that is near -

50:42.transliteration: Yawma yasmaAAoona assayhatabilhaqqi thalika yawmu alkhurooj
50:42.translation: The Day they will hear the blast [of the Horn] in truth. That is the Day of Emergence [from the graves].

50:43.translation: Indeed, it is We who give life and cause death, and to Us is the destination

50:44.transliteration: Yawma tashaqqaqu al-ardu AAanhum siraAAanthalika hashrun AAalayna yaseer
50:44.translation: On the Day the earth breaks away from them [and they emerge] rapidly; that is a gathering easy for Us.

50:45.transliteration: Nahnu aAAlamu bima yaqooloonawama anta AAalayhim bijabbarin fathakkir bilqur-animan yakhafu waAAeed
50:45.translation: We are most knowing of what they say, and you are not over them a tyrant. But remind by the Qur’ān whoever fears My threat.

51:2.translation: And the [clouds] carrying a load [of water]

51:3.translation: And the ships sailing with ease

51:5.translation: Indeed, what you are promised is true.

51:6.translation: And indeed, the recompense is to occur.

51:8.translation: Indeed, you are in differing speech.

51:9.translation: Deluded away from it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is he who is deluded.

51:11.translation: Who are within a flood [of confusion] and heedless.

51:12.translation: They ask, "When is the Day of Recompense?"

51:13.translation: [It is] the Day they will be tormented over the Fire.

51:14.transliteration: Thooqoo fitnatakum hatha allatheekuntum bihi tastaAAjiloon
51:14.translation: [And will be told], "Taste your torment. This is that for which you were impatient."

51:15.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be among gardens and springs,

51:16.transliteration: Akhitheena ma atahumrabbuhum innahum kanoo qabla thalika muhsineen
51:16.translation: Accepting what their Lord has given them. Indeed, they were before that doers of good.

51:17.translation: They used to sleep but little of the night,

51:18.translation: And in the hours before dawn they would ask forgiveness,

51:19.translation: And from their properties was [given] the right of the [needy] petitioner and the deprived.

51:20.translation: And on the earth are signs for the certain [in faith]

51:21.translation: And in yourselves. Then will you not see?

51:22.translation: And in the heaven is your provision and whatever you are promised.

51:23.transliteration: Fawarabbi assama-i wal-ardiinnahu lahaqqun mithla ma annakum tantiqoon
51:23.translation: Then by the Lord of the heaven and earth, indeed, it is truth - just as [sure as] it is that you are speaking.

51:24.translation: Has there reached you the story of the honored guests of Abraham? -

51:25.transliteration: Ith dakhaloo AAalayhi faqaloosalaman qala salamun qawmun munkaroon
51:25.translation: When they entered upon him and said, "[We greet you with] peace." He answered, "[And upon you] peace; [you are] a people unknown."

51:26.translation: Then he went to his family and came with a fat [roasted] calf.

51:27.translation: And placed it near them; he said, "Will you not eat?"

51:28.transliteration: Faawjasa minhum kheefatan qaloo latakhaf wabashsharoohu bighulamin AAaleem
51:28.translation: And he felt from them apprehension. They said, "Fear not," and gave him good tidings of a learned boy.

51:29.transliteration: Faaqbalati imraatuhu fee sarratin fasakkatwajhaha waqalat AAajoozun AAaqeem
51:29.translation: And his wife approached with a cry [of alarm] and struck her face and said, "[I am] a barren old woman!"

51:30.transliteration: Qaloo kathaliki qalarabbuki innahu huwa alhakeemu alAAaleem
51:30.translation: They said, "Thus has said your Lord; indeed, He is the Wise, the Knowing."

51:31.translation: [Abraham] said, "Then what is your business [here], O messengers?"

51:32.translation: They said, "Indeed, we have been sent to a people of criminals

51:33.translation: To send down upon them stones of clay,

51:34.translation: Marked in the presence of your Lord for the transgressors."

51:35.translation: So We brought out whoever was in them [i.e., the cities] of the believers.

51:36.transliteration: Fama wajadna feehaghayra baytin mina almuslimeen
51:36.translation: And We found not within them other than a [single] house of Muslims.

51:37.transliteration: Watarakna feeha ayatanlillatheena yakhafoona alAAathaba al-aleem
51:37.translation: And We left therein a sign for those who fear the painful punishment.

51:38.transliteration: Wafee moosa ith arsanahuila firAAawna bisultanin mubeen
51:38.translation: And in Moses [was a sign], when We sent him to Pharaoh with clear authority.

51:39.translation: But he turned away with his supporters and said, "A magician or a madman."

51:40.transliteration: Faakhathnahu wajunoodahufanabathnahum fee alyammi wahuwa muleem
51:40.translation: So We took him and his soldiers and cast them into the sea, and he was blameworthy.

51:41.transliteration: Wafee AAadin ith arsalnaAAalayhimu arreeha alAAaqeem
51:41.translation: And in ʿAad [was a sign], when We sent against them the barren wind.

51:42.transliteration: Ma tatharu min shay-in atatAAalayhi illa jaAAalat-hu karrameem
51:42.translation: It left nothing of what it came upon but that it made it like disintegrated ruins.

51:43.transliteration: Wafee thamooda ith qeela lahumtamattaAAoo hatta heen
51:43.translation: And in Thamūd, when it was said to them, "Enjoy yourselves for a time."

51:44.transliteration: FaAAataw AAan amri rabbihim faakhathat-humuassaAAiqatu wahum yanthuroon
51:44.translation: But they were insolent toward the command of their Lord, so the thunderbolt seized them while they were looking on.

51:45.transliteration: Fama istataAAoo min qiyaminwama kanoo muntasireen
51:45.translation: And they were unable to arise, nor could they defend themselves.

51:46.transliteration: Waqawma noohin min qablu innahum kanooqawman fasiqeen
51:46.translation: And [We destroyed] the people of Noah before; indeed, they were a people defiantly disobedient.

51:47.translation: And the heaven We constructed with strength, and indeed, We are [its] expander.

51:48.translation: And the earth We have spread out, and excellent is the preparer.

51:49.transliteration: Wamin kulli shay-in khalaqna zawjaynilaAAallakum tathakkaroon
51:49.translation: And of all things We created two mates [i.e., counterparts]; perhaps you will remember.

51:50.transliteration: Fafirroo ila Allahi inneelakum minhu natheerun mubeen
51:50.translation: So flee to Allāh. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.

51:51.transliteration: Wala tajAAaloo maAAa Allahi ilahanakhara innee lakum minhu natheerun mubeen
51:51.translation: And do not make [as equal] with Allāh another deity. Indeed, I am to you from Him a clear warner.

51:52.transliteration: Kathalika ma ata allatheenamin qablihim min rasoolin illa qaloo sahirunaw majnoon
51:52.translation: Similarly, there came not to those before them any messenger except that they said, "A magician or a madman."

51:53.transliteration: Atawasaw bihi bal hum qawmun taghoon
51:53.translation: Did they suggest it to them? Rather, they [themselves] are a transgressing people.

51:54.translation: So leave them, [O Muḥammad], for you are not to be blamed.

51:55.translation: And remind, for indeed, the reminder benefits the believers.

51:56.translation: And I did not create the jinn and mankind except to worship Me.

51:57.transliteration: Ma oreedu minhum min rizqin wamaoreedu an yutAAimoon
51:57.translation: I do not want from them any provision, nor do I want them to feed Me.

51:58.transliteration: Inna Allaha huwa arrazzaquthoo alquwwati almateen
51:58.translation: Indeed, it is Allāh who is the [continual] Provider, the firm possessor of strength.

51:59.transliteration: Fa-inna lillatheena thalamoothanooban mithla thanoobi as-habihimfala yastaAAjiloon
51:59.translation: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a portion [of punishment] like the portion of their companions [i.e., predecessors], so let them not impatiently urge Me.

51:60.transliteration: Fawaylun lillatheena kafaroo minyawmihimu allathee yooAAadoon
51:60.translation: And woe to those who have disbelieved from their Day which they are promised.

52:5.translation: And [by] the ceiling [i.e., heaven] raised high

52:6.translation: And [by] the sea set on fire,

52:7.translation: Indeed, the punishment of your Lord will occur.

52:8.translation: Of it there is no preventer.

52:9.translation: On the Day the heaven will sway with circular motion

52:10.translation: And the mountains will pass on, departing -

52:11.translation: Then woe, that Day, to the deniers,

52:12.translation: Who are in [empty] discourse amusing themselves.

52:13.translation: The Day they are thrust toward the fire of Hell with a [violent] thrust, [its angels will say],

52:14.translation: "This is the Fire which you used to deny.

52:15.translation: Then is this magic, or do you not see?

52:16.transliteration: Islawha fasbirooaw la tasbiroo sawaon AAalaykum innamatujzawna ma kuntum taAAmaloon
52:16.translation: [Enter to] burn therein; then be patient or impatient - it is all the same for you. You are only being recompensed [for] what you used to do."

52:17.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be in gardens and pleasure,

52:18.transliteration: Fakiheena bima atahumrabbuhum wawaqahum rabbuhum AAathaba aljaheem
52:18.translation: Enjoying what their Lord has given them, and their Lord protected them from the punishment of Hellfire.

52:19.translation: [They will be told], "Eat and drink in satisfaction for what you used to do."

52:20.transliteration: Muttaki-eena AAala sururin masfoofatinwazawwajnahum bihoorin AAeen
52:20.translation: They will be reclining on thrones lined up, and We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.

52:21.transliteration: Wallatheena amanoo wattabaAAat-humthurriyyatuhum bi-eemanin alhaqnabihim thurriyyatahum wama alatnahum minAAamalihim min shay-in kullu imri-in bima kasaba raheen
52:21.translation: And those who believed and whose descendants followed them in faith - We will join with them their descendants, and We will not deprive them of anything of their deeds. Every person, for what he earned, is retained.

52:22.translation: And We will provide them with fruit and meat from whatever they desire.

52:23.transliteration: YatanazaAAoona feeha ka/san lalaghwun feeha wala ta/theem
52:23.translation: They will exchange with one another a cup [of wine] wherein [results] no ill speech or commission of sin.

52:24.transliteration: Wayatoofu AAalayhim ghilmanunlahum kaannahum lu/luon maknoon
52:24.translation: There will circulate among them [servant] boys [especially] for them, as if they were pearls well-protected.

52:25.translation: And they will approach one another, inquiring of each other.

52:26.transliteration: Qaloo inna kunna qablufee ahlina mushfiqeen
52:26.translation: They will say, "Indeed, we were previously among our people fearful [of displeasing Allāh].

52:27.translation: So Allāh conferred favor upon us and protected us from the punishment of the Scorching Fire.

52:28.transliteration: Inna kunna min qablu nadAAoohuinnahu huwa albarru arraheem
52:28.translation: Indeed, we used to supplicate Him before. Indeed, it is He who is the Beneficent, the Merciful."

52:29.transliteration: Fathakkir fama anta biniAAmatirabbika bikahin wala majnoon
52:29.translation: So remind, [O Muḥammad], for you are not, by the favor of your Lord, a soothsayer or a madman.

52:30.transliteration: Am yaqooloona shaAAirun natarabbasubihi rayba almanoon
52:30.translation: Or do they say [of you], "A poet for whom we await a misfortune of time"?

52:31.translation: Say, "Wait, for indeed I am, with you, among the waiters."

52:32.transliteration: Am ta/muruhum ahlamuhum bihathaam hum qawmun taghoon
52:32.translation: Or do their minds command them to [say] this, or are they a transgressing people?

52:33.translation: Or do they say, "He has made it up"? Rather, they do not believe.

52:34.translation: Then let them produce a statement like it, if they should be truthful.

52:35.transliteration: Am khuliqoo min ghayri shay-in am humu alkhaliqoon
52:35.translation: Or were they created by nothing, or were they the creators [of themselves]?

52:36.transliteration: Am khalaqoo assamawatiwal-arda bal la yooqinoon
52:36.translation: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? Rather, they are not certain.

52:37.transliteration: Am AAindahum khaza-inu rabbika amhumu almusaytiroon
