82:16.translation: And never therefrom will they be absent.

82:17.translation: And what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?

82:18.translation: Then, what can make you know what is the Day of Recompense?

82:19.transliteration: Yawma la tamliku nafsun linafsinshay-an wal-amru yawma-ithin lillah
82:19.translation: It is the Day when a soul will not possess for another soul [power to do] a thing; and the command, that Day, is [entirely] with Allāh.

83:1.translation: Woe to those who give less [than due],

83:2.translation: Who, when they take a measure from people, take in full.

83:3.translation: But if they give by measure or by weight to them, they cause loss.

83:4.translation: Do they not think that they will be resurrected

83:6.translation: The Day when mankind will stand before the Lord of the worlds?

83:7.translation: No! Indeed, the record of the wicked is in sijjeen.

83:8.translation: And what can make you know what is sijjeen?

83:9.translation: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed.

83:10.translation: Woe, that Day, to the deniers,

83:11.translation: Who deny the Day of Recompense.

83:12.transliteration: Wama yukaththibu bihi illakullu muAAtadin atheem
83:12.translation: And none deny it except every sinful transgressor.

83:13.transliteration: Itha tutla AAalayhi ayatunaqala asateeru al-awwaleen
83:13.translation: When Our verses are recited to him, he says, "Legends of the former peoples."

83:14.transliteration: Kalla bal rana AAalaquloobihim ma kanoo yaksiboon
83:14.translation: No! Rather, the stain has covered their hearts of that which they were earning.

83:15.translation: No! Indeed, from their Lord, that Day, they will be partitioned.

83:16.translation: Then indeed, they will [enter and] burn in Hellfire.

83:17.transliteration: Thumma yuqalu hatha allatheekuntum bihi tukaththiboon
83:17.translation: Then it will be said [to them], "This is what you used to deny."

83:18.translation: No! Indeed, the record of the righteous is in ʿilliyyūn.

83:19.translation: And what can make you know what is ʿilliyyūn?

83:20.translation: It is [their destination recorded in] a register inscribed

83:21.translation: Which is witnessed by those brought near [to Allāh].

83:22.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be in pleasure

83:24.translation: You will recognize in their faces the radiance of pleasure.

83:25.translation: They will be given to drink [pure] wine [which was] sealed.

83:26.translation: The last of it is musk. So for this let the competitors compete.

83:27.translation: And its mixture is of Tasneem,

83:28.translation: A spring from which those near [to Allāh] drink.

83:29.transliteration: Inna allatheena ajramoo kanoomina allatheena amanoo yadhakoon
83:29.translation: Indeed, those who committed crimes used to laugh at those who believed.

83:30.translation: And when they passed by them, they would exchange derisive glances.

83:31.translation: And when they returned to their people, they would return jesting.

83:32.translation: And when they saw them, they would say, "Indeed, those are truly lost."

83:33.translation: But they had not been sent as guardians over them.

83:34.translation: So Today those who believed are laughing at the disbelievers,

83:36.translation: Have the disbelievers [not] been rewarded [this Day] for what they used to do?

84:2.translation: And has listened [i.e., responded] to its Lord and was obligated [to do so]

84:3.translation: And when the earth has been extended

84:4.translation: And has cast out that within it and relinquished [it].

84:5.translation: And has listened [i.e., responded] to its Lord and was obligated [to do so] -

84:6.transliteration: Ya ayyuha al-insanuinnaka kadihun ila rabbika kadhanfamulaqeeh
84:6.translation: O mankind, indeed you are laboring toward your Lord with [great] exertion and will meet it.

84:7.translation: Then as for he who is given his record in his right hand,

84:8.translation: He will be judged with an easy account

84:9.translation: And return to his people in happiness.

84:10.translation: But as for he who is given his record behind his back,

84:11.translation: He will cry out for destruction

84:12.translation: And [enter to] burn in a Blaze.

84:13.translation: Indeed, he had [once] been among his people in happiness;

84:14.translation: Indeed, he had thought he would never return [to Allāh].

84:15.transliteration: Bala inna rabbahu kana bihi baseera
84:15.translation: But yes! Indeed, his Lord was ever, of him, Seeing.

84:16.translation: So I swear by the twilight glow

84:17.translation: And [by] the night and what it envelops

84:18.translation: And [by] the moon when it becomes full

84:19.translation: [That] you will surely embark upon [i.e., experience] state after state.

84:20.translation: So what is [the matter] with them [that] they do not believe,

84:21.translation: And when the Qur’ān is recited to them, they do not prostrate [to Allāh]?

84:22.translation: But those who have disbelieved deny,

84:23.translation: And Allāh is most knowing of what they keep within themselves.

84:24.translation: So give them tidings of a painful punishment,

84:25.transliteration: Illa allatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati lahum ajrun ghayrumamnoon
84:25.translation: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds. For them is a reward uninterrupted.

85:1.translation: By the sky containing great stars

85:3.translation: And [by] the witness and what is witnessed,

85:4.translation: Destroyed [i.e., cursed] were the companions of the trench

85:6.translation: When they were sitting near it.

85:7.translation: And they, to what they were doing against the believers, were witnesses.

85:8.transliteration: Wama naqamoo minhum illa anyu/minoo billahi alAAazeezi alhameed
85:8.translation: And they resented them not except because they believed in Allāh, the Exalted in Might, the Praiseworthy,

85:9.transliteration: Allathee lahu mulku assamawatiwal-ardi wallahu AAala kullishay-in shaheed
85:9.translation: To whom belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth. And Allāh, over all things, is Witness.

85:10.transliteration: Inna allatheena fatanoo almu/mineenawalmu/minati thumma lam yatooboo falahum AAathabujahannama walahum AAathabu alhareeq
85:10.translation: Indeed, those who have tortured the believing men and believing women and then have not repented will have the punishment of Hell, and they will have the punishment of the Burning Fire.

85:11.transliteration: Inna allatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati lahum jannatuntajree min tahtiha al-anharu thalikaalfawzu alkabeer
85:11.translation: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds will have gardens beneath which rivers flow. That is the great attainment.

85:12.translation: Indeed, the assault [i.e., vengeance] of your Lord is severe.

85:13.translation: Indeed, it is He who originates [creation] and repeats.

85:14.translation: And He is the Forgiving, the Affectionate,

85:17.translation: Has there reached you the story of the soldiers -

85:19.translation: But they who disbelieve are in [persistent] denial,

85:20.translation: While Allāh encompasses them from behind.

85:21.translation: But this is an honored Qur’ān

86:1.translation: By the sky and the night comer

86:2.translation: And what can make you know what is the night comer?

86:4.transliteration: In kullu nafsin lamma AAalayha hafith
86:4.translation: There is no soul but that it has over it a protector.

86:5.translation: So let man observe from what he was created.

86:6.translation: He was created from a fluid, ejected,

86:7.translation: Emerging from between the backbone and the ribs.

86:8.translation: Indeed, He [i.e., Allāh], to return him [to life], is Able.

86:9.translation: The Day when secrets will be put on trial,

86:10.transliteration: Fama lahu min quwwatin wala nasir
86:10.translation: Then he [i.e., man] will have no power or any helper.

86:11.translation: By the sky which sends back

86:13.translation: Indeed, it [i.e., the Qur’ān] is a decisive statement,

86:15.translation: Indeed, they are planning a plan,

86:16.translation: But I am planning a plan.

86:17.translation: So allow time for the disbelievers. Leave them awhile.

87:1.translation: Exalt the name of your Lord, the Most High,

87:4.translation: And who brings out the pasture

87:6.translation: We will make you recite, [O Muḥammad], and you will not forget,

87:7.transliteration: Illa ma shaa Allahuinnahu yaAAlamu aljahra wama yakhfa
87:7.translation: Except what Allāh should will. Indeed, He knows what is declared and what is hidden.

87:8.translation: And We will ease you toward ease.

87:9.translation: So remind, if the reminder should benefit;

87:10.translation: He who fears [Allāh] will be reminded.

87:11.translation: But the wretched one will avoid it

87:12.translation: [He] who will [enter and] burn in the greatest Fire,

87:14.translation: He has certainly succeeded who purifies himself

87:15.translation: And mentions the name of his Lord and prays.

87:16.translation: But you prefer the worldly life,

87:17.translation: While the Hereafter is better and more enduring.

87:18.translation: Indeed, this is in the former scriptures,

87:19.translation: The scriptures of Abraham and Moses.

88:1.translation: Has there reached you the report of the Overwhelming [event]?

88:2.translation: [Some] faces, that Day, will be humbled,

88:4.translation: They will [enter to] burn in an intensely hot Fire.

88:5.translation: They will be given drink from a boiling spring.

88:6.translation: For them there will be no food except from a poisonous, thorny plant

88:7.translation: Which neither nourishes nor avails against hunger.

88:8.translation: [Other] faces, that Day, will show pleasure.

88:11.translation: Wherein they will hear no unsuitable speech.

88:12.translation: Within it is a flowing spring.

88:13.translation: Within it are couches raised high

88:17.translation: Then do they not look at the camels - how they are created?

88:18.translation: And at the sky - how it is raised?

88:19.translation: And at the mountains - how they are erected?

88:20.translation: And at the earth - how it is spread out?

88:21.translation: So remind, [O Muḥammad]; you are only a reminder.

88:22.translation: You are not over them a controller.

88:23.translation: However, he who turns away and disbelieves

88:24.translation: Then Allāh will punish him with the greatest punishment.

88:25.translation: Indeed, to Us is their return.

88:26.translation: Then indeed, upon Us is their account.

89:3.translation: And [by] the even [number] and the odd

89:4.translation: And [by] the night when it passes,

89:5.transliteration: Hal fee thalika qasamun lithee hijr
89:5.translation: Is there [not] in [all] that an oath [sufficient] for one of perception?

89:6.transliteration: Alam tara kayfa faAAala rabbuka biAAad
89:6.translation: Have you not considered how your Lord dealt with ʿAad -

89:8.transliteration: Allatee lam yukhlaq mithluha fee albilad
89:8.translation: The likes of whom had never been created in the land?

89:9.translation: And [with] Thamūd, who carved out the rocks in the valley?

89:10.translation: And [with] Pharaoh, owner of the stakes?

89:11.translation: [All of] whom oppressed within the lands

89:13.translation: So your Lord poured upon them a scourge of punishment.

89:14.translation: Indeed, your Lord is in observation.

89:15.transliteration: Faamma al-insanu itha maibtalahu rabbuhu faakramahu wanaAAAAamahu fayaqoolu rabbeeakraman
89:15.translation: And as for man, when his Lord tries him and [thus] is generous to him and favors him, he says, "My Lord has honored me."

89:16.transliteration: Waamma itha ma ibtalahufaqadara AAalayhi rizqahu fayaqoolu rabbee ahanan
89:16.translation: But when He tries him and restricts his provision, he says, "My Lord has humiliated me."

89:17.translation: No! But you do not honor the orphan

89:18.translation: And you do not encourage one another to feed the poor.

89:19.translation: And you consume inheritance, devouring [it] altogether,

89:20.translation: And you love wealth with immense love.

89:21.translation: No! When the earth has been leveled - pounded and crushed

89:22.translation: And your Lord has come and the angels, rank upon rank,

89:23.transliteration: Wajee-a yawma-ithin bijahannamayawma-ithin yatathakkaru al-insanu waannalahu aththikra
89:23.translation: And brought [within view], that Day, is Hell - that Day, man will remember, but how [i.e., what good] to him will be the remembrance?

89:24.translation: He will say, "Oh, I wish I had sent ahead [some good] for my life."

89:25.translation: So on that Day, none will punish [as severely] as His punishment,

89:26.translation: And none will bind [as severely] as His binding [of the evildoers].

89:27.translation: [To the righteous it will be said], "O reassured soul,

89:28.translation: Return to your Lord, well-pleased and pleasing [to Him],

90:1.translation: I swear by this city [i.e., Makkah]

90:2.translation: And you, [O Muḥammad], are free of restriction in this city

90:3.translation: And [by] the father and that which was born [of him],

90:4.translation: We have certainly created man into hardship.

90:5.transliteration: Ayahsabu an lan yaqdira AAalayhi ahad
90:5.translation: Does he think that never will anyone overcome him?

90:6.translation: He says, "I have spent wealth in abundance."

90:7.translation: Does he think that no one has seen him?

90:8.translation: Have We not made for him two eyes?

90:9.translation: And a tongue and two lips?

90:10.translation: And have shown him the two ways?

90:11.translation: But he has not broken through the difficult pass.

90:12.translation: And what can make you know what is [breaking through] the difficult pass?

90:13.translation: It is the freeing of a slave

90:14.translation: Or feeding on a day of severe hunger

90:16.translation: Or a needy person in misery

90:17.transliteration: Thumma kana mina allatheena amanoowatawasaw bissabri watawasaw bilmarhama
90:17.translation: And then being among those who believed and advised one another to patience and advised one another to compassion.

90:18.translation: Those are the companions of the right.

90:19.translation: But they who disbelieved in Our signs - those are the companions of the left.

90:20.translation: Over them will be fire closed in.

91:1.translation: By the sun and its brightness

91:2.translation: And [by] the moon when it follows it

91:3.translation: And [by] the day when it displays it

91:4.translation: And [by] the night when it covers [i.e., conceals] it

91:5.translation: And [by] the sky and He who constructed it

91:6.translation: And [by] the earth and He who spread it

91:7.translation: And [by] the soul and He who proportioned it

91:8.translation: And inspired it [with discernment of] its wickedness and its righteousness,

91:9.translation: He has succeeded who purifies it,

91:10.translation: And he has failed who instills it [with corruption].

91:11.translation: Thamūd denied [their prophet] by reason of their transgression,

91:12.translation: When the most wretched of them was sent forth.

91:13.transliteration: Faqala lahum rasoolu Allahi naqataAllahi wasuqyaha
91:13.translation: And the messenger of Allāh [i.e., Ṣāliḥ] said to them, "[Do not harm] the she-camel of Allāh or [prevent her from] her drink."

91:14.transliteration: Fakaththaboohu faAAaqaroohafadamdama AAalayhim rabbuhum bithanbihim fasawwaha
91:14.translation: But they denied him and hamstrung her. So their Lord brought down upon them destruction for their sin and made it equal [upon all of them].

91:15.translation: And He does not fear the consequence thereof.

92:1.translation: By the night when it covers

92:2.translation: And [by] the day when it appears

92:3.translation: And [by] He who created the male and female,

92:5.translation: As for he who gives and fears Allāh

92:7.translation: We will ease him toward ease.

92:8.translation: But as for he who withholds and considers himself free of need

92:10.translation: We will ease him toward difficulty.

92:11.translation: And what will his wealth avail him when he falls?

92:13.translation: And indeed, to us belongs the Hereafter and the first [life].

92:14.translation: So I have warned you of a Fire which is blazing.

92:15.translation: None will [enter to] burn therein except the most wretched one

92:16.translation: Who had denied and turned away.

92:17.translation: But the righteous one will avoid it

92:18.translation: [He] who gives [from] his wealth to purify himself

92:19.translation: And not [giving] for anyone who has [done him] a favor to be rewarded

92:20.translation: But only seeking the face [i.e., acceptance] of his Lord, Most High.

92:21.translation: And he is going to be satisfied.

93:2.translation: And [by] the night when it covers with darkness,

93:3.translation: Your Lord has not taken leave of you, [O Muḥammad], nor has He detested [you].

93:4.translation: And the Hereafter is better for you than the first [life].

93:5.translation: And your Lord is going to give you, and you will be satisfied.

93:6.translation: Did He not find you an orphan and give [you] refuge?

93:7.translation: And He found you lost and guided [you],

93:8.translation: And He found you poor and made [you] self-sufficient.

93:9.translation: So as for the orphan, do not oppress [him].

93:10.translation: And as for the petitioner, do not repel [him].

93:11.translation: But as for the favor of your Lord, report [it].

94:1.translation: Did We not expand for you, [O Muḥammad], your breast?

94:2.translation: And We removed from you your burden

94:3.translation: Which had weighed upon your back

94:4.translation: And raised high for you your repute.

94:5.translation: For indeed, with hardship [will be] ease [i.e., relief].

94:7.translation: So when you have finished [your duties], then stand up [for worship].

94:8.translation: And to your Lord direct [your] longing.

95:1.translation: By the fig and the olive

95:4.translation: We have certainly created man in the best of stature;

95:5.translation: Then We return him to the lowest of the low,

95:6.transliteration: Illa allatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati falahum ajrun ghayrumamnoon
95:6.translation: Except for those who believe and do righteous deeds, for they will have a reward uninterrupted.

95:7.translation: So what yet causes you to deny the Recompense?

95:8.translation: Is not Allāh the most just of judges?

96:1.translation: Recite in the name of your Lord who created

96:2.translation: Created man from a clinging substance.

96:3.translation: Recite, and your Lord is the most Generous -

96:5.translation: Taught man that which he knew not.

96:8.translation: Indeed, to your Lord is the return.

96:9.translation: Have you seen the one who forbids

96:11.translation: Have you seen if he is upon guidance

96:13.translation: Have you seen if he denies and turns away -

96:14.translation: Does he not know that Allāh sees?

96:15.translation: No! If he does not desist, We will surely drag him by the forelock

96:17.translation: Then let him call his associates;

96:18.translation: We will call the angels of Hell.

96:19.translation: No! Do not obey him. But prostrate and draw near [to Allāh].

97:1.translation: Indeed, We sent it [i.e., the Qur’ān] down during the Night of Decree.

97:2.translation: And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?

97:3.transliteration: Laylatu alqadri khayrun min alfi shahr
97:3.translation: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.

97:4.transliteration: Tanazzalu almala-ikatu warroohufeeha bi-ithni rabbihim min kulli amr
97:4.translation: The angels and the Spirit [i.e., Gabriel] descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.

97:5.translation: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.

98:1.transliteration: Lam yakuni allatheena kafaroo min ahlialkitabi walmushrikeena munfakkeena hattata/tiyahumu albayyina
98:1.translation: Those who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists were not to be parted [from misbelief] until there came to them clear evidence

98:2.translation: A Messenger from Allāh, reciting purified scriptures

98:3.translation: Within which are correct writings [i.e., rulings and laws].

98:4.transliteration: Wama tafarraqa allatheena ootooalkitaba illa min baAAdi ma jaat-humualbayyina
98:4.translation: Nor did those who were given the Scripture become divided until after there had come to them clear evidence.

98:5.transliteration: Wama omiroo illa liyaAAbudooAllaha mukhliseena lahu addeena hunafaawayuqeemoo assalata wayu/too azzakatawathalika deenu alqayyima
98:5.translation: And they were not commanded except to worship Allāh, [being] sincere to Him in religion, inclining to truth, and to establish prayer and to give zakāh. And that is the correct religion.

98:6.transliteration: Inna allatheena kafaroo min ahli alkitabiwalmushrikeena fee nari jahannama khalideenafeeha ola-ika hum sharru albariyya
98:6.translation: Indeed, they who disbelieved among the People of the Scripture and the polytheists will be in the fire of Hell, abiding eternally therein. Those are the worst of creatures.

98:7.transliteration: Inna allatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati ola-ika humkhayru albariyya
98:7.translation: Indeed, they who have believed and done righteous deeds - those are the best of creatures.

98:8.transliteration: Jazaohum AAinda rabbihim jannatuAAadnin tajree min tahtiha al-anharu khalideenafeeha abadan radiya Allahu AAanhum waradooAAanhu thalika liman khashiya rabbah
98:8.translation: Their reward with their Lord will be gardens of perpetual residence beneath which rivers flow, wherein they will abide forever, Allāh being pleased with them and they with Him. That is for whoever has feared his Lord.

99:1.translation: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake

99:2.translation: And the earth discharges its burdens

99:3.translation: And man says, "What is [wrong] with it?" -

99:4.translation: That Day, it will report its news

99:5.translation: Because your Lord has inspired [i.e., commanded] it.

99:6.translation: That Day, the people will depart separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.

99:7.translation: So whoever does an atom's weight of good will see it,

99:8.translation: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.

100:2.translation: And the producers of sparks [when] striking

100:5.translation: Arriving thereby in the center collectively,

100:6.translation: Indeed mankind, to his Lord, is ungrateful.

100:7.translation: And indeed, he is to that a witness.

100:8.translation: And indeed he is, in love of wealth, intense.

100:9.transliteration: Afala yaAAlamu itha buAAthira mafee alquboor
100:9.translation: But does he not know that when the contents of the graves are scattered

100:10.translation: And that within the breasts is obtained,

100:11.translation: Indeed, their Lord with them, that Day, is [fully] Aware.

101:3.translation: And what can make you know what is the Striking Calamity?

101:4.translation: It is the Day when people will be like moths, dispersed,

101:5.translation: And the mountains will be like wool, fluffed up.

101:6.translation: Then as for one whose scales are heavy [with good deeds],

101:7.translation: He will be in a pleasant life.

101:8.translation: But as for one whose scales are light,

101:9.translation: His refuge will be an abyss.

101:10.translation: And what can make you know what that is?

101:11.translation: It is a Fire, intensely hot.

102:3.translation: No! You are going to know.

102:4.translation: Then, no! You are going to know.

102:5.translation: No! If you only knew with knowledge of certainty...

102:6.translation: You will surely see the Hellfire.

102:7.translation: Then you will surely see it with the eye of certainty.

102:8.translation: Then you will surely be asked that Day about pleasure.

103:3.transliteration: Illa allatheena amanoowaAAamiloo assalihati watawasaw bilhaqqiwatawasaw bissabr
103:3.translation: Except for those who have believed and done righteous deeds and advised each other to truth and advised each other to patience.

104:1.translation: Woe to every scorner and mocker

104:2.translation: Who collects wealth and [continuously] counts it.

104:3.translation: He thinks that his wealth will make him immortal.

104:4.translation: No! He will surely be thrown into the Crusher.

104:5.translation: And what can make you know what is the Crusher?

104:6.translation: It is the fire of Allāh, [eternally] fueled,

104:7.translation: Which mounts directed at the hearts.

104:8.translation: Indeed, it [i.e., Hellfire] will be closed down upon them

105:1.transliteration: Alam tara kayfa faAAala rabbuka bi-as-habialfeel
105:1.translation: Have you not considered, [O Muḥammad], how your Lord dealt with the companions of the elephant?

105:2.translation: Did He not make their plan into misguidance?

105:3.translation: And He sent against them birds in flocks,

105:4.translation: Striking them with stones of hard clay,

105:5.translation: And He made them like eaten straw.

106:1.translation: For the accustomed security of the Quraysh -

106:2.translation: Their accustomed security [in] the caravan of winter and summer -

106:3.translation: Let them worship the Lord of this House,

106:4.transliteration: Allathee atAAamahum min jooAAinwaamanahum min khawf
106:4.translation: Who has fed them, [saving them] from hunger and made them safe, [saving them] from fear.

107:1.translation: Have you seen the one who denies the Recompense?

107:2.translation: For that is the one who drives away the orphan

107:3.translation: And does not encourage the feeding of the poor.

107:4.translation: So woe to those who pray

107:5.translation: [But] who are heedless of their prayer -

107:6.translation: Those who make show [of their deeds]

108:1.translation: Indeed, We have granted you, [O Muḥammad], al-Kawthar.

108:2.translation: So pray to your Lord and offer sacrifice [to Him alone].

108:3.translation: Indeed, your enemy is the one cut off.

109:2.translation: I do not worship what you worship.

109:3.translation: Nor are you worshippers of what I worship.

109:4.translation: Nor will I be a worshipper of what you worship.

109:5.translation: Nor will you be worshippers of what I worship.

109:6.translation: For you is your religion, and for me is my religion."

110:1.translation: When the victory of Allāh has come and the conquest,

110:2.transliteration: Waraayta annasa yadkhuloonafee deeni Allahi afwaja
110:2.translation: And you see the people entering into the religion of Allāh in multitudes,

110:3.transliteration: Fasabbih bihamdi rabbika wastaghfirhuinnahu kana tawwaba
110:3.translation: Then exalt [Him] with praise of your Lord and ask forgiveness of Him. Indeed, He is ever Accepting of Repentance.

111:1.translation: May the hands of Abū Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he.

111:2.translation: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained.

111:3.translation: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame

111:4.translation: And his wife [as well] - the carrier of firewood.

111:5.translation: Around her neck is a rope of [twisted] fiber.

112:3.translation: He neither begets nor is born,

112:4.translation: Nor is there to Him any equivalent."

113:1.translation: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of daybreak

113:2.translation: From the evil of that which He created

113:3.translation: And from the evil of darkness when it settles

113:4.translation: And from the evil of the blowers in knots

113:5.translation: And from the evil of an envier when he envies."

114:1.translation: Say, "I seek refuge in the Lord of mankind,

114:4.translation: From the evil of the retreating whisperer -

114:5.translation: Who whispers [evil] into the breasts of mankind -

114:6.translation: From among the jinn and mankind".
